### Part 061

- About the middle gearwheel... ｜ 关于中间的齿轮…
- "Round moon in the heavens: full moon at night, celebrate with circle of friends." ｜ 「天上有月，月成圆，人也团圆。」
- Okay. Stay out of sight — don't let him see you! ｜ 好，悄悄接近他，不要被发现了哦！
- Help Anthony ｜ 帮助安东尼
- "Ha. You think you're the only one to think of that? Miss Hautemontagne has been there for the last three months!" ｜ 「呵，你以为其他人想不到吗？沃特蒙泰涅小姐都已经跑了三个月啦！」
- I won't. ｜ 当然不会。
- Clean and Healthy ｜ 洁净与健康
- The majority of the plant is hidden underground. When stepped on, it produces amber to trap the invader. ｜ 它本身大部分隐于地下，若被踩到，就会生出琥珀，将入侵者包裹在其中。
- That is true. But I wouldn't make such big requests. ｜ 有道理呢。不过我是不会说那么多大话啦。
- Talk to everyone ｜ 与众人对话
- Indeed, Madame President. I am truly most shooketh. ｜ 没错，会长。我真的被震惊了。
- So, who else needs some help around here... ｜ 好，接下来看看其他有烦恼的人…
- ...You done yet? Or do you wanna fight? ｜ …你有完没完。怎么？想试试拳头了？

- Indwell ｜ 附身

- ...Everyone. ｜ …各位。
- Bye then. If you hear any interesting stories, do share them with me next time we meet. ｜ 嗯嗯，再见噢。听到了什么有趣的故事下次说给我吧。
- *sigh* Telling Klee so many stories about Inazuma during the trip was probably not the best idea. ｜ 唉，真不知道我是不是不该在路上，给可莉讲那么多稻妻的故事了。
- As you know, we often invite artists to perform here at our restaurant. The most popular of these are the magical performers Mr. Lyney and Ms. Lynette. ｜ 如您所知，我们经常会邀请艺术家在餐厅内进行才艺演出。眼下最受观众欢迎的，当属林尼先生与琳妮特小姐的魔术表演。

- I remember. ｜ 我记住了。

- Ah, yes. Please take these as a token of my thanks. It isn't much, but do accept it. ｜ 哦，对了，这些东西还请阁下收下。虽然不算太多…但也是我的一份心意。
- It just makes me feel like all my secrets have nowhere to hide, like she can just peer in and see them. But it's different with you. I trust you, so I don't feel I need to hide my secrets in the first place. ｜ 就好像我所有的秘密都无处遁藏，被她从容地窥探。但你不一样，我很信任你，所以我愿意主动把我的秘密跟你分享。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Doushin, this is Miss Kuki, a business partner of mine. I can vouch for her honest and forthright character. ｜ 同心先生，这位久岐小姐是我的合作伙伴，为人耿直，诚实守信。
- "A weaver of verses who draws from an ocean of expression..." That's the reputation I aspire to. But you're the only person I can share that with. I am actually writing a novel... but I can't let you see it. Not yet. The time will come, though... You'll be able to read it when it's on sale in book stores all over Liyue. ｜ 「洋洋万言，织诗成锦。」唉，我也想有这样的评价啊。这件事我只和你一个人说。其实，我也在写小说。现、现在当然不能给你看，以后…以后你会在书店里看到的。
- Um, sure? You're welcome? ｜ 呃？不客气…？
- Some bad guy tried to take me away earlier... But it's okay. I'm more careful now. I'll be able to avoid danger. ｜ 虽然之前差点被坏人带走…但是没关系，有了之前的教训，现在我更加小心了，会小心避开危险。
- Wait, what is the bill you just mentioned? ｜ 等等，刚刚你说的法案是？

- When Yumemizuki Mizuki triggers Swirl while in her Dreamdrifter state, Dreamdrifter's duration increases by 2.5s. This effect can trigger once every 0.3s for a maximum of 2 times per Dreamdrifter state. ｜ 梦见月瑞希在梦浮状态下触发扩散反应时，梦浮状态的持续时间延长2.5秒。该效果每0.3秒至多触发1次，在一次梦浮状态期间至多触发2次。
- "Children fascinated by the moon will weep when they gaze upon it, for the moon has turned into fine sand and entered their eyes. In many stories, no tears are shed in vain." ｜ 「为月亮所迷的孩子望着月亮时会流泪，是因为月亮化成的细沙进入了眼中。在许许多多的故事里，没有一滴眼泪会是白流的。」
- Forget it. I don't think anyone would be interested... ｜ 还是算了吧，应该不会有人感兴趣…

- Beetle fighting is an awesome idea! Just so happens I caught myself a true beast of an Onikabuto the other day, I call it "Demon of Darkness"! ｜ 斗虫是个绝妙的点子！我最近抓到了一只超强的鬼兜虫战士，我叫它「深黯恶魔」！

- This troublemaker snuck in here. Said they're looking for... Well, they're up to no good, I'll wager — and I thought I would just deal with this for Beidou... ｜ 这家伙私闯进来，还说要去找…怕是没打什么好主意，这么点小事，我就替北斗姐料理了…

- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2703]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A2703] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S27032]</color> once.\nWhen your <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2703]</color>, who has this card equipped, is on the field, when you switch your active character to one with <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127032]</color> equipped: Deal 1 $[K107]. (Once per Round)\n(You must have $[A2703] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2703]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A2703]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S27032]</color>。\n装备有此牌的<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2703]</color>在场，我方装备了<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127032]</color>的角色切换至出战时：造成1点$[K107]。（每回合1次）\n（牌组中包含$[A2703]，才能加入牌组）
- A low table constructed from unpolished stone and raw White Chestnut Oak Wood. Covered with a purple tablecloth, it exudes a subtle sense of mystery. It can be found at Mol Stone House in Chuwen Fair.\nIt is said that some members of the Masters of the Night-Wind believe that the environment in which materials are crafted can have a significant impact on the end result. As such, they tend to prefer using items that are still in a raw, unrefined state, such as tables that have not yet been meticulously polished... ｜ 由未经打磨的石料与「白栗栎木」原木嵌合而成的矮桌，桌面上覆盖有紫色的桌布，透着一股淡淡的神秘气息，可在楚汶市集的摩尔石屋处见到。\n据说，部分「烟谜主」的人相信，环境的因素会影响材料合成的结果。因此在选择用具时，他们也更倾向于使用那些未经过度加工的原生态物品，就比如一张未经过仔细打磨的桌子…

- In Fish-Off Mode, you'll get to compete against evenly-matched opponents and earn Wrangler Points based on your <color=#d27e35ff>individual performance</color> and <color=#d27e35ff>challenge ranking</color>.\nAdditionally, <color=#d27e35ff>action points</color> spent and earned in Fish-Off Mode will contribute to your accumulated action points, which determine your <color=#d27e35ff>Tier</color> for your next fish-off challenge as well as your <color=#d27e35ff>display position</color> on your Friend Records. ｜ 竞技模式下，将与旗鼓相当的对手展开较量，根据<color=#d27e35ff>个人表现</color>和<color=#d27e35ff>挑战名次</color>获取追渔评分。\n此外，竞技模式中消耗和获取的<color=#d27e35ff>行动点</color>可以累计为全局行动点，全局行动点决定了下一次参与竞技模式时的<color=#d27e35ff>竞技区</color>，以及在好友记录界面的<color=#d27e35ff>展示顺位</color>。

- While I was in Fontaine, I learned a few new drawing techniques and a thing or two about filming. I had quite a few sparks of inspiration, too. ｜ 在枫丹旅行期间，我接触了几种新的绘画技巧，还有映影这门技术，有了不少灵感。
- You prepare to help a bullied hilichurl to even the score together with Ella Musk. With any luck, this may lead you to some new clues... ｜ 与艾拉·马斯克一同前去为被欺负的丘丘人打抱不平，或许能够借此得到新的线索？
- Everything comes at a price, and most heroes aren't people who set out to become a hero. ｜ 凡事都有代价，能够成为英雄的人，他们的目的往往都不是成为英雄。
- "Rain" ｜ 「瑞莲」

- Basically, we have to take you down. ｜ 目前看样子是要打倒你。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 consecutive shots with a bow.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nPerforms a more precise <color=#FFD780FF>Aimed Shot</color> with increased DMG.\nWhile aiming, flames will accumulate on the arrowhead. A fully charged flaming arrow will deal <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nFires off a shower of arrows in mid-air before falling and striking the ground, dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续弓箭射击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n进行伤害更高、更为精准的<color=#FFD780FF>瞄准射击</color>。\n瞄准时，烈焰会在箭矢上持续积聚。聚满了烈焰的箭矢会造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中射出箭雨，并迅速下坠冲击地面，在落地时造成范围伤害。
- It seems if you do not have a Travel Permit, you cannot freely enter or leave the island. ｜ 看来拿不到通行凭证的话，就没法自由出入离岛了呢。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 consecutive strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nDrains Stamina over time to perform continuous spinning attacks against all nearby opponents.\nAt the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash. \n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的连续攻击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n持续消耗体力，旋转大剑攻击周围的敌人。\n停止旋转时，会进行一次格外有力的挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Our new owner laid down the law not too long ago. We turn a blind eye towards casual games of dice, but there's zero tolerance for any explicit gambling with real Mora. ｜ 我们新东家有规矩，玩骰子就算了，明面上赌钱想都不要想。
- Attention contestants Mualani and Kachina! You're currently heading out of bounds! Please return to the competition grounds! ｜ 玛拉妮与卡齐娜两位选手，你们正在跑向赛场外，快回来啊！
- Oh! So, in your world, the creation of life is a much showier affair? I'm learning something new every day! ｜ 哦！原来在诸位的世界中，新生命是更加噼里啪啦，绚丽地降临的吗？我学到了。
- If I can't get results, I'm afraid that I'll have a problem getting research funding... And that would be far more devastating than the sky falling. ｜ 要是再拿不出结果，我的研究经费怕是都要出问题…这可比天什么时候会塌要命得多。
- But... I'm not going to tell you what's inside. What treasures you end up with will come down to how lucky you are. ｜ 不过嘛…我不会告诉你这些宝箱里究竟有什么，到底能拿到什么宝贝，主要还是得看你的运气啦。

- Ah, the inscription's gone... ｜ 啊，铭文消失了…

- ...Wow, you're making me hungry already. ｜ …听得我都有点饿了。

- I had no idea the Anglers I released had no natural enemies in Cider Lake and were multiplying so quickly, almost to the point of destroying the lake's ecosystem! ｜ 我完全没想到，我放生的那些「角鲀」在果酒湖里没有天敌，很快就繁衍了一大堆，差点把本地的生态给搞坏！

- I will keep waiting for that sneaky kitsune to come back and apologize to me. Hmph, actually, there's a lot she needs to apologize for! I'll have her know that I'm keeping score! ｜ 吾辈会一直等下去，等那个臭狐狸回来，然后，对吾辈道歉。呶，那家伙要道歉的东西太多了，吾辈天天都在算这笔账呢。
- Hehe, looks like their journey's off to a good start! Paimon wonders if we'll ever meet again... ｜ 嘿嘿，看来它们的旅途有一个顺利的开始呢，不知道以后还有没有机会见到它们…
- Hahaha, to put it simply, I just want everyone to have food and eat well. A rather meaningless ideal, I suppose. ｜ 哈哈哈，说白了，我就是想要让大家都能吃饱吃好而已，是不是个很没意思的理想？
- Ah, I get it now. You wanna repay the favor, but your powers are too puny! ｜ 原来如此。受人恩惠，即便力量不足也想予以回报。

- We heard that you lost your Vision recently. ｜ 听说你失去了神之眼…
- I'm sure you'll agree that everyone's curious about their roots on some level. And my roots... They're in Khaenri'ah, which is said to have been located deep underground somewhere near Sumeru. ｜ 你知道的，所有人都不可能不对自己血脉中的故乡感兴趣。而我的故乡…坎瑞亚，据说曾存在于须弥附近的地底深处。

- Do not tarry here too long. You must leave, and quickly... Yes, you must leave before the coming of the pitch-black tide. ｜ 你们也不要过多停留了，快点离去吧…对，在漆黑的潮水到来之前，你们一定要离去才行。
- That's what we thought too. Given time, we believed that we could revitalize the movement. ｜ 我们也是这样想的，只要给我们时间，我们就能重新组织起有生力量。
- In the intense heat of battle, warriors extend and contract their bodies to the very limit in order to unleash maximal power. The explosive tension of such "dynamics" is also a key element that can be observed and analyzed in certain works of graffiti.\nThus, if one personally joins in the fray, they will almost certainly be able to capture superlative critical "dynamic" moments themselves... ｜ 在富有热情的战斗中，战士们的身躯会以倾泻力量为目的，极限延展或弯曲，这些张力迸烈的「动态」，亦是部分涂鸦的重要元素，有待观察与分析。\n因此，亲自参与战斗，定能捕捉到绝佳「动态」的关键瞬间…

- Talk to Suling ｜ 与夙凌对话
- A feather of dreams that soars free like an eagle. At the end of the gladiator's legendary life, this parting gift was left upon his chest by a bird that knew true freedom. ｜ 如隼般自在的梦想之羽。在传奇生涯的终点，无羁的飞鸟在他的心口覆上了这根羽毛。
- You'd better watch out for your friend Jeht. Take care of her, hide her fangs, and smooth her raised hackles. ｜ 你还是看好你的朋友婕德，保护好她，好好藏起她的獠牙，捋顺她耸起的毛发吧。

- You made it... finally. ｜ 可算来了。

- Oh, forget about that. The doctor's almost here, and you're gonna get all better. Then, we can have a meal together, and I'll help you make whatever you want, okay? You just have to hold on... ｜ 别说这个了。再坚持一下，医生很快就来。等你好起来，想吃什么我陪你一起做，可以吗？
- (How can I incorporate this experience into my novel so that Miss Yae is satisfied...?) ｜ （究竟要怎么把这段经历应用在小说里，才能让主编大人满意呢…）
- We intend to utilize the psychological influence that dreams have on people to help regulate various psychological disorders. ｜ 我们的研究是利用梦境对人的心理影响，调节人们的各种心理障碍。

- I've seen them sneaking around the Khvarena Monument, and it's clear that they're up to no good. They've even started setting up camp nearby... ｜ 之前也曾见到他们在灵光碑附近鬼鬼祟祟的样子，显然没安好心。不仅如此，甚至还在附近扎营…

- *sigh*... I barely remember what our own furniture looks like... Every day, it's like my mom adds another layer of cloth... ｜ 唉…我都快忘了我家里的家具原来的样子了，妈妈总是一层盖一层，再盖一层…

- She's a smart cookie, though, and it was like she was hiding something, so I thought she must have had an ulterior motive. Besides, I have other things to look into right now. ｜ 那可是一位相当聪明的人，她好像在隐瞒什么，一定是有别的目的。另外，我也有自己要调查的事。
- I never thought that knowledge would actually come in useful for earning a living. ｜ 当时可从来没想过以后就靠这些知识维持生计了。
- Okay, if you say so. Granny and I will keep heading back now. Don't be too long! ｜ 那就好，那我和婆婆继续回去等你，你要快点回来。

- Let's keep moving. It might be hard to believe, but being out and about is making me feel a lot better than usual. ｜ 走吧走吧。虽然我这样子没什么说服力，但出来走走，我觉得我精神比平时要好不少。
- If Mr. Kliment wants this salt chalice, then the next object we find will belong to Miss Wanyan, according to the contract agreed upon. ｜ 如果克列门特先生想要这个盐盏，那么按照契约，下一件物品，就是属于宛烟女士的。
- No worries. We can chat when you have some time on your hands. ｜ 没关系，有空来聊聊天也好。

- So the key is whether or not you yourself can develop a sense of belonging in Liyue Harbor. ｜ 所以，重要的是，你能否对璃月港产生「归属感」。
- I can't tell you just yet, but it reminded me of certain past events. ｜ 暂时看不出来，不过它让我想起一些往事。
- Please help me save Master Cheven! ｜ #拜托了，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，救救夏温师父吧！
- After my fallout with the Tanit, the various desert tribes stopped providing me with food and shelter... I'm no longer under any tribe's protection. ｜ 自从塔尼特的事情之后，沙漠各部族都不再为我提供帐篷和食物…我没有部族的保护了。
- (It's like they're finishing each other's sentences...) ｜ （这两个人的说辞怎么感觉一唱一和的…）
- Masseira sure is a bit too strict with Tadhla... ｜ 马塞拉对塔德菈有点苛刻呢…
- Well, how were we supposed to know that someone would be raising Sumpter Beasts out here in the boonies!? If we knew we'd end up facing off with this tough a customer, we'd have returned it to you right away! ｜ 我们怎么知道这高山僻岭的地方居然还有人养驮兽呢…早知道会遇到这么麻烦的家伙，我们早就送还给你了！
- Chasca... If anyone has a hope of seizing this evidence from the high heavens, it is you. ｜ 恰斯卡…能不能抓住飞在天上的证据，就看你们了。

- I've been here for a long time, as you know. After staying in one place for a long time, it's only natural to pick up a few handy tricks to exert some degree of influence over your environment. ｜ 你们知道，我在这里待了很久。在一个地方待得久了，自然会学会几个方便的把戏，对于周遭也多少会有一些影响力。

- A net created using onmyoudou. It can be used to detain the essences of small animals and also serves as a medium to recreate their forms. There exists a training ground somewhere in Inazuma that uses onmyoudou to recreate monsters and villains. The technique used to make these nets may be the product of those same techniques following many long years of degradation in power and knowledge. ｜ 利用「阴阳术式」，制造的「网」。可以拘出小动物的神形，并且以其为媒介，再次化出小动物的形体。在稻妻的某处，存在着利用「阴阳术」再现魔物、寇首的战斗训练场地；这种「网」的技术或许就是知识与力量在年月的磨损中劣化后，又再现出来的产物吧。

"But when greeting allies from afar or when faced with a powerful foe, a Cryo Cicin Mage will respond with a dignified dance to show her respect..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Fatui Cryo Cicin Mage" starts with Talent Card "Cicin's Cold Glare" equipped, and the Mirror Maiden starts with the Talent Card "Mirror Cage" equipped.</color> ｜ 「喵！」「不过，迎接远道而来的友军，或是遇见强劲的对手时，那位冰萤术士也会用庄严的舞步来表达自己的敬意…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「愚人众·冰萤术士」初始装备有天赋牌「冰萤寒光」,「愚人众·藏镜仕女」初始装备有天赋牌「镜锢之笼」。</color>

- Thanks to her, I learned how to navigate the forest by the age of six, and could hunt monsters in the wild by myself the year after that. ｜ 托她的福，我六岁就能在林间打猎不迷路，七岁就能单独讨伐野外的魔物了。

- This is a good reminder that we should always have a contingency plan for everything. ｜ 这也提醒了我们之后应该要做好相关的应急对策。
- A Liyue-style cedar bookshelf of cunning workmanship. It can be used to contain books or other miscellaneous objects and comes with a desk on top.\nMany shopkeepers use such pieces of furniture as convenient emergency counters, reaching down to grab ledgers before doing bookkeeping on the desk above.\nDoing this too often is quite hard on the waist, however, so it may be best to place things you need more on the top grid. ｜ 以「垂香木」制作，形制巧妙的璃月书柜，藏书和摆放杂物皆可，顶部设有桌板。\n常有商铺老板将它用作临时柜台，利用顶部的桌板记账，弯腰探手就能拿放账本，相当便捷。\n只是频繁躬身会对腰部造成损伤，时常要用的东西，还是放在上部的格子为妙。

- A courtyard wall for a grand estate.\nPlanting flowers and other plants beside the walls allows you to view the blooming and withering of nature as the year goes by. ｜ 古宅庭院的围墙。\n沿墙栽培花草，方可透过草木枯荣，明晓春秋。

- In the intense heat of battle, warriors extend and contract their bodies to the very limit in order to unleash maximal power. Some of its attacks will unleash Phagocytic Energy Blocks. <color=#FFE14BFF>Use the corresponding elemental attacks to destroy these Energy Blocks</color> to absorb the power within them, which can then be unleashed when attacking the Consecrated Flying Serpent, dealing significant DMG and paralyzing the creature temporarily. ｜ 因为啃噬伟大的生命体，而扭曲异变的爬行动物。在战斗中，会进入强大的噬骸状态。它的一些攻击将排出噬骸能量块；<color=#FFE14BFF>利用对应的元素攻击破坏能量块</color>，能够汲取其中的强大力量，并在攻击圣骸飞蛇时释放这些能量，造成可观的伤害，并使其暂时瘫痪。

- A gamepiece based on a Treasure Hoarder Scout, each unit has 3 members.\nA member of the decentralized criminal organization that has footprints all over the continent and even deep within unknown domains. Within the group, this unit is usually responsible for scouting and tailing. Their equipment may be quite crude, but can sometimes still be very annoying...\nThis kind of "lightly armed human faction" is the classic example of a unit consisting of large numbers of low-threat members. Though not particularly difficult to deal with, they are useful for training warriors to deal with waves of enemy harassment. ｜ 以「盗宝团·斥候」为原型的兵棋，每个单位编有3名成员。\n足迹遍布大陆各处，甚至深入未知秘境的松散盗贼组织中的一员。在团队协作中，职责通常是踩点与盯梢，装备相对简陋，但有时也能造成一定的麻烦…\n这种「轻度武装的人类势力」堪称低威胁度集群单位的典例，虽不至于难以应付，但有益于训练将士们对抗多波次的袭扰。

- Kaeya: "Diluc, you're a man who knows his own mind. So, help me decide — is it seabird-hunting time or seashell-collecting time?"\nDiluc: "...What is that supposed to mean?"\nKaeya: "Come now, Diluc, be nice! Do you really want to stay here and do nothing at all? We might as well find a way to pass the time. I simply thought collecting seashells might be fun. It was last time — although, we were much younger then."\nDiluc: "I didn't know you still remembered anything from back then... Huh." ｜ 凯亚：「迪卢克，你是个很有主见的人，不如你来决定吧，我们现在是打海鸟还是捞贝壳？」\n迪卢克：「…你想说什么？」\n凯亚：「哎呀别那么凶嘛！谁让我们哪里都去不了呢？还不如找点有趣的事打发时间。捞贝壳是个不错的选择哦，想来我们也就小时候一起去捞过贝壳而已。」\n迪卢克：「你居然还记得那时候的事…哼。」

- The highlight of Lantern Rite is the release of the giant Mingxiao Lantern into the sky, and this year's Mingxiao Lantern is supposed to be a sight well worth the wait. The Plaustrite that will lift the lantern into the air is the largest in twenty years! For this special occasion, the merchants of Liyue have set up the Xiao Market to help gather the materials needed to build the lantern. Unexpectedly, you notice a shady character lurking around the docks. In order to prevent them from ruining the Lantern Rite, you and Paimon decide to keep investigating... ｜ 在海灯节，最重要的一项活动，就是放飞巨型花灯「明霄灯」。 今年的「明霄灯」壮景可期。用来让巨灯浮空的那块「浮生石」，是二十年来最大的一块。 为此，璃月的商人们开设了「霄市」，筹集建灯所用的材料。 但是在码头上，你却意外发现了一个鬼鬼祟祟的人。为了防止他破坏海灯节，你与派蒙决定继续追查下去…

- So what's your plan then? You can't keep her here forever. Someone is bound to find out eventually. ｜ 那你有想过以后怎么办吗？她不可能永远藏在这里，早晚会暴露的。

- This is the opportunity of a lifetime —a thousand lifetimes, even! You're just going to walk away from it? Seriously, listen... ｜ 你这就走了？这可是千载难逢的机会啊！听我说完啊…

- A small bookcase commonly used to store books or important documents in the Palais Mermonia. Employees sometimes also use it to store permitted personal items. If a staff member desires to use it for the latter purpose, they can simply submit an application with the relevant information to administrative personnel. For this reason, the saying "Little Helper for work, Cabernet in the cabinet" has become popular among the Palais Mermonia staff. ｜ 可在沫芒宫内见到的小型书柜，通常被用来存放书籍或重要的档案卷宗，有时也被工作人员用于放置限定清单内的个人物品。如有第二种需求，只需向管理人员申请并登记相关信息，正因此，沫芒宫里也有了「有事小帮箱，无事短矩柜」的说法。
- Anyway, Kevin, we need to go back and get ready to move. ｜ 好了，凯万，我们也要回去准备搬家了。
- Ready and waiting! ｜ 整装待发！
- An ingenious thought... if Mehrak and I had never met before. ｜ 好一个天才的想法。说得像它第一天认识我一样。

- A machine created to complement the energy defects and increase the operational efficiency of clockwork meka. The <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> energies have different enhancive effects, and this machine can also periodically generate energy, allowing it to <color=#FFE14BFF>replenish the power</color> of nearby disabled clockwork meka that shares a similar energy source. After their energy is annihilated by <color=#FFE14BFF>an attack charged with the opposite signature</color>, it will induce an Overloaded state and cause the machine to lose energy, requiring the machine to spend time on Self-Repairs before it can restore its energy generation functions. ｜ 为弥补发条机关能源的缺陷并增强其工作效率，而制造出的机械。将基于其外显的<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>能源特征提供不同的强化效果，并能周期性产生能量，为附近能源特征相同的失能发条机关<color=#FFE14BFF>恢复能量</color>。在被<color=#FFE14BFF>对立性质的攻击</color>湮灭后，将会因为供能过载而失能，并在一段时间后自我修复并重新产生能源特征。

- Bye. ｜ 再见。

- But then I tried some of Mrs. Imatani's homemade stuff, and I couldn't get enough of it. It's a family staple now. ｜ 尝了她的手艺可就忘不掉咯，现在都成我们家里人的习惯了。
- Vanity is but human, and adolescent children gradually gain awareness of beauty and homeliness. They begin to surreptitious don accessories and trim their split hairs with scissors.\nRebellious little tendencies such as these are of no concern to "Father," nor will she interfere.\nBut should a child reveal their position during a night operation on account of a necklace she would not lay aside — now this would require a "Father"'s instruction.\nThus did Arlecchino enter that girl's room, a lovely handbag in hand.\nThe necklace had already been taken off and placed on the table, and the girl stood trembling next to it. She knew her error.\nArlecchino scooped up the necklace and gazed upon it, before walking over and looping it back around the girl's unblemished neck.\nShe then lifted the flowing gold locks around the child's ears. "Oh, you pierced them yourself."\nAnd so "Father" once more retrieved velvet ribbon and jeweled earrings from that bag, tying the girl's hair with the former, and affixing the latter to her ears.\nThen, taking her by the shoulders, she guided the girl before the mirror. The young lady reflected within was as a gem-encrusted noble rose, her beauty shining through the unease that blazed across her features.\n"It is normal to be vain at your age. But do not let these beautiful trinkets arouse vanity and dull your intellect."\n"I'm sorry, 'Father,'" the young woman anxiously apologized, her terror evident.\nWith quivering hands she reached for the earrings, making to unfasten them. "It won't happen again, I swear..."\nBut the mirror showed only "Father"'s unwavering calm, her smile seemingly undimmed.\n"Shh... Do not be so nervous. People often long for that which they cannot have, and it would not do for regret to make beautiful memories seem ever rosier."\n"Wear them. Once you have grown accustomed to them, you will realize that no gem, however exquisite, is any more than an object, cold and dead."\n"This is your new lesson — to understand the source of your emotions. Master them, use them. Never be their slave." ｜ 爱美是人的天性，青春期的孩子们逐渐意识到何谓美丑。他们开始偷偷佩戴饰品，自己用剪刀修理额前碎发。\n这一点小小的叛逆，「父亲」不会介怀，也不会干涉。\n然而，若是有孩子不肯摘下项链，在夜晚执行任务时暴露了行踪——这件事就进入了需要「父亲」教导的范畴。\n阿蕾奇诺带着一只精美的手袋，走进那个女孩的房间。\n少女知道自己犯了错，已经将项链摘下，放在桌上，畏惧地站在一旁。\n阿蕾奇诺拿起那条项链看了看，走向那个孩子，将项链戴回少女光洁的脖颈上。\n她拢起那孩子耳侧柔顺的金色长发：「哦，果然自己穿了耳洞。」\n「父亲」再度从袋中取出天鹅绒缎带和宝石耳坠，盘起女孩的头发，给她戴上昂贵的饰品。\n她扶着少女的肩膀，走到镜子前。镜中穿戴着珠宝的少女犹如高贵的蔷薇，尽管表情流露出强烈的不安，但她的美丽毋庸置疑。\n「你们开始爱美了，这很正常。但让这些漂亮的小东西煽动起虚荣的情绪、动摇了心智，这不好。」\n少女惶恐不安地道歉：「对不起，『父亲』。」\n她颤抖的手伸向耳垂，匆忙地想要解下珠宝，「我保证以后再也不会了…」\n镜中映照出「父亲」平静的脸，她的笑容仿佛从来都没有变过。\n「嘘…别紧张。人们常常执着于得不到的东西，我不希望你今后一直用遗憾来美化回忆。」\n「戴着吧。习惯之后，你自然会明白再美丽的珠宝也不过是一件冰冷的死物。」\n「这是新的一课——理解自己的情绪从何而来。主宰它、利用它，而不是受它主宰。」

- A pushcart that carries supplies of grain. These carts tend to be made from hastily-modified Otogi Wood, while the grain sacks have been tightly bound.\nThe old farmers of Inazuma have a secret trick to storing grain: they oven-dry Lavender Melon skin and grind it into powder before adding tea powder, stir-frying them both, and pouring the lot to mix with grain. This helps to prevent pests and mildew from setting in. However, the aforementioned method does give any grain so processed a rather strange smell, and it is for that reason that such methods are rarely used anymore. ｜ 载有粮食袋的推车。推车本体由草草加工的「御伽木」制成，粮食袋则被紧绑严封。\n稻妻的老农们有着储存粮食的秘技：将堇瓜皮烘干磨成粉末，加入抹茶粉炒制后，混入粮食中，可以有效防止虫害和霉变。不过，上述偏方会让粮食带上奇异的味道，近来这种秘技很少被人使用了。

- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！

- Navia, hello! Sorry to keep you waiting. I'm not as young as I used to be, so my legs are giving out a bit. ｜ 来了来了，抱歉，让你们久等了。上年纪了，腿脚有点不利索。
- Uh, I guess you could say that. ｜ 呃…好像是可以这么说。
- The Akademiya rated my report quite highly. I believe that they must recognized the academic value of this line of inquiry. ｜ 院里高度评价了我的报告，我相信他们一定是认识到了这项研究对于学术界的意义。
- Eh? Why did it leave? Did you pronounce its name wrong? ｜ 咦？它怎么离开了…难道是你发音错了吗？
- We're not Akademiya researchers, you know. ｜ 我们并不是教令院的学者。
- Still, Paimon has met bigger weirdos before... ｜ 唉，不过我们遇到过的怪人，也不少了。
- The warriors of the tribe were defeated by that wicked mage, and he turned them into Pakpaka... which doesn't sound all that good. Maybe Pakpakas fly very quickly, or something — I don't know. ｜ 部族的战士输给了坏巫师茹米，被他变成了帕帕卡…听起来好像不是什么好事？可能帕帕卡真的飞得很快吧，谁知道呢。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- I lost fair and square. Never thought you'd be even better than those old mercs I usually play against. Didn't see it coming at all. ｜ 我认输了，没想到你的牌技比那些老佣兵都好，真是出乎预料。

- Go and check the evidence Dehya mentioned ｜ 前往查看迪希雅所说的「证据」
- Watch out— ｜ 小心——
- Faruzan decided to make the reference book as detailed as possible... Will she be able to pique the children's interest? ｜ 珐露珊决定将图册做得尽量详实准确…她能激起孩子们的兴趣吗？

- Mhm... ｜ 嗯…
- Rocks that will spew Challenge Coins forth at intervals. ｜ 会间歇性喷出挑战币的岩石。
- If the crisis is averted and the time is right, the seed will return to the forest and grow into Aranara again. ｜ 如果危机过去了。如果有缘分，那种子就能回到森林中。然后，在机缘合适的时候，再度长成兰那罗吧。

- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- You can cook? ｜ 你会做饭？
- You can seek assistance from the Conqueror of Demons at Wangshu Inn. He will show you the way. ｜ 去望舒客栈请降魔大圣，他有法可解。
- But in any case, we're now on the same page. ｜ 但现在，我们知道的已经完全一致。
- Ruu— ｜ 阿瑠——
- By the way, I couldn't help feeling that there was something on Kachina's mind during dinner... ｜ 对了，今天吃饭的时候，总感觉卡齐娜好像有什么心事…
- Whoa, when it rains, it seems to disappear slowly. ｜ 下雨的时候，它好像就会慢慢消失。
- Ooh, I don't wanna die! ｜ 哎吔，好可怕！我不想死！
- We're just a pair of kind travelers. ｜ 只是热心的旅行者。
- I spent years of my life researching that book... I visited every last ruin, interviewed every descendant of every hero in our history... ｜ 我为了这本书，花费了几年时间，什么遗迹我都去过，什么英雄后代我都走访过。
- Even if my ship is small? ｜ 小船也需要吗？
- If you could apply that same industriousness to helping me write articles... I mean, I would provide a detailed summary and the underlying theoretical basis, and you would just help me put it to paper... ｜ 要是你们能用这种工作效率帮我写稿…我的意思是，我提供细纲和理论知识，你帮我落实具体的文字…
- Foolish question. There are only two kinds of things — those that must be done and those that must not. ｜ 愚问。只有必须要做的事情，和一定不能做的事情。

- "Parting is the beginning of a new reunion" ｜ 「离别亦是下一次重逢的开始」

- Well, no matter how busy you are, at least you still found some time to come here and buy an Almighty Shogun figurine, right? We want to buy one too. ｜ 嘿嘿，不过再怎么忙，你也还是来这儿了呢——是想去买将军大人的人偶吧？我们也挺想买一个呢。
- Uhhh... just leave that concoction here... I don't ever want to smell it again, phew! Besides, I doubt it can be used to make any drinks. ｜ 那个…解酒药就不用拿上了，赶紧丢远一点，我不想再闻到这种气味了，而且以这份解酒药的状态，肯定也不能用于调酒了…

- Ride a Spiritway for the first time. ｜ 首次乘坐游隙灵道。

- Decreases all party members' climbing and sprinting Stamina consumption by 20% for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攀爬和冲刺消耗的体力降低20%，持续900秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- Once I'm ready, I'll talk to dear Mr. Macadell at the Coffee Management Office to have you noted down as an official coffee maker. ｜ 等我准备好之后，我就要去找敬爱的玛卡德尔先生谈谈，帮您在「咖啡管理办公室」里登记成正式咖啡师。
- Joining Party: II ｜ 加入队伍·其二
- I hear ya, I hear ya! Steamed Cabbage in Broth might be upper class and look fancy and all, but man, is it boring! It's never gonna give you that flavor explosion you get with some of the other dishes out there. ｜ 我懂我懂！开水白菜上流是上流，可它看似精美，实际上无趣得很。哪像有些菜，一放进嘴巴就有爆裂的感觉！
- Made with fruit juice as a base. Silky smooth. ｜ 以果汁为基础调制而成，口感丝滑。
- But just imagine how different things could be if you maintained this domain in perfect condition. Whoever sets foot inside would witness a magical wonderland... ｜ 不妨换个角度想一想，假如你能够让秘境保持在完美的状态，人们一踏入这里，看到的就是宏伟的奇景…
- A rather special oil-paper umbrella. While long wanderings may make one used to the wind and the rain, there might be some fun in admiring a rainy scene beneath this parasol. ｜ 稍微有些特别的油纸伞。尽管长久的旅行中已经习惯风雨，与之一同静赏雨景或许也有其中妙趣。
- Quirky Quaking Arena ｜ 「奇逸角技隆隆擂台」
- From Riverbeds to Mountain Peaks ｜ 从水下到山顶
- Time Bombs that can be pushed by attacks will be placed at a randomly chosen player's location at intervals during the stage. Make good use of them to effectively defeat your foes. ｜ 关卡中，将间歇性随机选择一名玩家，在该玩家的位置落下可以被攻击推动的延时炸弹。合理运用延时炸弹，可以提升战斗的效率。
- Welcome back, great hero... I can't wait to tell your story to everyone! ｜ 大英雄，大英雄啊，我已经迫不及待地要把你的故事讲给所有人听了。
- I wrote a whole report on my findings... If you're interested, Mr. Tighnari Sir, I can go get it for you! ｜ 提纳里先生感兴趣的话，我…我可以把书面报告翻出来给您看！

- I found an herb-gatherer's basket part way up the mountain, possibly belonging to Qiqi. But I don't think she's here anymore. ｜ 我在山腰处发现了一个药篓，可能是七七的东西，但她本人，应该不在此地了。
- An elite Fatui special agent who can manipulate Anemo in battle. In combat, they will use the Hunt Down skill to attach a Bond of Life to characters they hit. While Bond of Life is active, the character will take continuous DMG, and Hunt Down will deal more DMG to them. ｜ 愚人众当中精锐的特务，能够驱使「风元素」进行战斗。在战斗中，会进行「猎杀」，向命中的角色施加生命之契，在生命之契存在时使其持续受到伤害，并提高猎杀对其造成的伤害。
- Reward for reaching a certain Reputation Level in Mondstadt ｜ 蒙德声望达到一定等级后获得
- (Fascinating! And I thought Sumeru's history was interesting...) ｜ （枫丹的历史好迷人，比须弥的有趣多了…）
- Mechanical Painting Part Restoration: II ｜ 复原「械画部件」·之二
- I have not yet mentioned any specifics and you already agree so readily? ｜ 我还没说要求呢，你就一口答应了吗？
- A bread with varied fillings. The flat dough has risen in the oven, reminding you of a lovely Pufferfish. The bread is usually cut in the middle into two separate "pockets," hence the name, "Pita Pocket." It is said that people of Sumeru used to dip the bread in sauce. But nowadays, people usually stuff the "pockets" with different fillings and then take big mouthfuls. ｜ 内馅多样的面饼。扁扁的面团经过烤制后，像炮鲀一般变得圆鼓鼓的，切开后就像口袋一样，由此而得名。据说以前的须弥人偏好蘸酱直接吃，而现在的主流吃法则是，往里塞入各种各样的馅料，大口大口吃下。
- Obtain 2 Hangout Memories ｜ 获得二份旅程记录

- Yes. ｜ 找到了。
- Either way, we've gotta find him, and fast! ｜ 不管怎么说，我们得快点找到他才行！

- It's amazing how Sango could figure out the details of the case so accurately... ｜ 不过，珊瑚还真是神了，居然能这么准确地找到犯人…

- So you still remember the job Boss Rouge gave us... ｜ 原来你还记得鲁热老大交给我们的活…
- These spreading weeds are sturdy yet sensitive. When the <color=#FFCC33>Quicken</color>, <color=#FFCC33>Aggravate</color>, <color=#FFCC33>Spread</color>, <color=#FFCC33>Bloom</color>, or <color=#FFCC33>Hyperbloom</color> reaction is triggered, all party members will be buffed. Use this to your advantage and punch through your opponents' defenses! ｜ 此地蔓延的荒草有着坚韧而敏感的特性。<color=#FFCC33>原激化</color>、<color=#FFCC33>超激化</color>、<color=#FFCC33>蔓激化</color>、<color=#FFCC33>绽放</color>和<color=#FFCC33>超绽放</color>发生时，所有角色会获得强化。充分利用这一优势，突破敌人的防线吧！

- But... why do you wanna resign? ｜ 可是…你为什么要辞职呢？

- In fact... I could have sworn I heard Barbara-sama's voice when I came here... ｜ 而且我过来之后，在这附近好像也听见了芭芭拉小姐的声音…

- Certified player Chourei, a member of the Maison Gardiennage stationed at Lumidouce Harbor, who is in charge of keeping order there — a task that her gentler personality sometimes makes tricky. Fortunately, after being told as much by the port master, she found that Genius Invokation TCG was a good (and universally reliable, in her experience!) way to get two parties to sit down at a table to talk. Watching all these matches has also helped make her a qualified player herself. ｜ 协会认证牌手舒蕾，执律庭驻柔灯港的成员，负责维护港口秩序。不过由于性格较为温和，有时不能高效调解矛盾。好在被港务总管点醒后，找到了用七圣召唤让两边坐下来和谈的方法，百试百灵，她自己也在见证各种决斗牌局后成为了合格的牌手。

- The open-air hot spring built of smooth white stones is a great place to wash away your fatigue and relax your mind and body.\nInazuma originally did not have natural hot springs, and the boiler-heated hot springs that were introduced by the Kanjou Commission have costs a tad too high for the common citizen to enjoy often.\nTherefore, some talented craftsmen made full use of the art of space planning to create hot springs that do not require huge boilers. As it turns out, charcoal-fired boilers in the rocks around the hot springs can achieve the purpose of maintaining the water temperature just fine. Although the water temperature is not as warm as the imported hot spring design, it is nonetheless quite popular among civilians. ｜ 由光洁的白石搭建而成的露天温泉，是洗退疲惫，放松身心的绝佳去处。\n稻妻原本没有天然的温泉，勘定奉行引进的锅炉加热型温泉对于普通民众的开销较大，无法时常享用。\n于是，一些才华横溢的工匠充分利用空间规划的艺术，打造出无需庞大锅炉的温泉——将炭火锅炉设置在温泉周围的石块中，就能达到维持水温的目的。尽管水温不如引进的温泉，但在平民之中相当受欢迎。
- Old age always does this to me, blurring the present, and endearing the past, more and more... Hehe... ｜ 岁数大了总是这样，越是现在的事，就越糊涂；越是小时候的事，就越怀念，嘿嘿…

- Go to the People of the Springs ｜ 前往「流泉之众」
- Standing before the registration counter at the Fortress, Wriothesley reached into his pocket to produce the sheet of paper that had his name and the length of his sentence on it.\nBut out with that sheet also came a glass ball about the size of his palm.\nNo, wait, this wasn't just some random glass ball. Wriothesley blinked. When had he come into possession of this?\nThe person at the desk — a stern-looking lady with a wrinkled face — gasped, before steadying her shocked expression, gripping her pen tighter. Her lips moved, and moved again, but at last closed.\n"She must have a lot of experience about living here," he immediately thought, and so he did his best to hold the Vision in his palm, before asking in a small voice, "Miss, may I ask..."\nThe senior registrar did not reply. She took the slip of paper from him and looked coldly behind him, as if sizing up the next criminal who'd come to register. However, when she had finished filling the necessary information in, she had written something unnecessary in the margins of the documents she passed back to him. "Hide it well."\nWriothesley realized immediately that life at the Fortress would be even harder than roaming the streets.\nHe felt fortunate that he had blocked everyone behind him from seeing what had happened, and more fortunate still that this kind-hearted registrar had been willing to give him a reminder. Sadly, he would not see her again, though this was no surprise, since staff turnover at the Fortress was quite high in those days.\nThe first thing he did upon officially entering the Fortress was to quietly unravel a few threads of his clothing before using fine wire to sew his Vision into the space between the layers of fabric.\nHe knew a thing or two about being homeless — certainly, that the biggest problem was never getting a hold of resources, but keeping them. People could not avoid sleeping, and occasionally being defenseless. The things you owned could be taken away with ease once you were asleep, and no one would call it a robbery.\nAnd a Vision was no ordinary treasure. There were sure to be those who would be interested in it for various reasons, and Vision wielders were often magnets for ill-intentioned gazes.\nIn the days that followed, his suspicions would be verified, for in gossip alone he heard of two to three Vision thefts. As for what happened afterward and the fate of the victims, various inconsistent rumors existed that Wriothesley pretended to pay little mind to.\nHe still felt quite fortunate, of course, but it was hard to feel genuine happiness at staying safe off the backs of other peoples' tragic fates.\nFor a long time afterward, he would pretend that he had not been favored by the gods, and in truth, it was not hard — merely a return to his scrappy past. He could handle that much.\nThis persisted until a time when his age had nearly doubled, and he received an official invitation from the Palais Mermonia.\nCommon practice dictated that citizens who were to receive an honorary title must attend an investiture ceremony, and said ceremony was said to be far more involved for the granting of a title such as "Duke."\nWriothesley tactfully declined attending the ceremony on the grounds of his unique duties, expressing the desire to simply sign and take the relevant certificates. Quite un-Fontainian of him, really, to dislike the spotlight and prefer to just muddle along.\nMany workdays and much correspondence later, the Palais finally agreed.\nBefore leaving the underwater stronghold, Wriothesley took his Vision up once more, for the first time in many years. Weighing it in his palm, he found it lighter than before, and smaller to boot. Finding a good spot on his clothes, he hung it there.\nThe first to comment on it was the Iudex, who was to bestow the title upon him. Neuvillette's smile was suitably polite, but he somehow seemed more pleased than Wriothesley himself. "Congratulations," said the Iudex. "You have found something you wish to do at last, I see."\nWriothesley smiled back by way of reply, but made no further comment. ｜ 站在梅洛彼得堡的登记处前，莱欧斯利将手伸进衣袋——他需要向工作人员出示那张写着他名字、决定他刑期的纸。\n跟着那张纸被一并取出的，还有一颗手掌大小的玻璃球。\n…不，这不是什么玻璃球。莱欧斯利眨眨眼，他什么时候有了这种东西？\n登记处的工作人员轻轻倒吸一口气。那是一名神色严肃的女性，脸上有皱纹，惊讶的表情短暂且克制，握笔的手稳健有力。她的嘴唇动了动，最终还是合上了。\n莱欧斯利立即想到：她一定有在这里生活的经验。于是他将那颗神之眼尽量握进手心，小声道：「尊敬的女士，请问…」\n年长的登记员并没有回答。她从他手中抽过那张纸，冷漠地瞟向他身后，似乎在确认下一位要来登记的犯人。然而，录入完必要信息后，她不必要地在递还的文件边缘潦草写到：藏好。\n莱欧斯利马上又确定了一件事：这里的日子一定比流落街头更难熬。\n他很庆幸，无论当时身后有谁他都用身躯挡住了那些视线。他更庆幸，这位好心的登记员竟愿意提醒他。可惜莱欧斯利后来再没见过她。倒也不意外，那时梅洛彼得堡的工作人员流动性很高。\n终于正式进入梅洛彼得堡，莱欧斯利做的第一件事便是悄悄拆掉几根线，用一头磨细的铁丝将神之眼缝进衣服夹层里。\n他对无家可归的生活有一定心得，最难的从不是获得资源，而是留下它们。人总要睡觉，总有无法防备的时候，白天积累的财物常在昏睡后被简单地取走，甚至都称不上是抢劫。\n神之眼更是不同于一般的财物，肯定会有人基于各种原因对它产生兴趣；拥有神之眼的人也容易吸引不善的目光。\n之后的日子里，他的疑虑得到了证实。光他听说过的，就有两三起神之眼被盗的情况。关于事件后续和受害人的遭遇，各种传闻不一，莱欧斯利没有表现出更多关心。\n他仍然觉得庆幸。但踩在他人悲惨的失败上保全自己，很难令他为此感到真正的高兴。\n再后来的很长一段时间里，他假装自己从未得到过神明的垂怜。不过是同以前一样的摸爬滚打，他还应付得来。\n直到年纪与当时相比几乎翻了一倍，他接到了来自沫芒宫的邀请。\n按照惯例，任何被授予荣誉称号的公民都要参加一次授勋仪式。像「公爵」这种级别的称号，仪式据说会更夸张。\n莱欧斯利以职务特殊为借口婉拒了，只想简单地签字并取走证书。在不爱凑热闹和得过且过上，他实在很不像枫丹人。\n很多个工作日及很多次书信往来后，沫芒宫最终同意了。\n离开水下前，莱欧斯利久违地拿起了那颗神之眼。他颠了颠，它比记忆中更轻，也比他的手掌要小了。他在衣服上找了个地方，将它挂了上去。\n第一个对此表态的是为他授予称号的最高审判官。那维莱特的微笑十分礼貌，恰到好处，但他看起来仍比莱欧斯利本人要更高兴些：「恭喜，你终于找到自己想做的事情了。」\n莱欧斯利听罢笑了笑，未加说明。

- Once upon a fairly recent time, a big band of bad Spikey Fish invaded Cider Lake, only to be driven away by the valiant Dodoco, who sent them scarpering with their tails between their fins...\nBut after licking their wounds and gathering reinforcements, the Spikey Fish are back with a vengeance, making waves with their return!\nFortunately, after a crash course with the Spark Knight, Dodoco has mastered a new skill — deploying bombs on the move! Even though the Spikey Fish have the advantage in numbers, our nimble Dodoco need fear not! ｜ 不久不久以前，许多坏坏的角角鱼入侵了果酒湖，结果被勇敢的嘟嘟可打败，灰溜溜地逃走…\n如今，角角鱼们养好了伤，找到了援兵，气势汹汹地卷「水」重来！\n好在，嘟嘟可跟着火花骑士认真修行后，学会了新的本领——在移动中布置炸弹！就算角角鱼们有着数量的优势，灵活的嘟嘟可也完全不用害怕！

- I have a very keen sense of hearing. My ears pick up all sorts of sounds: the wind through the mountain passes, the parting clouds, the sound of foxes chewing on apples in the forest, the sound of crabs blowing bubbles... - Happy Birthday! From what I've observed, you're always going from one place to the next. So, I made a special skincare set just for you that's portable and practical. Come on, lay down and close your eyes, I'll show you how to use it. First, I'm gonna apply a wet compress to your face — but you can just splash some water on there if you're ever in a hurry... Next, we squeeze out a small amount of foam cleanser, gently massaging it in with a circular motion, following the muscle, before rinsing and drying... And lastly, we apply some moisturizer with Tidalga extract... And, we're done! You look radiant, and now it's time for lovely little you to go and enjoy your special day to the fullest! ｜ 生日快乐！根据我的观察，你平时要出入不同场合，所以我专门为你调制了一套兼顾便捷性和实用性的护肤套装。来来，请躺下，闭上眼睛，我来示范一次怎么用吧。先帮你湿敷一下脸蛋，平时要是赶时间，稍微把脸打湿就可以了哦…然后挤上适量的洁面膏，沿着肌肉走向轻轻打圈按摩再冲洗干净…最后一步，涂上加了汐藻成分的保湿霜…好啦，容光焕发，请可爱的人尽情享受属于你的节日吧！

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> What sort of slime do you like the most, {NICKNAME}?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Pyro Slimes, I suppose. You can feel their warmth just by getting close. That's something you'll need in the winter.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> That's very practical, as expected of a traveler.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> What about you, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon likes them all! They're all very tasty!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Tasty? Hmm...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Turning slimes into bubbly, lovely, jubbly meals is the Paimon Special!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well then...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I suppose that's one more thing I can eat before you become emergency rations, huh, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Uhh... Paimon would rather not be on that list at all! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你最喜欢哪种史莱姆呀？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>火史莱姆吧。凑近就能感到热浪，冬天会很需要。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>实用性的角度呢，不愧是旅行者。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那派蒙呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我都喜欢！都很好吃！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>好吃…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>把史莱姆叽里咕噜、咕嘟哇噜地做成特色饮品，就是「派蒙特调」喔！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>好，好吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那么，就把小派蒙在应急食品的顺位，下调一位吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我希望这个顺位里不要有我才好！

- <color=#ffe9ba>Standard Effect:</color>\nStorm Sabers will randomly descend upon the position of opponents who have had their Weaknesses exposed, dealing continuous Hydro DMG to opponents within their AoE. Opponents with more than 2 Weaknesses exposed will be prioritized for attack.\n<color=#ffe9ba>Buffed Effect:</color>\nMore Storm Sabers will descend, dealing continuous Hydro DMG to opponents within their AoE. All party members' Elemental Mastery will be increased by 200. ｜ <color=#ffe9ba>标准效果：</color>\n随机在被捕获破绽的敌人的位置降下暴雨刃流，对影响范围内的敌人持续造成水元素伤害。在一定时间内使队伍中所有角色的元素精通提升120点。优先攻击被捕获破绽大于2个的敌人。\n<color=#ffe9ba>增幅效果：</color>\n降下数量更多的暴雨刃流，对影响范围内的敌人持续造成水元素伤害。队伍中所有角色的元素精通提升200点。

- "It's said that Sea Hares are able to dodge most attacks with their lightning-fast jinks."\nRegardless of the credibility of this report, traveling through underwater areas scattered with rocks, weeds, and ruins certainly requires great agility. Despite the differences in bodily structure, perhaps this movement could be learned through dedicated training! ｜ 「传说海兔能在短时间内迅速侧闪，躲开大部分攻击。」\n暂且不论这则报道的真实性，一些水下区域遍布礁石、水草和废墟，想要在那里快速移动，的确需要迅速侧闪的能力。说不定，经过针对性的训练，即便与某些水生生物的构造不同，也能做出灵巧的闪避！

- Miracle Medicine ｜ 奇药庐中来
- Relax, I'm not here to dig up the past. I'm just saying you've got a real knack for illusions — and that's something to be proud of! ｜ 放心吧，没有翻旧账的意思。奶奶我只是想说，你在障眼法上很有一套，这是值得骄傲的事！
- When it comes to how Cyno got his Vision, many versions of the story can be found circulating in the Akademiya.\nSome say that he was once instructed to arrest a researcher who had been studying methods of making counterfeit Visions. The researcher had previously bought a masterless Vision for research, which then became Cyno's Vision. Some believe that Cyno is actually a descendant of King Deshret. They say that he grew up in a temple located in the Great Red Sand and was raised by a nameless Hermanubis priest who cultivated Cyno's will and strength before, when he was ready, bestowing upon him a Vision and requiring him to cross the desert all by himself to arrive at the Akademiya and enact Hermanubis' will. Of course, according to some conspiracy theories, Cyno's Vision is closely connected with certain forbidden technologies hidden within the Akademiya. Otherwise, how could this member of the desert ilk earn a spot in the Akademiya?\nNo one dares to check any of the stories' authenticity with Cyno in person, and Cyno himself cannot be bothered to waste energy on these ridiculous rumors.\nThe truth is that the way he obtained his Vision was rather simple.\nIt was the day before he was about to become the new General Mahamatra. As per usual, after finishing his work as a matra, Cyno went to the library to read books relating to the Akademiya's rules and regulations. He can still well remember that the book he was reading that day mainly talked about the six cardinal sins that the sages had decided on, which they held to be the origins of all crimes and thus served as the foundation for all the modern rules and regulations of the Akademiya. While he was reading the chapter on "to attempt the forbidden and fear none," he failed to fathom some chunks of the content depicted in the book, so he closed his eyes and ruminated. The moment he opened his eyes, the first thing he saw was a Vision, laid nicely on the page.\nCyno looked at the Vision and fell into contemplation. He first confirmed that there was no existing rule that prohibited someone from being granted a Vision. Then he went over several academic cases with Visions involved and ensured that this Vision was not some malicious trap. He went on to ponder the challenges he might encounter after becoming the General Mahamatra and how this Vision might help in these future trials... After carefully weighing up the pros and cons, Cyno finally accepted this gift from the gods earnestly.\nBy then, the morning light was already shining through the windows. Cyno left the library with the Vision and his as-yet-unfinished read in hand before heading over to the location where he was to be inaugurated as the General Mahamatra.\nIf all went well, in half an hour, he would become the Akademiya's new General Mahamatra.\nHe was about to be entrusted with the sacred power to judge those who had erred, and this Vision would ensure that this sacred privilege could be exercised as intended. ｜ 对于赛诺获得「神之眼」的方法，教令院里流传着许多说法。\n有人说，赛诺曾经奉命去抓捕一位研究「神之眼」仿制方法的学者，那个学者为了研究而购买了一枚无主的「神之眼」，赛诺就是借此获得了「神之眼」；有人说，赛诺其实是赤王后裔，他从小就生活在大赤沙海的某个庙宇中，被一位无名的赫曼努比斯祭司抚养长大，这个祭司培养了赛诺的武艺和心志，在赛诺准备好后，那位祭司就将一枚「神之眼」交予赛诺，并且让他独自跨越沙海前往教令院，以践行赫曼努比斯的意志；而在某些阴谋论中，赛诺的「神之眼」则和教令院内某些禁忌技术有着种种联系，不然，这个沙漠民凭什么能在教令院内有一席之地？\n没人敢去向赛诺当面求证，而赛诺自己也不屑于为这些可笑的谣言多费精力。\n其实他获得「神之眼」的历程十分简单。\n那是在他即将出职「大风纪官」的前一天。和往常一样，在处理完风纪官的工作后，赛诺前往图书馆开始阅读和教令相关的书籍。他清楚地记得，那一天他看的书主要讲述了贤者们所总结出的「六宗罪」，贤者们认为这些罪行是各种犯罪的根源，如今教令院内的各项教令也基本是从此「六宗罪」中衍生而出。当他读到论述「慢言奥秘而心无惧怕之事」这条罪行的章节时，有些无法理解书中所叙述的内容，只能闭上眼冥思苦想，但当他睁眼时，却发现一枚「神之眼」端正地躺在书页上。\n赛诺端详着「神之眼」陷入了沉思，他先是确定，现有的教令中并没有任何一条禁止某人被授予「神之眼」，随后又查阅了数桩和「神之眼」有关的学术案件，确保这枚「神之眼」不是什么恶意陷阱，最后又思考起自己在出任「大风纪官」后可能面对的挑战，和这枚「神之眼」可以为自己所提供的助力…在多方权衡下，赛诺最后还是认真地收下了这枚神明的赠礼。\n在他结束思考时，窗外已晨光初现，赛诺将这枚「神之眼」和自己尚未读完的书籍一起带离了图书馆，赴往「大风纪官」的任职仪式地点。\n如果一切顺利的话，在半个小时后，他就将成为教令院新任的「大风纪官」。\n他即将被赋予神圣的裁决之权，而这枚「神之眼」则将确保这神圣的权力得以顺利践行。

- Huh... By that definition, aren't the investors the most rock 'n' roll people in this scenario? ｜ …照这么说，已经滚蛋的投资人才是最摇滚的吧？
- When is Daddy coming back? Is it too late to write him and ask for a flute? ｜ 爸爸什么时候回来呀…现在写信找他要一支笛子还来得及吗？
- Those documents recorded a great number of things that the traditional hymns of our Order have never written of. That also inspired in me the desire to reform our Order. ｜ 那些文献中记录了很多在矫论团所传承的颂歌中不曾记载的事情，也是因此我才燃起了复兴矫论团的雄心。
- Roald. ｜ 罗尔德。
- Tsk, looks like there's no negotiation to be had here. Come on, let's get out of here! ｜ 嘁，看来是没办法谈了。快走！
- That's, uh, quite the story... ｜ 挺，挺有故事性…
- This sword is still very weak at present. However, it is able to absorb energy, and through that, it is able to constantly become stronger. ｜ 这把剑现在还很弱，可它能吸收力量，通过这种方法，它会不断增强自身。
- Ah... All the talent, all the ability... ｜ 如此才能…如此才能啊…
- What's going on? ｜ 发生什么事了？
- Energy Cost|{param20:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param20:I}
- About the Xiao Lanterns with Mr. Bohuan's calligraphy... ｜ 关于伯桓子写好字的霄灯…
- Don't give up! ｜ 还不能放弃哦。
- Bait Resupply Plan ｜ 鱼饵补充计划
- Tribal Challenge ｜ 部族挑战
- Deploying Wind Glider: I ｜ 打开风之翼·其一
- Head to the magical laboratory and check the seal ｜ 前往魔法实验室，查看封印

- Hehe, you know what they say, embrace the unexpected! ｜ 老话说得好，择日不如撞日嘛！
- Listener of Desert Poems ｜ 沙漠歌谣的倾听者
- <color=#FFCC33FF>Would you like to have a chat with me?</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>想一起聊聊天吗？</color>
- Squall: Consecrated Flying Serpent ｜ 驭风·圣骸飞蛇
- Concentrate. And cogitate. ｜ 多看多想。
- A proud crown that once belonged to the Viridescent Venerer. It is as lush and green as the breezes of the wild. ｜ 曾属于绿野猎人的骄傲头冠，如同原野之风一般青翠。
- A Letter in Beautiful Handwriting (IV) ｜ 字迹华丽的信·其四
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Citlali's Stella Fortuna ｜ 茜特菈莉的命星
- Take care, now. ｜ 请慢走。
- Fayz Supersense Timing ｜ 溢神超感的时机

- If it's good, then I can keep using it again and again. ｜ 如果合适的话，那我就可以一直用下去啦。

### Part 063

- Did you find out more about the ambush thing? ｜ 伏击的事情有结论了吗？
- You might go broke. ｜ 小心坐吃山空。

- What I'm concerned about is an ongoing, serious issue that threatens the safety of the general public here in the Court of Fontaine. ｜ 我所关注的问题，是一件枫丹廷内正在发生，危害着公众生活安全的严肃公共事件。

- Read the notes that the samurai left behind ｜ 阅读武士落下的字条。
- Wait, so you're stuck in there? ｜ 欸？被困在雕像里？
- The chariot of the sun brings light in the day, and by night come the spirits of the past. The one who bears the Reins may master both the light and the gloom. ｜ 大日之车白日带来光，夜晚带来过去的魂灵。持此物者，能支配阴阳与昏冥。
- That's alright. A scholar's curiosity doesn't need to be appeased right away. As for the complicated nature of the situation... Safe to say, I have witnessed that for myself. ｜ 没关系，学者的好奇也不是完全不讲求时宜的，至于情况的复杂程度，我刚才也看在眼里了。
- Longsword in hand... ｜ 长剑在我手…
- #Oh, since we're here, you might as well go get your shiny new elemental powers, {NICKNAME}! ｜ 正好就在眼前，你也该去获得全新的元素力了吧？
- Alright. Gather around, everyone. ｜ 好了，大家都聚到本仙这来吧。
- A grand graffiti board towering within the "Children of Echoes," featuring the icon of the Tepetlisaurus Spiritsconce in vibrant gold, seemingly proclaiming an unyielding pursuit of the avant-garde... ｜ 矗立于「回声之子」内的巨幅涂鸦牌，其上绘有嵴锋龙魂烛的图标，呈现出热情洋溢的金色，似是在宣告着对新潮的极致追求…
- Wh—Why? We were alternating claims to treasure, true, but Kliment is no longer here... ｜ 为、为什么？虽说是顺次取物，可是，克列门特已经…
- Goodbye! May you always be blessed with the courage to face your challenges head on! ｜ 再见！祝你拥有战胜困难的勇气！

- It's pretty good, eh? ...Hey, leave Paimon some! ｜ 嗯！确实好吃…喂！给我留一点呀！
- Nope, Paimon heard it too! ｜ 不，派蒙也听到了！

- If you are unable to start right away, that's no problem. You can simply find me in a few days' time when your schedule is freer. ｜ 暂时没有空闲也不妨事，日后您有了闲暇随时可以来找我询问。
- Over the years, I must have made a note of anything interesting... anything that I could share with her when we were finally reunited. ｜ 在这期间，我每天把有趣的事情记录下来，为的是今后重逢的时候，能够把这三十年的岁月一一讲给她听。

- Hengting ｜ 衡听

- That's the spirit, hehe! ｜ 没错！你真可爱！
- ...Okay. Alright then. ｜ …嗯，我知道了。
- The chance to just stop and talk like this is certainly not easy to come by... Wouldn't you agree? ｜ 能有机会像这样停下脚步，和你放松地聊天，是多么难得的一件事…你应该也是这么想的吧？

- Master Trainer, "Scions of the Canopy" ｜ 「悬木人」训练大师
- All of our preparations paid off. ｜ 说明我们的准备确实有成效。
- This storm has passed. You and Paimon prepare to visit Shiki Taishou again to see how the Mystic Onmyou Chamber is doing... ｜ 这场风波已然平息，你和派蒙准备造访「式大将」，查看「诀箓阴阳寮」的近况…
- Whatever you saw, it was... it was all a trick! An illusion! ｜ 不管你看到了什么，那些…那些都是幻觉，都是骗你的！
- ...Thank you both. Even if dispelling loneliness is not essential for life, it certainly doesn't hurt. ｜ …谢谢你们。虽然我不认为排解孤独是生命的必要之举…但，也不坏。
- I was much too careless. ｜ 真是…太大意了。
- Grow, grow, turn into a delicious dish... ｜ …长大、长大，变成美味的菜肴…
- ... ｜ ……

- Not this again... ｜ 居然还能再来一遍…

- These Spikey Fish Warriors might have no spikes, but they're still prickly characters. They are also explosives enthusiasts who will never stop <color=#f39000>deploying Bubble Bombs</color>. Additionally, Bubble Bombs will not damage Spikey Fish Warriors or Seagrass. ｜ 冠名角角实际却无角的斧枪鱼士兵，似乎也是爆炸爱好者，会不断<color=#f39000>部署水泡炸弹</color>。水泡炸弹将<color=#f39000>对嘟嘟可造成伤害</color>，并且<color=#f39000>能够引爆嘟嘟可放置的炸弹</color>。此外，水泡炸弹将不会对角角鱼士兵或水草造成伤害。
- Luckily, I'm not anywhere near the sages, so I have a little more freedom. ｜ 只不过还好不在贤者们的眼皮子底下，多少更自在一些吧。
- A hard, blue artificial flower. Its petals shall never wither, nor shall its colors fade. ｜ 湛蓝而坚硬，永不凋败、永不褪色的人造花朵。

- You have my word. ｜ 嗯，我答应你。
- For the sake of harmonious coexistence with our shroom buddies. ｜ 这是为了和同伴安心共处。

- Yes, that sums it up very well. Most people looking to buy my time are businesspeople who believe that whatever they spend now, they will make back several times over in due course. ｜ 嗯，总结得很对。购买这种机会的大多都是商人，他们觉得现在花的钱，能在以后加倍赚回来。
- Even the bravest of adventurers wouldn't dare touch this stuff! ｜ 就算是最伟大的冒险家…也不敢喝这杯酒吧！
- In front of my old patrons, I daresay this much— ｜ 当着各位老主顾的面，我就敢夸这个口——
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- The script was good, but I've got to say, your childhood stories were even better! ｜ 我倒觉得比起桌上剧团的剧本，你小时候的故事更精彩呢。
- Ah... ｜ 这个…
- Well, what are we waiting for? Hop to it, people! ｜ 那还磨蹭什么，快走吧，你们也来！
- Wait, is the insignia we picked up on the beach the one he's muttering about? You know, the one that looks kinda shabby? ｜ 不过，他说的徽记不会就是我们之前在海边捡到的那个吧…就是那枚看上去有点破旧的那个！

- Defeat the Stonehide Lawachurl ｜ 打倒丘丘岩盔王

- Who would've guessed the Knights have a member of the Lawrence Clan... ｜ 没想到骑士团还有这样一个人…
- Poaching disrupts the ecosystem! ｜ 偷猎是会破坏生态的行为！

- At the Rite of Descension!? ｜ 还是在「请仙典仪」上？！

- Oh no, not good! The volcano is acting up again! ｜ 哇啊，不会吧，又是火山！火山动起来了！
- Any news? ｜ 有什么新鲜事吗？
- What the sign reflects is that which lies beyond the dark rift, and though the monsters cannot enter Teyvat through that illusion, it nonetheless radiates corrupt energies. ｜ 天象所映照的正是那黑色裂隙之外的景象，虽然魔物不能通过这个幻象进入提瓦特，但其中仍然流溢着污秽的力量。
- Come with me and you'll see. ｜ 跟我来就明白了。
- You had best stop and consider... do you really have the noble qualities and etiquette necessary to communicate with a god? All it takes is a flick of my finger for me to know everything about you. ｜ 不妨反思一下，你们真的具备与神明沟通的品德与礼仪吗？对我来说，获取你们的情报只需要动动手指，没有比这更简单的了。
- Dross of Pure Sacred Dewdrop ｜ 纯圣露滴的滤渣
- Blue Frog ｜ 蓝蛙
- Skies above, that was you, then? I thought you had been stranded on that island when I saw you on my return trip, which is why I invited you onboard... ｜ 天哪，那盏灯是你们挂上去的？我回来的时候，还以为你们是被困在那座岛上了，才邀请你们一起坐船…
- K—Knock them out? What do you want me to do, hit them with my books? ｜ 打、打倒？你是要我用书砸它们…
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After the character uses an Elemental Burst:</color> All your characters on standby gain 1 $[K310]. (Once per Round) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色使用「元素爆发」后：</color>所有我方后台角色获得1点$[K310]。（每回合1次）
- Treasure Hoarder Crowd ｜ 盗宝团众
- I can do that, but I have a feeling it won't be that simple. ｜ 可以，但事情恐怕不会那么简单。
- I didn't feel anything towards Alhaitham at first since he wasn't well-known. All the opinions I heard about him were negative, though. ｜ 之前没什么感觉，是因为艾尔海森本来就没什么名气，我所听到的评价也不是什么好话。
- Dendrobium ｜ 血斛
- The fruit of the Dragonbone Flower, created via the use of the Waters of Lethe. It is said to sweep one's worries away and bring peace. Giving up your objectives, forsaking desire, and becoming content and satisfied... Is that not happiness? ｜ 经忘川之水浇灌而凝结的龙骨花果实，据说有着扫除忧愁、带来平静的奇异功效。放下目标，舍弃欲望，心怀满足，这就是幸福的真相吧？
- With the amount of wealth and power Gentry Maocai has, it will take more than a slap on the wrist to get through to him. ｜ 茂才公有钱有势，普通的教训对他来说不疼不痒。
- No adventurer should have to go that way... No adventurer ever... ｜ 但冒险家不能以那种方式死去…不能…
- *sigh* If only we had more men, there'd be no issue. ｜ 唉，要是能再多来点人手就好了…
- Contains a random artifact of the "Gladiator's Finale" series. ｜ 装有一件随机的「角斗士的终幕礼」圣遗物。
- Not so much the cargo ships and fishing boats. I mean more the ones that belong to The Crux. I know they are involved in some shady stuff, but... ｜ 除了商用货船和渔船外，最威风的当属南十字船队的船只了吧，虽说他们干着的那些勾当…
- Wait, if you are studying archaeology, can I go too? I am also a scholar in this field, so I can help. ｜ 稍等，如果是考古的话，我也可以一起去吗？我也是考古学家，可以提供很多帮助。
- I don't mean to hurry you, but there are just so many attractions in the Court of Fontaine worth visiting. I recommend that you begin sightseeing as soon as possible, so you encounter as many of these treasures as you can... ｜ 并不是催促乘客的意思，枫丹廷值得游览的景点实在太多，尽早去逛逛，就可能更早一些遇见宝藏…
- "Growing up in the Commerce Guild, I have long been acquainted with Genius Invokation TCG. Nonetheless, I wouldn't call myself an expert..."\nHint: Xingqiu's deck contains large numbers of Event Cards and characters of 3 different Elemental Types, allowing him to maintain flexibility based on the situation. ｜ 「说起七圣召唤，因为商会的关系，很早就接触到了，不过，倒也算不上特别精通…」\n【提示】行秋的牌组包含大量的「事件」牌和三种不同元素类型的角色，能够根据对局的情况灵活应变。
- Listen to me, the most important thing is always the choices you have in front of you. ｜ 听我说，最重要的，永远是「当前的选择」。
- About Greater Lord Rukkhadevata... ｜ 关于树王大人…
- Wanna make a bet? ｜ 要赌一把吗？
- #I recall {NICKNAME}'s advice that if we want the audience to give us clear feedback, we need to express ourselves fully first... ｜ #还记得上次{NICKNAME}给出的建议，要想让观众给出明确的建议，首先就得作出完全的表达…
- Everyone has got to rest at some point. Anyway, now that we meet here, care for a duel? ｜ 人总是要休息的，怎么样，都到这儿了，不如来打局牌吧。
- During the "Pilgrimage of the Return of the Sacred Flame," certain systems and functions will be unavailable, but will be restored once the competition ends.\nTo ensure you have the best experience, it is recommended that you experience the next part of the story when you have ample time to complete it. ｜ 「归火圣夜巡礼」期间，部分系统功能将被暂时禁用，比赛完成后会全部恢复。\n为保证最好的体验，接下来的故事推荐在时间较为宽裕的情况下进行。
- Didn't she say she had a whole lot of adeptal treasures inside? No, wait, she probably installed a whole bunch of security measures... ｜ 她不是说了，在洞天里放了好多法宝吗？不对不对，她也许早就放了好多警戒机关…
- ...Adjust the inclination by two degrees. Stop. ｜ …倾角修正两度。结束。
- You don't sound too happy about it... ｜ 你好像看起来有些不太好…
- So the conditions in this case are...? ｜ 条件究竟是…？

- It should be here any minute... ｜ 应该马上就到了吧…
- Kaeya ｜ 凯亚
- When characters receive <color=#f39001>Windblessing: Hydro</color>, create 1 <color=#f39001>Hydrocore</color>. After reaching 3 Hydrocores, when characters' attacks hit opponents, consume all Hydrocores and create a <color=#0075de>Waterfall Maelstrom</color> at the opponent's position that pulls opponents in and deals <color=#f39001>AoE Hydro DMG</color> based on the number of Windblessing: Hydro stacks ｜ 角色获得<color=#f39001>风之祝祷·水</color>时将生成1枚<color=#f39001>水凝核</color>，其数量达到3枚后：角色的攻击命中敌人时，消耗所有水凝核，在敌人的位置释放<color=#0075de>水瀑旋涡</color>，牵引附近的敌人，并基于风之祝祷·水的层数造成<color=#f39001>水元素范围伤害</color>

(Once per Round)\nIf the character has at least 2 $[K310], this character's Normal Attacks and Elemental Skills will deal +1 DMG.\n(A character can equip a maximum of 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3004}Artifact) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>对角色打出「{SPRITE_PRESET#3006}天赋」或角色使用「元素战技」时：</color>少花费1个元素骰。（每回合1次）\n如果角色具有至少2点$[K310]，就使角色「普通攻击」和「元素战技」造成的伤害+1。\n（角色最多装备1件「{SPRITE_PRESET#3004}圣遗物」）
- Lunja ｜ 卢妮雅
- A gamepiece based on Floating Anemo Fungi.\nA spore organism of some intelligence. It possesses extreme adaptability. Its hollow umbrella-like structure gives it excellent buoyancy, allowing it to float, suspended in midair. It is a classic small to mid-size Flying unit. When using the power of Anemo to attack, it can affect targets within a certain area of effect — a trait worthy of study. Its relatively moderate movement speed makes it an easy target for most soldiers, but its cuteness in both appearance and habit makes it difficult to pull the trigger... ｜ 以「浮游风蕈兽」为原型的兵棋。\n拥有一定智能的孢子生物，具有强大的环境适应能力。中空的伞状结构提供了良好的浮力，使其能在空中悬停飘浮，是较为典型的中小型空中单位。借助风元素发起进攻时，能影响一定范围内的目标，这一特性值得研究。其适中的移动速度对于普通将士而言较为容易命中，只是可爱的外表和习性让人有些下不去手…

- Maybe we can better understand the island this way. ｜ 可以多了解鹤观。

- Ugh, so close... Arama! Lead the way! ｜ 可恶，只差一点了…兰罗摩，带路吧！

- ...And in that moment, our eyes met. ｜ …那一瞬间，我和北斗大人的眼神对上了。
- Alright, I think we're more or less done for the day. Let's send you home first, Lovi. ｜ 好啦，你们玩得也差不多了。洛薇，我们先送你回家吧。
- You couldn't possibly be here by coincidence. I've got it! She must want to challenge me again. I am "Mondstadt's Rotisseur Queen," after all. ｜ 来这里应该不单单只是闲逛吧？莫非是她想要再次挑战「蒙德肉类料理厨艺之王」的我？哼…
- When you're back in the city... could you help me take note of something? ｜ 呃，然后…你回去城里的时候，能不能帮我留意一件事？
- Anyway, our next step is to find the bard, right? I just asked the people nearby. They said that he hasn't performed at the square today and that he likely went to Windrise. ｜ 接下来是要找那位诗人对吧？刚才我问了附近的居民，他今天没在广场献唱，据说是去了风起地。

- Hiratsuka, Yae Publishing House ｜ 八重堂的平冢
- Who knows? We may even find Kamuna Harunosuke himself somewhere further in. I wonder how strong of a fighter he is... I'd like to go a few rounds with him. ｜ 没准我们还能在最深处见到惟神晴之介本尊呢？不知道那家伙能不能打，我想会会他。

- Nod-Krai is in the southernmost part of Snezhnaya, where people from all over Teyvat gather. Those not in the know would think that opportunities to get rich are everywhere there. ｜ 挪德卡莱在至冬的南端，那儿聚集了天南海北的人，不知道的还以为遍地都是发财的机会。

- Seriously? Did she beat you silly? ｜ 什么？你被这女人揍傻了吗？
- Despite holding one of the most senior positions in the Fatui as one of the Eleven Harbingers, Childe very much looks like the young adult that he still is.\nHe is a wolf in sheep's clothing, however, for under the cheerful and confident appearance lies a deadly swordsman.\nHe is the youngest among the Harbingers, but one of the most dangerous among their number.\nThat said, Childe doesn't seem to fit in well with the others.\nAs a fighter first and foremost, he is quite at odds with this organization of deceit and treachery. ｜ 尽管已经进入愚人众最顶层的「执行官」之列，但「公子」达达利亚的外表，似乎还是一位稚气未脱的青年。\n就如天鹅绒包裹的白银利刃一般，在他开朗自信的外表之下，是锤炼到极致的剑客之躯。\n他是最年轻的愚人众执行官，也是最危险的愚人众执行官之一。\n然而，「公子」似乎永远与他的同僚们不太合得来。\n作为最纯粹的战士，他在这个充满阴谋的集体中显得格格不入。
- Other than the spiciness, I honestly think that this dish was pretty tasty. ｜ 除了有些辣之外，我觉得这道菜的味道还不错呢。
- *sigh* Even after all these millennia, he still must endure such tremendous suffering? ｜ 唉…数千年来，他还一直在忍受着那样的痛苦吗…

- Then what am I going to do now? I've still got work to do, and Maillardet's prototypes were broken! I need someone to haul them back as soon as possible... ｜ 这可怎么办呢，我还有工作没处理完，梅雅德前辈的试验机又被打坏了，需要尽快找人回收…

- You can't have picnics on the sides of a galactic highway! Even the deities will be held fully responsible for road accidents that might occur!\nThe doorway to a study in a simple village connects to anywhere in space and time! Having tea with the deities, playing hide-and-seek across time... Vera's great adventure continues! ｜ 星际高速路和高速公路的路边是不能野餐的，就算是众神被高速星际船撞了也是全责。\n看起来只是普通的小村书房，透过门扉却可以到达宇宙与时间的任何一处地方！与众神午餐、与时间捉迷藏。薇拉的冒险，在此继续！

- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>Blessing of the Welkin Moon</color>\nEach time you purchase Blessing of the Welkin Moon, you will immediately receive 300 Genesis Crystals and 30 days of the Blessing.\nDuring this 30-day period, you can claim 90 Primogems each day when you log in. (Refreshes daily at 4:00 AM ({TIMEZONE}))\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Important Points</color>\n1. The duration of the Blessing of the Welkin Moon can only be extended if its remaining duration is 180 days or less.\n2. You cannot purchase an additional blessing if your remaining duration exceeds 180 days. If unique circumstances result in a repeat purchase anyway, the duration will not be extended, and instead you will be refunded 330 Genesis Crystals directly.\n3. There will be no refund for any Primogems that are not claimed via login during the Blessing's duration. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【空月祝福介绍】</color>\n每次购买空月祝福，可立即获得300创世结晶与为期30天的空月祝福生效时间。\n空月祝福生效时间内，每日可登录领取90原石。（每日凌晨4点更新【{TIMEZONE}】）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【注意事项】</color>\n1.空月祝福剩余生效时间≤180天时续购，总生效时间才会延长。\n2.当空月祝福剩余生效时间＞180天时不可再进行购买。但如因特殊情况导致重复购买，总生效时间将无法进行累加，并将直接返还330创世结晶。\n3.玩家在空月祝福生效期间如因未登录而未领取的原石，将不会返还。
- Hmm. Come to think of it, one of the six tribes of Natlan, the Collective of Plenty, lives beside it, don't they? Maybe we can ask them for help! ｜ 对了，纳塔六个部族中的「沃陆之邦」好像就在火山的一侧，说不定可以在那里打探消息！

- And even though Tirzad's a useless researcher, he's not actually a bad guy. Right, and you might even be able to save his research, Benben! ｜ 还有提尔扎德，虽然是个没用的学者，不过品行倒也没那么坏吧。对了，说不定奔奔能拯救他的研究呢。
- A wrap filled with roasted meat. On the thin, soft flatbread lies the tender meat covered in a crispy exterior, and the flavor is enriched by spices and balanced by vegetables. A small mouthful is enough to please one's picky taste buds. Eat carefully, now! You don't want to miss out on a single drop of the juice. ｜ 以烤肉为馅的卷饼。外焦里嫩的烤肉被香辛料注入了灵魂，水灵的蔬菜带来了清爽的口感，薄而不硬的饼皮包裹着美味，一口下去令人直叹满足，就连不小心溢出的肉汁都舍不得放过。

- Safety does come first. It's more important than saving time. In fact, it's way more important than anything else. ｜ 安全比时间…不，比任何东西都要重要。
- I saw a strange job posting once while passing by the Children of Echoes' territory. The requester was looking for a hardy plant that wouldn't take much maintenance, so I brought over some Saurian claw succulent seeds, along with a pot and some fertilizer. It grows well all over Natlan, even in the most barren areas. But when I went to collect my payment, I saw that not a single seedling had sprouted from the pot.\nI paid the price for overestimating Xilonen's gardening skills. This was one of the few failed jobs on my record. ｜ 有次我路过「回声之子」，看到了一个奇怪的委托。委托人希望得到一种好养的植物。我把肉龙掌的种子送了过去，配了花盆和肥料。这种植物分布广泛，在荒野上都长势旺盛。可我过段时间去拿报酬的时候，才发现盆里连小苗都没长出来。\n我为高估希诺宁的园艺能力支付了代价。这是我为数不多以失败而告终的委托。
- Wait. We haven't passed your final review yet. Why are you assigning us work already? ｜ 明明我们还没有通过你们的审核呢，怎么就开始让我们干活了呀？
- The Abyssal monsters ever swell in number, and despite all attempts, the core of the Abyss's might could not be destroyed. Evacuate first, then try something else later... ｜ 深渊魔物越来越多，深渊力量的核心无论如何都无法破坏，只能先行撤离，再做其他尝试…
- Well, yeah... But, that's why Paimon's qualified to talk about this! ｜ 我…我…所以我才有那么多经验教训嘛！

- No point stressing about that. We'll only know if we ask her. ｜ 这个你就不用担心啦，我们去商量一下就知道。
- So, as Uncle Nuu's student, I've always wanted to complete the trip to prove his skills. It's a pity that I've never had the chance... ｜ 所以，我一直想作为他的学生完成神秘岛之旅，帮他证明实力，可惜一直没有机会…

- A band of rogues has appeared out in the wild, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. Head over there and deal with them. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。前去打倒他们。
- The Dendro Archon is somewhat of a recluse. Perhaps she just doesn't want to entertain visitors, which would explain the lack of information in the Akasha. ｜ 是啊。草神大人深居简出，说不定根本就不希望有人来见她。如果真是这样，我们在虚空找不到求见的情报，就也理所当然了。

- Let's deal with them first. ｜ 总之先击退它们。
- At least I have a means of living a relatively normal life compared to the elders of my family. I have nothing to be discontented about. ｜ 相比起以身谢罪的家族长辈，至少我有正常生活的资格了，没什么不知足的。
- Why do you like to drink so much, Kaeya? ｜ 凯亚为什么那么喜欢喝酒呢？

- Ahem... Allow me to introduce Uncle Tian, he is... ｜ 咳咳…还没有向二位介绍，这位是天叔，身份是…
- Oh, I just love slimes. Whether it's the wet Hydro Slimes, the chilly Cryo Slimes that chase you from miles away, or the shy Dendro Slimes that hide in the ground... I love 'em all! I used to believe that slimes and hilichurls simply lived in harmony together, but now I know better. Just yesterday, while I was {0}, I saw a huge hilichurl take its axe to a warm, little Pyro Slime. I couldn't bear to watch... ｜ 我真的很喜欢史莱姆。无论是湿湿的水史莱姆，还是冷冰冰，仿佛拒人千里之外，但又会扑过来的冰史莱姆，还是害羞地躲在土地里的草史莱姆…原本听说丘丘人和史莱姆有和谐的共生关系，但昨天，我{0}的时候，看到一个个子很大的丘丘人，把暖暖的火史莱姆拍在斧子上，颠覆了我的世界观…史莱姆真的很可怜…

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 30 and complete the following prerequisite quests: the "Ritou Escape Plan" Archon Quest, the "The Moon-Bathed Deep," "The Still Water's Flow," and "The Entrance to Tokoyo" World Quests to take part.\n\n"The Moon-Bathed Deep" includes the following quests: "Eye of Watatsumi," "Fang of Watatsumi," "Fin of Watatsumi," "Tail of Watatsumi," and "Heart of Watatsumi." ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「离岛逃离计划」、世界任务「月浴之渊」、「止水之潘」、「常世入口」后才能参与。\n\n「月浴之渊」系列任务包括：「海祇之眼」、「海祇之牙」、「海祇之鳍」、「海祇之尾」、「海祇之心」。
- Hmm, so what should we do then? Do we go back to the Akademiya and search for leads there? ｜ 咦？那我们该怎么办，去教令院附近找线索吗？
- There are some things that I must do. ｜ 我有必须要做的事。

- Erm, what's something like this doing in a pond... ｜ 呃，水池里为什么会有这种东西…

- Probably because I really have rejected them myself, I guess? I'm somewhat aware of their standards. As for Frejus... He's a decent ways off from making the cut. ｜ 可能是因为我真的拒绝过枫丹科学院的邀请吧。所以我大概清楚那里的标准，弗雷瑞斯前辈…嗯…还差不少呢。

- Elder, Scions of the Canopy ｜ 悬木人长老
- You learn from a Millelith named Kun that there are plans to rebuild the previously destroyed Jade Chamber and that some small preparations to that end are already taking place... ｜ 从千岩军大坤那边意外听说，之前毁掉的群玉阁似乎有重建的计划，一些小物件已经开始了筹备…
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: You know who we haven't seen in a while? Xilonen. Last time we saw her, she was lying down in a tree fast asleep.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: And the time before that, she was sunbathing on the roof wearing sunglasses.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And the time before that, she was chilling in her home-made rocking chair, sipping fruit juice...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: That's weird, how come our only memories of Xilonen are of her taking a break?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Hmm... It could be that those memories only stand out because they're so unusual. Maybe she's such a hard worker that she doesn't take breaks very often.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: You think? Huh. Well, speaking of hard workers, Paimon's been finding herself in that category quite a lot recently.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Like when we were chasing down that baby Tepetlisaur. Paimon had to fly up pretty darn high to show you the way.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And also the time when we went Cacahuatl-picking, and helped that messenger from the Scions of the Canopy look for their package... Whew, if anything, Paimon's been working TOO hard.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Hmph, Paimon's gonna be doing a lot more slacking off during our commissions from now on. But secretly, so you won't notice!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: You slack off all you need, Paimon. I'll make sure I don't notice.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Aww, that's so nice of you! In that case... whenever you're slacking off, Paimon will make sure not to notice you, either!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Although actually... It might be easier if we just slacked off together...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Alright, new plan! We'll slack off at the same time, but without watching each other. C'mon, let's go, it's sunbathing time! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，有一段时间没见过希诺宁了，上次见到她的时候，她还趴在一棵树上睡觉。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>上上次，应该是躺在屋顶，戴着墨镜晒太阳。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>上上上次，好像是坐在自己做的摇摇椅上喝果汁…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇，为什么我们对希诺宁的印象，都是她在休息啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>平时工作很勤奋的人，一旦停下来休息，就会给人留下很深的印象。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的？这么一想，我工作的时候也很努力啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>上次追那只小嵴锋龙的时候，我为了给你指路，飞得很高很高。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>还有那次帮「悬木人」的讯使找邮包，帮人去采苦种，哇…说起来都好累好累。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼，以后我们去做委托的时候，我要多多偷懒，而且不让你发现！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我尽量不发现，派蒙就好好偷懒吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你那么好呀？那你偷懒的时候，我也尽量不发现…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哎呀，这么一想，我们干脆一起去偷懒吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>好，决定了！现在就是我们互相不发现的偷懒时间，快快快，一起躺下晒太阳吧。
- And it's not like humans are all good or bad either... Maybe some youkai just don't like the Mikawa Flower Festival much... ｜ 人类也一样有好有坏吧，谁知道妖怪里面有没有不喜欢这「三川花祭」的…
- Well... Because everyone's saying the Turnfire is what saved the King last night... ｜ 那个…因为大家好像说，昨天是回火的力量拯救了山王嘛…
- The outlander offerer? ｜ 异乡的「祭主」？
- Good luck, you two! I've got my own matters to investigate! ｜ 祝你们一切顺利！我也要出发去侦察了！
- Oh really? Are you prepared to take responsibility for what you just said? ｜ 哈？你能为自己说的话负责吗？
- That's true. I'd certainly hate to see anyone else try to con you. ｜ 是啊，我也不愿意见到还有其他人想打你们的主意。
- Restores <color=#3399CCFF>30–34%</color> of Max HP and an additional <color=#3399CCFF>600–1,900</color> HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的<color=#3399CCFF>30%-34%</color>，并额外恢复<color=#3399CCFF>600-1900</color>点生命值。
- And now, a golden-haired hero has returned to the sea of flowers, and though it is not the one who came before, I can feel that something has begun to flow again. ｜ 如今金发的勇士又回到了花海，虽然不是当初的那位，不过我也能感受到某些东西又开始重新流逝了。

- Operation Halberd Breaker ｜ 抹金折戟
- Goddess's Manuscript (II) ｜ 女神的手稿·其二
- To this day, people still thank me for what I did back then. Perhaps that's why they visit my tailor store so often. ｜ 直到现在，大家也还会因为这件事来感谢我。他们常来光顾我的裁缝铺，大概也是因为这个原因吧。
- In response to overwhelming demand from our readers, reporters from our paper specially interviewed the Champion Duelist Clorinde. Though she rejected our formal interview request, we were still able to communicate briefly. ｜ 应读者要求，本报记者特对决斗代理人克洛琳德进行了专题采访。尽管采访的请求遭到拒绝，双方仍进行了简短的沟通。
- While squatting next to some children and watching them catch goldfish during one summer festival, I suddenly had a thought: could I make fireworks that could go off on the surface of the water? Thus, the "Goldfish Fireworks" were born! They can swim here and there, emit multi-colored lights, and they can even spit bubbles! I never thought that it would actually work, but I guess wonders never cease. ｜ 有一次夏日祭，我蹲在孩子们旁边看他们捞金鱼的时候，我突然想，有没有可能做出一种能在水上放的烟花呢？然后，「金鱼烟花」就诞生了！能在水面上游来游去，能发出七彩的光，还能吐泡泡呢，很不可思议吧！…我也没想到我真的能成功，但这个世界上就是有很多很多不可思议的事呢。
- I remember now! Uncle Nuu did mention this possibility to me before... ｜ 我想起来了！努乌叔叔之前确实跟我讲过这种可能…
- But we've been really busy here at the inn, and I haven't the time to go out and deliver the food myself. If you could help me out, that would be great. I'll be sure to compensate you fairly. ｜ 但客栈里的生意太忙了，我可抽不开身子去送，如果你能帮忙跑一趟那就最好了，报酬少不了你的。

### Part 064

- This player has not yet finished certain quests. Currently unable to enter their world. ｜ 目标玩家未完成某些任务，暂时无法进入该世界
- You mean these? ｜ 你说的是这些吗？
- Doing nothing is the happiest thing. ｜ 没有什么事，就是最快乐的事。
- Toys are just my personal hobby. They bring happiness to people, so if I let more people know about them, is that not the same as spreading happiness? ｜ 但玩具只是我个人的爱好，这是带来快乐的东西，让更多人知道，不就相当于把快乐传递到更远的地方吗？
- Blizzard Strayer ｜ 冰风迷途的勇士

- #Hey! {NICKNAME}, don't make jokes like that! Araphala, no one will cook you! ｜ #喂！{NICKNAME}，不要开这种玩笑！兰非拉，没有人会把你煮成粥的啦！
- Hmm, but if we get our hopes up, there's further for them to come down. So it makes sense to investigate thoroughly first, just to be sure! ｜ 但是希望越大就可能失望越大嘛，所以提前调查清楚还是有必要的吧？
- Firstly, why was Freminet affected by the Primordial Seawater? It was because he dove into the sea. My theory is... the long lost Primordial Sea is probably very close to the Fortress of Meropide. ｜ 首先，菲米尼为什么受胎海水影响？是因为他潜入了水下。我猜…传说中一直不知所在的原始胎海就在梅洛彼得堡附近。

- A medium-sized, round fish with horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters and drive away creatures that try to harm it. \nThis sandy-colored, plain-looking fish is an important breed. Researchers have managed to deduce the ecological characteristics of the whole pufferfish lineage from the anatomy of this species. With its immense strength and strongest horns amongst its kind, this fish acts as an "underwater workhorse." They have evolved their protective coloration as a result of long-term activities in the riverbed and the bottom of the lake, along with spending all their days with pervasive river and lake sand as companions. ｜ 体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n这种角鲀有着黄沙般的色泽，其貌不扬，却是相当重要的品种。学者们根据这种角鲀的生理结构，推断出了整个角鲀谱系的生态特点——这种角鲀有着同族中最强的力量和最坚硬的犄角，扮演着「水下工人」的角色。由于长期在河床与湖底活动，与弥漫的河沙与湖沙为伴，它们也进化出了相应的保护色。
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。

- After clearing blocks, your rattan figure will attack the opposing rattan figure and gain energy based on your Chain Level.\nAttacks will deal DMG to the opposing rattan figure and <color=#FFCC33>deploy obstacles</color> onto your opponent's field.\nWhen the rattan figure on one side loses all its HP, the other side achieves victory. ｜ 当消除结束后，我方藤人会根据「连锁等级」向对手藤人发起攻击并获取能量。\n攻击将会对对手藤人造成伤害并在对方的场地上<color=#FFCC33>设置阻碍</color>。\n当双方有一方藤人的生命值耗尽时，另一方便将获得胜利。

- As per Kamisato Ayaka's request, you and Paimon help her prepare for her meeting with Tsubaki. The first thing that is needed is a specially-made garment. However, in present-day Inazuma, the silk needed to make the garment is a scarce resource. You get to work on resolving this dilemma. ｜ 受神里绫华委托，你和派蒙陪她一起准备与「椿」见面所需的礼物。首先需要制作的是一件「定制衣物」，然而在如今的稻妻，制衣所需的丝绸竟是稀缺品。为解决此事，你们奔波起来。

- A Bubble Formation that for some strange reason doesn't attack you, but helps you unseal treasures.\nControl the currents and barriers to guide the Mist Bubble to the ringed device at the end! ｜ 不知为何不会攻击我们，而是协助我们解除宝物封印的水泡阵地。\n通过控制水流、障碍物，将水泡导向附近的圆环装置吧！
- Restores 18% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 300 HP every 5s for 30s. ｜ 立即为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的18%，并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复300点生命值。
- This is for Keisuke! ｜ 为了敬助大哥！
- A traveler? ｜ 旅行者？
- If one were to go by skill alone, Jean has long become one of the best swordsmen in Mondstadt.\nBut in Jean's heart, she would rather be a shield that defends freedom and song than a sword that cuts through corruption and darkness.\n"Protecting" has always been a tougher task than "destroying."\nAround the time when she was promoted from Captain of her squad to Master of the Knights, a huge challenge stood before her. From without, the Fatui exerted diplomatic pressure, and from within, there were traitors — comrades of the former Inspector. Regrouping and finding a way to break through was no easy task.\nBut Jean was able to fend off the external pressure with one hand, and lead the Knights to smash the many plots of the Abyss Order with the other, re-establishing the authority of the Knights of Favonius.\nJean will never forget the moment she received her Vision. At that moment, all seemed to grow quiet as she felt the breeze flow through her hand. The world seemed to fade away, save for the time-honored motto of the house of Gunnhildr:\n"For Mondstadt, as always." ｜ 单论实力，琴早已是蒙德城数一数二的剑士。但在琴心中，比起成为一把能够刺穿腐朽与黑暗的利剑，她更愿意做守护歌声与自由的坚盾。\n「维护」向来比「破坏」更难。\n从小队队长晋升为副团长时，出现在琴面前的就是巨大的挑战。外有愚人众施加的邦交压力，内有叛徒——前任督察长的同党。想在如此形势下重振旗鼓开拓局面，并非易事。\n但琴独自扛住了来自外界的压力，引领一众骑士粉碎深渊教团的诸多阴谋，重新为西风骑士团树立威望。\n琴永远不会忘记得到「神之眼」的那一刻。感受着掌间升起的微风，顷刻间，四周沉寂下来，空间化作黑白，唯有古恩希尔德家族古老而严厉的家训浮现在她脑海之中。\n「永护蒙德。」
- She must "smash the plates." Repay that debt. ｜ 她必须，「摔碎盘子」，才能报答。
- I've got clocks from Fontaine, porcelain bowls from Liyue, dried petals from Mondstadt... ｜ 我收到过枫丹的钟表、璃月的瓷碗、蒙德的干花…
