- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nJust as a hero's conquests know no bounds, so too must their training forever go on. Hone your skills through endless challenges and never stop pushing your limits!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nEvery challenge in the "Realm of Tempered Valor" event comprises 25 floors' worth of combat stages. The Level and HP of opponents within each challenge will increase as you ascend from floor to floor. Finish a stage within 30s to clear it and continue to challenge the next one.\nIf one of your Friends clears Floor 20 in a single-player challenge, you can receive a Boon of Friendship from them. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n勇者的征程没有终点，勇者的淬炼从不止息。在挑战中不断磨练自己，不断地突破极限吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n在「征战勇者淬炼之界」活动中，每个挑战均有25层战斗关卡，挑战中敌人的等级和生命值将随层数的提升而提升。若在30秒内通过该层关卡，则视为突破该关卡，并可继续挑战后续关卡。\n若有好友在单人挑战的情况下通过了第20层关卡，则旅行者可以在挑战过程中获得好友助益。

And though he has lost his bodily form, he can still command the currents.\nWhen you get within a certain distance of him, you can summon high-speed currents to move to his side. Interact with him and ask him to summon intense currents to send you to a target location.\nIf you aim at specific targets when choosing where to go, he might have other things to say as well... ｜ 斯库拉是在遥远的过去统领龙裔的亲王，虽然已经失去了肉身但仍然有着操纵水流的力量。\n在靠近他一定范围内，可以召唤出高速的水流移动到他身边；与其交互，则可令他召唤激流，将角色送往目标位置。\n在考虑要前往何处时，瞄准特定物件，他或许还会有其它的话想说…

Ironically, Nazuchi Beach has been ravaged by war since a thousand years ago and has become a place for scavengers and pirates, with few inhabitants. ｜ 「名椎」在稻妻先民的古老语言中有「为神灵之手温柔爱抚」之含义。但讽刺的是，自千百年前至今，名椎滩便饱受战乱的摧残，落得居民寥寥，也成了拾荒者与海贼的天地。

That's all there is to it.\n...Perhaps that's why some people colloquially refer to me as an "executioner." ｜ 决斗代理人的工作并不繁杂，甚至可以说十分简单。遵循审判庭的要求，击败对手就好。除此之外，无需多想。\n…也许这就是外面有些人把我称为「刽子手」的原因。

He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。

- Traveler ｜ 主角
- Crackers shaped like little Saurians. Light, crispy, sweet, and fragrant, with adorable patterns on top to boot — how could the people of Natlan not be won over by such delectable snacks? Apparently, even the Saurians love 'em... But are crackers really the type of thing Saurians eat? ｜ 小龙造型的饼干。吃起来松松脆脆、香香甜甜，上面的小龙图案非常可爱，能轻而易举地俘获纳塔人的心。据说甚至连龙都会被其吸引，但龙真的会吃饼干吗？
- Maybe he just likes to toy with people and stab them in the back. ｜ 可能只是喜欢背叛和玩弄他人吧。
- Alright. We'll set out whenever you are ready. ｜ 嗯。准备好了，我们就出发吧。

- Hard worker? You look like you're hardly working. ｜ 你像是在工作的样子吗？
- Wait until the next day (07:00 – 11:00) ｜ 等待至第二天（7-11点）
- You know a Statue of The Seven is legit when even the dust on top is brimming with elemental energy... Poor Jilliana, she must work herself to the bone trying to clean them. ｜ 该说不愧是七天神像吗？连蒙的尘都掺杂着元素，吉丽安娜小姐一定清除地很辛苦吧…

- Huh!? ｜ 嚯？

- Dance Dance Resolution ｜ 跃动节拍响应法
- Yay, I got to eat something tasty today. I'm so happy! Thank you! ｜ 今天也吃到了好吃的东西，可莉好开心！谢谢你！
- (That's a no from me too...) ｜ （我也不想要呢…）
- She was an extraordinary mage with the power to grant people their wishes. She turned the bottle into a thing of equally extraordinary power. ｜ 火红的魔女是能满足人愿望的了不起的魔女，她把瓶子也变成了同样了不起的瓶子。
- Let's see... There's one place where monsters gather right ahead. Let's go there first, shall we? ｜ 我看看…附近就有一处魔物的聚集地，咱们就先去那里好了。
- Go to Xigu Antiques to investigate ｜ 前往希古居调查
- Ride the Maritime Express to Constellation Metropole ｜ 搭乘「海上列车」，前往星轨王城
- Who the...? Oh, looks like we managed to lure them out already. ｜ #你是…哦，{NICKNAME}，我们这算是把人引出来了吧？
- I'll say it again. Get out of my way! I'm going to see Baulande. We're all coworkers here, there's no need to get rough! ｜ 我再说一遍，别拦着我，我要去见博兰德。同事一场，我不想动粗！
- Still, all you need to do is to focus on your goal. You can leave the complicated matters to me. ｜ ——复杂的事交给我，你们只需要聚焦在你们想做的事上就可以了。
- I'm sorry! Are you alright? ｜ 抱歉抱歉！你们没事吧？
- The colors, shapes, and firing intervals of fireworks all have different meanings. Inazumans in the past used this method to communicate with each other from somewhere far away. ｜ 烟花的颜色、形状、燃放间隔，都代表着不同的意义。过去的稻妻人，就是靠着这种方式，在遥远的地方相互沟通。
- I'm afraid that we'll have to leave such things to you. ｜ 这些恐怕就得交给你们解决了。
- Have you found the Archaic Stones? ｜ 请问两位找到「老石」了吗？
- ... ｜ ……
- And 'cause I have to count all these boats, then check and double-check the numbers, I now have no time to work on my poetry... It is really ruining my day! ｜ 我还不得不在这浪费时间数来数去，一遍又一遍，诗都要写不出来了…真扫兴。
- A finely crafted stone model, said to have been carved in imitation of a mysterious pillar within the Core of Chu'ulel. A luminous tetrahedron floats at its center, a creation of Tubby's adeptal power. While it lacks the original's miraculous ability to purge Abyssal defilement, it radiates a heartwarming glow nevertheless.\nJust as the Abyss's filth is but a transient blight, so too will the pillar's light shine forth once more. Do not let temporary setbacks defeat you, for such is the path that every adventurer must tread. ｜ 精巧工致的石质模型，据说摹刻自「统律之心」内部的神秘柱石。该模型中心漂浮的发光四面体乃是由阿圆的仙力制成，虽不似原型的辉光般有消融深渊污秽的神奇力量，但依旧保有能够温暖人心的光芒。\n正如深渊的秽露只能肆虐一时，柱石的辉光终将再度闪耀。不要被一时的顿挫击倒，这方才是冒险家应该行走的道路…
- Avatars of Lava ｜ 熔岩游像
- Help! Come quick! Someone's fainted! ｜ 快！快来人啊！有人晕过去了！
- Lithic Spear <size=24>etc.</size> ｜ 千岩长枪<size=24>等</size>
- Someone admiring the scenery from the clifftops... Ah, that must be him! ｜ 在悬崖边眺望风景的人——啊，找到了！
- This creativity business sure is tiring... ｜ 创作真是件麻烦事…
- Wow... Is this the adeptal energy Fujin was talking about...? ｜ 哇…这就是浮锦说的什么仙力吗…？
- "Don't you go ignoring a student who've run errands for you for years now that you're a big and successful researcher with a powerful sponsor!" ｜ 「现在你成为大学者了，拉到赞助商了，飞黄腾达了，可别翻脸不认我这个给你跑了好几年腿的学生啊！」
- We just got the hang of it along the way. ｜ 不知不觉就找到诀窍了。
- Hmph... ｜ ……

- Where did it go? ...What on earth do you mean? ｜ 后来？什么后来？
- Swelling Lake ｜ 微澜的湖水
- I have to say, though, if Yelan hadn't spoken out like she did, I'm not sure she would've gotten through to him. Also... self-sacrifice is something Yelan feels strongly about. She'd try to stop whoever it was. ｜ 但看刚才的情况，不说到这个份上，魈恐怕听不进去。加上夜兰她…本就在意这种事，肯定会全力阻止。

- Wow, so is it true? Does it really exist? ｜ 真的吗，真的有那种地方吗？

- Hey! You startled me!! ｜ 干什么啦，吓我一跳！！
- Root of the Spirit-Marrow ｜ 灵髓的根脉
- Don't worry, the Traveler and I only just met up. We were just worried that you might get lost along the way, so we thought that we'd come get you. ｜ 别紧张，我们也才会合没多久，怕你不认识路，特地来接你的。
- I have to return the ceremonial sword to the chief shortly, but I'll leave everything else in the camp as-is for now. Feel free to make use of it. ｜ 我稍后要去首领那里还仪式剑，营地的其他东西就暂时留在这里。你有兴趣的话可以随便使用。
- Hey there, Traveler, Paimon! What, is it so weird to see me at my own home? ｜ 嗨，是派蒙和旅行者啊。怎么？在家门口见到我很奇怪吗？
- You've got your priorities all wrong! ｜ 你工作的重点完全就错了吧！
- So, you should be able to find them in the forest by looking for <color=#00E1FFFF>the rising pillars of smoke</color>, I think. ｜ 在林子里，看到<color=#00E1FFFF>袅袅升起的烟柱</color>，就能找到他们。应该吧。
- The stars determine your destiny... ｜ 星空决定命运…
- Instead of leaving a few stand-ins for actors which just stand there chatting loudly all day, it's better to just leave them out completely! ｜ 与其摆几个不会动的演员立牌在那里，大话说得山响，却从头到尾站着干聊天…还不如什么都不放呢！
- Seems like quite the disaster. ｜ 看来凶多吉少了。

- Huh? Isn't this where we just were before? ｜ 咦，这里怎么和刚刚的地方一模一样？
- Junkichi is trying it out, to be specific. He's hit a bit of a creativity block recently, so I'm helping him make a wish so that he can move past it. ｜ 准确地说，是顺吉在试。如你们所见，顺吉最近的创作遇到了瓶颈，我正在帮他通过许愿攻克难关。
- A shimmering feather from a songbird that brings a nudge of courage to its wearer. ｜ 明亮的鸣禽翎羽。能带来小小的勇气。

- One of my ancestors was a shrine maiden named Eboshi. She was a character of some significance in Byakuyakoku's history, and it is due to her that I am in charge of the Watatsumi Goryou Matsuri. ｜ 我的家系之中曾有一位名叫乌帽子的巫女，在白夜国历史里也算个人物，所以才让我负责「海祇御灵祭」。
- Given the ease of picking Glaze Lilies, I think this was a fitting end to our tasks, in more ways than one. ｜ 摘花这件事，在各种意义上都很方便，做起来没有困难，所以才把它留在了最后。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- ...Just keep it safe, and you better not forget my color when I'm gone. ｜ …收好它，到时候千万不要把颜色搞错。
- Peculiar problem? Oh no, don't tell Paimon that the relic hasn't acknowledged Mr. Faurobert either? ｜ 微妙的情况？唔…难道福罗贝尔先生也没有被圣物认可？
- Whoa, Paimon bets a lot of people can live in a huge castle like this! ｜ 哇，这么大的城堡，应该能住很多人吧？
- *sigh* Anyway, thanks again for your help. ｜ 唉，还是谢谢你帮我忙。
- Continue editing ｜ 继续编辑
- Oh... Looks like we're not the first ones to make it in here. ｜ 咦？前面好像已经有人进来了。
- You could just put a chair next to the bed to hold your snacks and drinks... ｜ 床边拿个椅子放零食饮料不就好了…
- Yes, and you may leave carving the stamps to me. ｜ 雕刻印章的事可以交给我。
- Why do you linger here still...? ｜ 你们怎么还逗留在此处呢…
- Oh, didn't I tell you before? ｜ 咦，我之前没跟你们说过吗？
- ...Will be about two stories high...! ｜ 差不多有两层楼高吧，嗯。

- The Vanarana in dreams is a shadow of the Vanarana outside. So, things will get better here now that you have dealt with the problems outside. Thank you. ｜ #梦中的桓那兰那，是梦外面的桓那兰那的影子。那菈{NICKNAME}解决了外面的问题，梦中就会变得更好。谢谢你们。
- In fact, I am from Fontaine, and I write novels for a living... Hmm, or should I say, apart from being the Blade Dancer, I write heroic novels for some extra pocket money in my spare time. ｜ 其实我来自枫丹，主要的职业是小说…嗯，应该说，我在从事「轻剑舞者」的工作之余，也写英雄小说挣钱，补贴主业。
- This is a strategic location that must be defended at all costs. ｜ 镇守此地，至关重要。
- He's in the hands of the law now. ｜ 他已经伏法啦。
- So it hasn't had any effect at all! ｜ 这不是一点效果都没有嘛！

- Eh? There's another place...? ｜ 欸？还有下一个地方啊…
- Beidou is very impressed by your performance and plans to take you to see the Crux's real business. ｜ 北斗对你的欣赏藏不住，她要带你见识一下南十字船队真正的业务。
- Blazing Dissipation: Crimson Witch of Flames ｜ 灼思终散·炽烈的炎之魔女

- When you align the images and shine them onto the map, you'll find treasure specially prepared by the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 当你把正确的图案拼出来，并且映在地图上之后，就可以发现我们冒险家协会特意准备好的「宝藏」了。
- Ah... Please don't also start calling me that... ｜ 啊…请不要借机…
- That's where I started my culinary journey, in fact. ｜ 要知道我的创意美食之路，就是从那里开始的。
- Character wields the power of Anemo ｜ 角色元素类型为「风」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- How can you use such a crude word as "animal" to describe the one and only Prince? He is special and the only one of his kind... Such a remark is an insult to Prince! ｜ 怎么能简单地以「动物」概括「小王子」大人呢，「小王子」大人是特殊的，独一无二的，你们这样说是对「小王子」大人的冒犯！
- So you suspected her from the very beginning? ｜ 所以，你从一开始就怀疑她了？
- A portable metal vessel containing strong wine. Can be stuffed into the pocket of an outer coat for ease of access and use. ｜ 容纳烈酒的便携金属容器，适合放在大衣口袋中随时使用。
- Hongyi ｜ 弘毅
- That we learned these few key locations and the general layout of the area is all thanks to their efforts... ｜ 今人之所以能够确定这几处地点的位置与地形情况，也是多亏了他们的探险…
- ...Alright, alright, I admit it. I've sold local wildlife to outlander customers, and made quite a bit of Mora off it too... and I'm aware of the damage invasive species can bring to other countries. But when you caught me I was running for my life — there was a "tainted water phantom" or somesuch... it was {0}, and it was chasing after me! I was simply trying to get away from it as quickly as I could, I was definitely not poaching at the time!\nAnyway, there is a dangerous monster {0}! Now that you've got some useful intel. Any chance you could... use a bit of discretion and... cut me some slack? ｜ …好吧好吧，我承认，我确实向外地客人出售过本地的野生生物，赚了不少摩拉…我也知道，因此导致的生物入侵问题，会为别国造成不少损失…但我被你们抓获的时候，只是在逃命——我{0}遇见了一种…浊水什么幻灵来着，被那个魔物给追杀！我只能尽快远离它，并不是在非法捕捉动物！\n你们都听见了吧，{0}，有危险的魔物！我向你们提供了情报，可以稍微…酌情…给我减罪吗？
- In such a long life, parents are but a child's first connection. Even though we don't want to be separated, there will come the day when you must walk your own path. ｜ 在如此漫长的生命里，父母不过是孩子人生的第一环。即使我们不愿分离，终有一日，你也会走上属于自己的路。
- An exquisite gift box from Haniyyah, the jellies within are loved by Fungi. There are many unique flavors, so Fungi with different preferences can be fed separately.\nWith a better understanding of the Fungi and her accumulated experience, Haniyyah has mastered the flavors of the Marvelous Jelly. The improved version is not only more nutritious, but also contains special Fontainian flavors. The healthy jellies allow the Fungi to eat well and live well! ｜ 海妮耶赠送的精巧礼盒，其中装有蕈兽们喜爱的「妙妙琼脂」，琼脂被分成了多种独特的口味，可以根据蕈兽个体的喜好来投喂。\n随着对蕈兽伙伴们的了解，以及制作经验的不断积累，海妮耶对「妙妙琼脂」口味的把握已堪称完美。改良后的妙妙琼脂不仅能为蕈兽伙伴们提供充足的养分，还融入了枫丹食物的特色，有了更新奇的口味，能让蕈兽伙伴们吃得开心，健康生活！
- Titu ｜ 蒂图
- I just brought a bottle out from the tavern. No need to thank me. ｜ 只是从酒馆里顺手带杯酒出来…没什么需要感谢的。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4级后解锁
- Ah, I am glad that we were able to help! By the way, I also saw a few Qingxin on the mountain's summit that seemed quite lovely — beyond the pale, even. I wonder if... ｜ 能帮上忙就好。顺便，我见山巅有几株清心生得格外可爱，不知可否——
- I—is there something you n—need today? I h—heard you went to Gurabad... I—it is a shame that the J—Jinni can no longer speak. ｜ 请问您今天有、有什么事吗…听说您去、去了居尔城…镇灵再、再也没法说话，那还挺、挺可惜的。
- Maybe try to relieve your anxiety first? ｜ 还是先来缓解一下你的焦虑吧？
- Shuyu, everyone... I cannot thank you enough for all your help. I'm ready to tell you my story... if you're willing to listen. ｜ 漱玉，还有各位…谢谢你们。可以听我讲讲，关于我的故事吗？
- *sigh*... I'm ashamed to admit it, but... I just can't remember. No matter how you look at it, I should know those things, but for some reason, no matter how hard I try to remember, the information just doesn't come. Perhaps my age really has caught up with me this time... ｜ 唉…这也是让我十分惭愧的事，无论如何我都应该记得的，或许是我真的年纪大了…这些我怎么也想不起来了。
- Klee is going to the Golden Apple Archipelago to meet the Dodo-King or else... or else he'll take Dodoco away! ｜ 可莉要去金苹果群岛见嘟嘟大魔王！否则、否则他就要抢走嘟嘟可！
- Investigate the other optical devices in the ruins ｜ 调查遗迹内的其他光学装置
- Nobushi ｜ 野伏众

- Your swordsmanship is excellent. Each strike was precise but not aggressive, which speaks to your character. I ask your forgiveness for misjudging you and offending you with my words and actions. ｜ 阁下剑术精湛，出招犀利却不咄咄逼人，足见品性。之前我错判了阁下的为人，言行对你多有冒犯，还请你见谅。
- Hehe. So after all that, you do care! ｜ 嘿嘿，说了这么多，其实斯露莎还是关心同伴的嘛。
- All his stuff's here too... Hoo boy. Does he really put his food and paints together? ｜ 东西都在这里…呜哇，颜料和吃的东西居然放在一起啊。

- #Why don't we go to the Grand Narukami Shrine and ask Yae Miko about it, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，要不我们去鸣神大社，问一问八重神子吧？

- "Optimizations have been made to the locations of the hot-air balloons from which contestants will be dropped into the arena and the overall duration of the tournament..." ｜ 「选手入场所用的热气球降落点，以及团体赛的总时长都根据场地的优化进行了相应的调整…」
- The Abyss calamity devastated our tribe decades ago, and the evil dragon that occupies this ancient city also appeared around the same time. ｜ 数十年前，深渊灾厄曾一度摧毁我们的部族，盘踞在这座古城的邪龙，也是那个时候才出现的。
- I see, so that means there isn't enough... ｜ 明白了，总之就是不充足对吧…
- Drifter's Destiny ｜ 荒波椛叶
- We will claim victory! In Natlan, no one fights alone! ｜ 我们必将带回胜利的果实！因为我们不会孤军奋战！
- Marvelous Merchandise ｜ 百货奇货
- A home that can often be found in Inazuma. The two-story design provides ample space for use, whether one intends to use it as a dwelling or as a store. Inazuma City has a great many family businesses, and with such places, the family tends to live on the second floor while the first is reserved for the store, with multiple generations living and working in these houses for hundreds of years. ｜ 寻常可见的稻妻房屋，双层设计带来了较为充裕的使用空间，无论作为住宅还是商铺使用，都相当合适。稻妻城内有着不少子承父业，代代相传的商户，家族全员居住在二层，经营一层的商铺，数百年间，几代人的生活与工作都汇聚在此屋之中。
- No way — if anything, my motivation grows the more I do things I enjoy. ｜ 怎么会，自己喜欢的事情可是越做越有劲。
- For people like us, who are constantly in conflict. That is a pure land of peace, a utopia created by the very first human to use phlogiston. ｜ 对于时刻都在处于纷争中的纳塔人来说，那里就像唯一的净土一样，当然了这个净土的创造者，就是第一个会用燃素的人类。
- Especially not compared to the toughest coach in all Natlan. ｜ 不愧是纳塔人口口相传的魔鬼教练。
- Wooden shields can be easily ignited. Without their shields, Mitachurls are defenseless. ｜ 木制的巨盾能被火焰轻易点燃。丘丘暴徒一旦失去了巨盾，就失去了防御能力。
- Whatever other motives they may have, we are at least aligned on this. So let's consider them an anonymous ally. ｜ 不管他们的目的是什么，至少在这一点上我们是一致的，那就当做是多了一个不愿露面的盟友吧。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Rainbow Lights: At Dawn We Celebrate.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「晴虹灯树-『元辰吉庆』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Let me think of a way. ｜ 让我来想想办法吧。
- About Chevreuse ｜ 关于夏沃蕾…
- We can invite her to be our guide and set off for the island. As qualified adventurers, we should never give up! ｜ 这次正好邀请她做向导，再次出发，毕竟合格的冒险家可不会半途而废哦！
- The final battle with the Abyss is at hand. You have the support of all in Natlan, and they will do so in various ways. Once you are ready, journey forth to the last battleground. ｜ 接下来就是和深渊决战的时刻，纳塔所有人都会以各种方式支持你，做好准备后，就向着最终的战场出发吧。

- Ah, this must be the fan we're looking for. ｜ 这把应该就是要找的扇子吧。

- And the diadem was found, and the man whose personality was said to have changed, was dead, and there was nothing to be found. ｜ 冠冕失而复得，传闻性格变化的人也已经去世，查无可查了。
- Well, at least the Shogunate and Sangonomiya have agreed to a ceasefire, eh? ｜ 现在最开心的就是听说幕府和珊瑚宫休战了，哈哈。
- Nobody has the right... ｜ 没有任何人有资格…
- Your Highness, everything is exactly as the legends said! ｜ 公主殿下，这些和传说里记录的一模一样！
- A magical sword that can only be wielded by the ultimate overlord who rules the seas. As it has been made with special water-resistant materials, it will not get ruined by water damage even after being immersed. Why, one might even call it invincible! ｜ 统治海原的究极霸王才能使用的超级魔剑。因为使用了特殊的防水材料，就算浸在水中也不会泡坏，几乎能称得上是无敌！
- Alhaitham ｜ 艾尔海森
- That's where you and that rude fellow are both from, right, Osse? ｜ 小呜斯和刚才那个没礼貌的大坏蛋都是来自那个叫雷穆利亚的国家，对吧？

- Looks like your stupidity knows no bounds, Kinich! You actually lost with a hand like that? Hah, I don't even know what to say. ｜ 笨蛋基尼奇！这局也能输？伟大圣龙都快被你气笑了。
- Break the Xenomare Pearl directly without destroying the Resonant Coral Orb while the Millennial Pearl Seahorse is guiding Hoarthunder. ｜ 在千年珍珠骏麟引导「原海古雷」时，在不破坏共鸣珊瑚珠的情况下直接破坏异海珍珠。
- Well, we're all here. But where the heck is Xianyun? Shouldn't she be here by now? ｜ 大家都挺了不起的，但说了这么半天，闲云人在哪呢？
- Could you tell me a bit more about the Qixing? ｜ 能多介绍一些「七星」的事吗？
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} seems to have discovered something. Let's follow him, quick! ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}好像发现什么了，我们快跟上它吧！
- Um... Paimon doesn't really know how to comfort you, but at the very least, no one's gonna be intimidating you from now on. You can breathe easy at least, right? ｜ 嗯…我也不知道该怎么安慰你，不过今后肯定不会有人再威胁你啦。应该…可以稍微松口气了吧？
- Hey... don't be so sure of your success! This last trial will be a challenging one! ｜ 先…先别那么乐观！最后一环试炼可是很难的！
- Here, allow me to show you. ｜ 事不宜迟，由我来为你展示一下。
- That's right. It was my choice. ｜ 没错，我是自愿的。
- ...Perhaps one shall quash Liyue first, then convene with the other adepti— ｜ 不…不如本仙这就去先镇压了璃月港，再等群仙并至——

- It's over at last. We can finally breathe easy. ｜ 总算是结束了，可以松口气了…
- Obtain the Ruin machine's core ｜ 拾取遗迹机关的核心
- Dad once said that the sands are like our home. I didn't get it at the time, but now I think I'm beginning to understand... ｜ 老爹曾经说过，黄沙就像家一样。我那时候没法理解，但现在慢慢地也感同身受了…
- I'm afraid she couldn't spill the beans then. ｜ 恐怕是不便透露。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Do you think Yoimiya's dad's poor hearing is related to fireworks?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>He's been making and testing fireworks for many years now, and being exposed to the sound of gunpowder explosions on a daily basis... Paimon can see how that might've worn down his ears...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yikes! Since Yoimiya is inheriting her family business, does that mean she'll have trouble hearing other people in the future, just like her dad?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon won't let that happen! Let's think of some way to help her!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Do you have any suggestions, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... Um...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon could follow Yoimiya around and cover her ears whenever needed...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Then you'd need to leave me.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Without Paimon, you'd lose your guide. Paimon wouldn't leave you like that!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>But... What should we do for Yoimiya...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Actually, she can simply wear earplugs while working with fireworks.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Oh yeah! Paimon didn't think of that solution! You're so smart!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Heh... That was the first thing that came to my mind, but I wanted to give you an opportunity for a mental workout.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Eh? So you knew this whole time, but didn't tell Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>How could you! You bully! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你说，宵宫老爹的听力不好，是不是跟烟花有关啊？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>由于常年制作、试放烟花，每日被火药炸响的声音包围，导致听力变弱…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇！那宵宫继承家业，最后会不会也变得像她老爹那样，听不清人讲话…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不可以不可以，为了避免这种事情发生，要赶快想想办法！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙有什么建议吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果我飞在宵宫后边，一直用手捂住她的耳朵…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那派蒙就不能跟着我了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…没有我的话，你就没有向导了。要我离开你是不可能的！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可是宵宫…该怎么办才好…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>其实，在制作烟火的时候带上耳塞就可以了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对哦，还有这种方法！你真聪明！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嘿…看派蒙这么困扰，我反而有些开心呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？其实你早就想好了办法，却不告诉派蒙吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>怎么这样，你这坏家伙！
- Feel free to come here whenever you have time. But if you're too busy... well... that's okay too. ｜ 以后有空了记得多来转转，没空的话…嗯…也没关系。

- What is this place? ｜ 这里是…
- We later discovered that her exposure to the Abyss had planted seeds of conflict in her heart. So, we started trying to bring it under control... ｜ 后来我们发现，是被深渊侵染的经历，在她心里埋下了「争斗」的种子，开始试着帮她控制…
- Ah. I am presently trying to teach Que'er how to treat people with the proper etiquette. As the saying goes, "Those without credibility have no leg to stand on, and those without etiquette..." ｜ 想必那是因为，敝人正在教师妹学习待人接物的礼仪，正所谓「人无信不立，人无礼…

- A monster from another world that has the power to corrode material. The Rifthound Whelp's attacks can apply stacks of the "Corrosion" status, which will cause all characters in the party to <color=#FFE14BFF>continually lose HP</color>. Additionally, when they take elemental damage from their respective element, Rifthound Whelps will enter an Elemental Devourer state that will allow them <color=#FFE14BFF>to fight more fiercely at the cost of lessened RES to that particular element</color>. ｜ 来自异界的魔物，具有侵蚀事物的能力。兽境幼兽的攻击会施加可叠加的「侵蚀」状态，使队伍中所有角色<color=#FFE14BFF>持续损失生命值</color>。此外，承受对应的元素攻击后，兽境幼兽将进入「嗜魔」状态，<color=#FFE14BFF>以该元素抗性的降低为代价，变得极为凶猛</color>。
- Now, need I remind you of the penalty if anything were to happen to me en route? I'm sure you are all quite familiar with my father's temperament. ｜ 怎么，你们知道家父的脾气，如果我的安全出了闪失，你们要受的责罚恐怕不需要我讲了吧。

- Fatui! ｜ 愚人众！

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Did you know, {NICKNAME}? That Sangonomiya Kokomi, she's Watatsumi Island's Divine Priestess.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> In other words, she's the ruler of Watatsumi Island! The whole of Watatsumi Island is controlled by her.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon also wants to become a big shot like her...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> What will you do after you become a big shot?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Then, Paimon will deliver justice. For example... Ahem.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The suspect in question, known as the Traveler, ate two Dango for lunch and only gave one to the victim, Paimon. This is a serious violation of article thirty seven, "Fairness and Justice," of the "Paimon Decree."\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Oh... may I ask how Your Excellency Paimon plans to resolve this issue?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Of course. As compensation for your wrongdoings, you will have to make even more Dango for Paimon, hee-hee! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你知道吗？那位珊瑚宫心海，可是海祇岛的「现人神巫女」呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>也就是海祇岛的最高领袖！整个海祇岛都归她管哦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>啊，派蒙也想成为那样的大人物…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>成为大人物之后呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>之后就可以伸张正义了呀。比如说…咳咳。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嫌犯{NICKNAME}中午吃三彩团子的时候，自己吃掉了两个，只分给了受害人派蒙一个，严重违反了「派蒙法令」第三十七条——「公平公正」！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那请问派蒙大人打算如何处理此事？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>当然是罚你给派蒙做好多三彩团子啦，嘿嘿！
- Miss Musk, please... Be careful... ｜ 马斯克小姐，小心…
- Not all of them... Or should I say, not all of us. ｜ 不是所有哦…严格来说，是「除我以外」。
- Hey, where are you off to now? ｜ 啊，你又要去哪里呀？
- If she isn't... Our adventures... their meaning... Al, Petit Chou, and the others... ｜ 要不然的话，我们的冒险，所有的意义…阿尔、小卷心菜他们…
- I think maybe the journey took it out of him, or perhaps he caught a cold on the way... Anyway, I was about to take him to Bubu Pharmacy to see the doctor, so I asked Chef Mao to watch the store while I'm gone. ｜ 可能是舟车劳顿，染了风寒。我便想托卯师傅替我照看一下铺子，好送他去不卜庐瞧大夫。
- What!? Why didn't you say so earlier? ｜ 什么？！为什么不早说！
- Eremite Mercenary ｜ 镀金旅团成员
- *sigh*... Miners like us live off a poor salary. After spending most of it on supporting the family, I ain't got much left. Then, there was this doll that cost a fortune. ｜ 唉…我们这些下矿的，本来就赚得少，大部分也都用来补贴家用了，存下来的不多，买这个娃娃还花了不少。

- "They will descend upon the 'Cliff of Prophecy'..."\n\nThus would the epics of later generations speak of this time:\nThe heroes leaped light of foot o'er floral cliffs, trials and tribulations besting forthwith. By their arm they brought forth rain and dew, the dark clouds fled, and flowers grew.\n\nComment in the margins: You forgot to mention how popular the forest tavern was.\nComment below the comment: Wait, did all of you think the wine was good? I thought it tasted kinda weird.\nComment below the comment below the comment: That might be because someone put... into your cup... (the following words are scratched out) ｜ 「其将于『预言之崖』降临…」\n\n于是后世的史诗如此记述——\n勇者轻足跃芳崖，巧解碍难化纷杂。伊人臂弯化甘霖，愁云散尽木生花。\n\n书卷旁的批注：你忘了提那森林里的酒馆有多热闹。\n批注下的批注：话说你们都觉得那酒好喝吗？我怎么觉得一股怪味道？\n批注下批注的批注：那可能是因为有人往你杯里放了…（后面的文字被涂掉了）

Deals <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n投掷在碰撞后会爆炸的好东西！进行至多三段的炸弹攻击，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，短暂咏唱后，轰击敌人，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚烈焰的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。

- You have reached the current maximum Gathering Score you can attain. You will not be able to score any more from challenges. Continue? ｜ 当前获取的聚集评分已达上限，进行挑战将无法获得更多聚集评分，是否继续？
- When I first started working as a journalist, I didn't know anything about how to write the news, so I had to figure it all out for myself by reading articles by other people. As well as The Steambird, I also looked at some other independent publications out there, which tend to be more specialized. For example, there's "The Observer" for celebrity gossip, "Leisure Weekly," which focuses on competitive sport and other entertainment news, "Top Chef" for those who like to read... all the food critiques in one place, and "Bedazzled!" which is just sort of a glorified rumor and speculation mill. I learned a whole lot from reading all those papers. Or... Well, I at least learned how to master a bunch of different writing styles. ｜ 刚做记者的时候，我对写报道文章一窍不通，只能通过阅读其他报道来学习。除了《蒸汽鸟报》之外，还有一些在小范围印发的私人刊物。比如专门报道枫丹廷内各种明星八卦的《观窥者报》、持续关注各种娱乐活动和赛事的《娱乐家周刊》、评论美食的《主厨》、只会胡说八道和造谣传谣的《惊奇！》等等。\n这些报纸都给了我很大的启发，让我学会了…嗯，驾驭许多不同的行文风格。

---
### Part 065

- Wow... How the heck did you get him to stay for treatment after dropping all of that on him? ｜ 哇…他听到这样的诊断后，真的会乖乖接受治疗吗？
- Certainly. I assume you two already know that the Irodori Festival originated from The Five Kasen. These five boards are here for painting their portraits. ｜ 你们两个应该已经知道容彩祭来源于五歌仙，这五块展板，正是为了绘制他们的画像设置的。
- Exactly. They want to look down on us? Haha, we'll look down on them first! ｜ 就是啊，他瞧不起我们，我们还瞧不起他呢，哈哈哈。
- Feather of Homecoming ｜ 归乡之羽
- Huh. This place seems in good order. ｜ 这个地方看起来不错。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- It's alright, relax. I'm just here to look around. I'm having a change of pace today. ｜ 没关系，不用多礼，今天我是来转换心情，随便看看而已。
- Too fast, please try again later. ｜ 操作过快，请稍后再试
- Thank you, Sir... Oh, but this is too generous... ｜ 好的，啊先生这太多了…
- A firework that explodes in the shape of a Floating Hydro Fungus.\nThey say that a Ministry of Civil Affairs clerk offered the inspiration for this rotund firework pattern after returning from a business trip in Sumeru, hoping that its adorable appearance would brighten everyone's heart. ｜ 「浮游水蕈兽」造型的创意烟花。\n据称，一位曾出差至须弥的总务司文员为烟花工匠提供了建议，共同设计了这种圆滚滚的烟花，希望它的可爱造型能让人们心情愉快。
- The contract is fulfilled. That which thou seeketh is now bestowed unto thee, for my promise is solid as stone. ｜ 「契约」已成，如你所求，赐汝应许之物。
- It seems Mt. Qingce is hiding some secrets... ｜ 轻策山中，似乎藏匿着什么秘密…
- The trader who was negotiating with Bolai leaves... ｜ 与博来谈价的商人离开了…
- Don't worry. This matter is only between you and I... and my new friend here. No one else will know of it. ｜ 放心放心，这件事天知地知你知我知，还有我这位朋友知，不会再有别人了。
- But if you hand me a spear, I think the old muscle-memory will kick in. ｜ 但我拿枪的技术，身体应该还记得一些。
- No news is good news. ｜ 没消息就是好消息嘛。
- Kano Nana ｜ 鹿野奈奈
- Shh... Not here, too many people listening, haha. Let's move somewhere else. ｜ 嘘…人多耳杂，我们换个地方聊，哈哈。
- But if I leave now, I'm leaving evil spirits to their own devices. ｜ 但现在离开的话，岂不是放任妖邪存世而不顾？
- As you can see, I'm a Forest Watcher here. As for my name, it's Rana. ｜ 如二位所见，我是这边的巡林官。名字嘛，叫拉娜。
- That's right. According to Aranakula, Vanarana remembers everything, so the Viparyas can sprout in the garden once the land remembers them again. ｜ 对哦，兰那库拉说过，因为桓那记得一切，所以只要大地重新记起，苗圃就会生出毗波耶啦。
- You have heretofore been unable to track down the missing man, but you encounter a familiar figure after the creatures of the Abyss Order emerge... ｜ 至今你们依然捕捉不到那位失踪男子的踪迹，但在深渊教团的魔物出现以后，你们见到了另一个熟悉的身影…
- Ah, it's you two. Sango sent me here to do some preliminary investigations, saying that you would arrive shortly. Indeed you have. ｜ 啊，是你们。珊瑚社长让我先过来调查，说你们晚点就会过来。果然如此。

- I didn't think that she'd be willing to help strangers like us. If it hadn't been for all of you, Lynette and I wouldn't have been acquitted... Thank you so much. I'll have to wait for a lovely, sunny day to invite everyone to Café Lutece for the most wonderful afternoon tea! ｜ 没想到她在不认识我的情况下愿意出手相助。要是没有你们的话，我和琳妮特肯定无法脱身…总之，非常感谢你们。就请让我等待一个阳光灿烂的日子，邀请大家去露泽咖啡厅吃最美味的茶点吧。
- Is that so surprising? I'm always getting invitations to do solo performances... I just usually get Lyney to write back and turn them down. But then came the Fontinalia Film Festival... ｜ 很意外吗？我经常收到各种单独出演的邀请…虽然以前都让林尼回信拒绝了。直到前不久的千灵映影节…
- You return to Jarjar's side together with Sorush, who is still unaware of the situation... ｜ 和不知情的斯露莎一起回到了贾尔贾身边…
- At first, I was quite overwhelmed. But as my memories returned, I came to know where I was from, and I understood my duty. ｜ 一开始，我相当不知所措。但随着记忆复苏，我已经掌握了自己的生世，也明白自己的职责了。
- Mona: Friendly ｜ 莫娜·友好
- Great. And thanks to you for a smooth and pleasant journey, Mr. Wheel. ｜ 嗯，也谢谢威尔先生平稳的驾驶技术。

- Food that Thoma has prepared for the stray cats and dogs. A slightly fishy smell wafts off it. ｜ 托马为流浪猫猫准备的食物，闻起来有淡淡的鱼腥味。
- Mhm. Here, please take this picture book with you. The Madame wanted you to have it. If, at some point in the future, you were to run into someone with similar troubles, she hopes the book would be of use to you. ｜ 嗯，还有这绘本请收下吧，是夫人留给你们的，以防万一，万一以后谁遇上了同样的问题，她希望这个能陪你们共渡难关。

- Yasmin! Wah! ｜ 雅丝敏姐姐！呜哇！
- Making the stuffing requires Pyro Slime Condensate, and the red dye used to grab the enemies' attention can be made from crushed Valberries. ｜ 制作充填物，需要用到火史莱姆的凝液；吸引敌人注意用的红色颜料，可以用捣碎的落落莓…

- Sometimes, "it" recalls, as if in a dream, travels it once embarked on alongside two companions when the land was still tangible. ｜ 有时「它」会做梦般想起许多，想起很久以前曾与两位伙伴在仍具实体的大地上旅行的往事。
- I woke up and found myself covered in blood. My things were gone and there was nothing to indicate who I was or how I got there. ｜ 当我醒来的时候，身上全是血。就连行李也丢了，没有能够证明身份的东西。
- Those Ruin Guards have all been strung up. Where are they being taken to? ｜ 遗迹守卫都被吊起来了，要送到哪儿去呢？
- There's more than one answer to that question. ｜ 你的这个问题，我可有好多答案呢。
- Listen to me, boy. If you want your Mora, fine — why don't you come and take it? ｜ 给我听好了，小子，我们现在就要还钱！你给我过来！
- I trust you know of the winery's former owner, Master Crepus? He was Diluc's father. ｜ 您应该知道前老板克利普斯老爷吧，就是迪卢克老爷的父亲。
- Huh, could it be because we're outlanders and we've only just arrived in Sumeru? You know, maybe we're not qualified to receive an answer to this sort of question or something? ｜ 唔，会不会因为我们是刚刚来到须弥的外国人，所以没有资格得到这个问题的答案？
- Hello. ｜ 你好。
- Sometimes we've got all these Saurians trying to land on the same flat patch of land at the same time, which is pure chaos. ｜ 有时会有好几只龙同时看上一片适合降落的平地，那场面可真是混乱啊。
- He didn't even look at me when he said those things. ｜ 他说的时候甚至没有多看我一眼！

- Don't beat yourself up. ｜ 不必这么自责。

- Huh? The Court of Desolation has... ｜ 归寂之庭…

- The guards at the crossing up ahead said they hadn't seen anyone, either, so we don't believe he was heading towards the Guili Plains... But it is possible that he was bound for Luhua Pool. ｜ 把守前方路口的兄弟们也说没有见过，不像是往归离原去了…难不成，是跑去渌华池了？

- Now that we've finished all the chores, it's time to talk to the Imatanis about Sakujirou. ｜ 事情都干完啦，那我们回去找他们聊正事吧。
- A large Brightcrown with extra milk, please. ｜ 大杯的明冠，记着奶多一点。
- I couldn't care what you think. Come on then, I'd like to see what he's up to anyway. ｜ 无所谓你怎么想，走吧，我也顺路去看看他在干什么。
- We are entrusted by the people to loyally see out their wishes. Wangsheng Funeral Parlor is special, in that it carries a dual responsibility, to those both of this realm, and the next. ｜ 受人之托，忠人之事。我们往生堂性质特殊，肩负着双倍责任，所以，一定要让两个世界的人都满意才行。

- About your sister... ｜ 关于你的妹妹…

- We've taken too long, this food's gone cold... ｜ 拖太长时间，这道菜都凉透了…
- In mother and father's wine, I can smell Dandelion Seeds, but I don't know what else. ｜ 爸爸妈妈的酒里，蒲公英籽以外，不知道。

- Have you heard of the martial arts of Liyue? I've heard people can fly from rooftop to rooftop and run up walls, harden their skin so weapons can't pierce them, and even split iron like it was kindling! ｜ 你们听说过璃月的武学吗？据说能让人飞檐走壁，刀枪不入，削铁如泥！

- No, this isn't nearly as precious as you seem to think. Were you to take it to Association headquarters for appraisal, it'd clock in at around 5,000 Mora at most. ｜ 不，这东西并没有你想的那么珍贵。拿去龙遗物研究协会总部鉴定的话，根据我的判断，充其量也就值五千摩拉。
- ...That is nothing too remarkable. The road to fame and stardom upon which we two brothers tread is yet long, and we will certainly make even more popular films in the future. ｜ …那也不足为奇，我们兄弟作为影人的道路还很长，以后会拍出更多家喻户晓的映影。
- The Harbingers? They're way above my pay grade. I'm lucky if I hear the odd rumor. ｜ 执行官大人们…我这种小角色，也顶多是听说一点传闻。
- What are you doing? ｜ 你在干什么？
- Trust me, your story will be a thing of honor in Fontaine — indeed, in all of Teyvat! ｜ 相信我，您的故事一定能够享誉枫丹！啊不，享誉提瓦特！
- A heavy blade that people claim was beloved by the hero known as the Firethief. They say that even the Lord of Cinder Keep's flames could not burn it away. ｜ 人称「窃火者」的英杰爱用的重剑，据说就连烬城之王的烈火也未能将其焚断。
- An ancient affliction singular to Sumeru.\nIt is named for the dark, hardened scales that form on the bodies of those suffering from its effects. ｜ 须弥独有的古老病症。\n以患者体表出现的灰黑色鳞状结构而得名。

- You do it. ｜ 你来吧。
- At this point, we can only try our luck and see how we fare. ｜ 事到如今，我们也只能碰碰运气了。

- What's new? Anything to report? ｜ 最近有发生什么事吗？

- Special delivery from Iris... ｜ 关于玉霞送过来的东西…
- Ahem, it's really no biggie. No one got hurt. ｜ 哎呀都是一些小问题啦，也没有人因此受伤。
- ...Playtime is over. ｜ 不能去玩…
- Would either of you entertain the possibility of working with me in the future, and taking on some of my workload? ｜ 不知两位是否愿意留在我身旁，帮我分担一些工作？
- Ooh, someone's a scaredy-cat. ｜ 大调酒师胆子真小。
- The guards here, it seems they're off duty throughout the night. ｜ 而且这里的守卫，似乎在夜里就会下班了。
- And whenever I play that tune... it always reminds me of her. I start wondering what she would think of the changes I've made to her melody... ｜ 每每弹起这曲子的时候，总免不了想到她。也不知我改编的旋律，她会怎么看。
- Mark Sacred Seals ｜ 标记「圣章石」

- Whatever. It's in the past now, anyway. ｜ 算了，过去就过去了。

- If you fail to do so, then you will receive the due punishment. Have you made up your mind? ｜ 倘若你回答不出来，那就要接受相应的惩罚。做好觉悟了吗？
- Although I cannot accompany you on your journey, I will help in another way. I will pass on my years of fishing experience and knowledge to you. ｜ 虽然我没法加入，但我会用另一种方式支持你们，我要把我的钓鱼技巧与宝贵经验全部传授给你。

- You mean that weird rock? Well, it did fall from the sky, all right. Strange as it is, though, it doesn't seem to be dangerous. ｜ 你是说那块奇怪的石头吧？那的确是从天上掉下来的东西。虽然怪得很，但似乎也没什么害处。
- Is that so? Wow...that's quite a coincidence, hahaha. ｜ 是这样吗？那还真是…真是巧了，哈哈哈。
- The Desert Will Guide You Home (I) ｜ 大漠引路人·其一
- Anyway... Let's get to testing that product, shall we? ｜ 嗯…言归正传，我们还是快点开始试用新品吧。
- But who knows what it's like inside... Let's proceed with caution! ｜ 不过不知道里面是什么样子…小心谨慎地前进吧，嗯！
- It appears that the little one desires to be slothful again. ｜ 小派蒙又想偷懒咯。
- Then again, now I think about it, even though we could find some ingredients on the ground, we'll need some time to think of a good location. ｜ 但仔细想想…就算食材可以就地取用，合适的地点一下子也想不出来。
- *sigh* That being said, I've only had it once. ｜ 唉，不过我也只喝过那一次啦。
- Th—That's just a coincidence! ｜ 这…这都只是巧合！
- The Acting Grand Master of the Knights is also known as the Dandelion Knight, as I recall. ｜ 那位，骑士团的代理团长琴大人，好像就叫蒲公英骑士哦。
- Traveler, please send a message to Ms. Niloofar for me. I'll write you a note. I don't want to go back, please... ｜ 旅行者，你…你帮我给妮露法老师带个话…我…我给你写个便签…我真的不想回去了，饶了我吧…
- Ah, it's fine, really. This kind of thing happens all the time, I'll be fine. Thank you. ｜ 没事没事，这种程度的情况我经常遇到，不要紧的，谢谢你啦。
- Unfortunately, without any storied origin, this one's price falls a great deal. But it's of good quality. I'm sure someone would want it nonetheless. ｜ 可惜了，没点来头，这价钱得低不少。不过这戒指的品相不错，单卖出去也肯定有人要。
- No problem. I've got a few of those guys all ready to go! I just knew you wouldn't be intimidated into withdrawing from this year's show. ｜ 没问题，早安排好了！我就知道你不会放弃参加这次时装周！
- That's why we have to study "Temari Jutsu" and help her in future! ｜ 所以我们要研究「手鞠术」，以后给她帮忙！
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After your character receives DMG:</color> Attach 1 stack of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122]</color> to the character who took DMG and the opponent's $[A1314].\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 5</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色受到伤害后：</color>我方受到伤害的角色和敌方$[A1314]均附属1层<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122]</color>。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：5</color>
- Thanks for the kind words, but I don't need special treatment! ｜ 说得好！但我不用特殊对待！
- An ancient timepiece with a mighty solid look. Its luster is produced by sand crystal. ｜ 外观坚实的古代时计，有着晶砂的光泽。
- Hey there Bona! Paimon's glad to see you're okay! ｜ 嘿嘿，玻娜，看到你没事真是太好了！

- Her Pilgrimage of Bleak ｜ 皇女幻绮谭

- #Meet {F#Aether}{M#Lumine}. ｜ #与{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_YING|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_KONG]}相会
- You have to stand as firm as a mountain and burn as bright as a raging fire. That's the gold standard for any army, don't you think? ｜ 所谓不动如山，燎原如火。这才是最完美的军势吧？
- Then let's go and meet the Corps of Thirty... ｜ 那我们去见见三十人团…
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Ley Line Overflow: Event Rules</color>\nDuring the event, using Original Resin once to revitalize Blossoms of Revelation and Blossoms of Wealth will result in multiplied rewards.\n\nLey Line Overflow has the following limitations:\n·Using Condensed Resin will not produce these multiplied rewards.\n·A limited number of bonus rewards can be claimed per day. The maximum number of opportunities to claim bonus rewards and the remaining number of claimable bonus rewards are displayed on the Ley Line Overflow event page.\n·Sometimes, the Blossoms of Revelation and Blossoms of Wealth that offer this bonus are region-restricted. The applicable region can also be viewed from the Ley Line Overflow event page.\n·In cases where bonus reward opportunities from Ley Line Overflow and Stellar Reunion are both available at the same time, the opportunity with the greater multiplier will be consumed. If both have the same multiplier, the bonus reward opportunity granted by Stellar Reunion will be consumed first. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【地脉移涌·活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，使用「原粹树脂」激活完成「地脉衍出·启示之花」与「地脉衍出·藏金之花」后的地脉之花时，可以消耗一次「原粹树脂」获得多次的产出。\n\n「地脉移涌」活动具有如下限制：\n·使用「浓缩树脂」时，无法获得此活动提供的额外产出。\n·每日能获得的多次产出机会有限，可用的剩余机会与机会上限以「地脉移涌」活动界面中的条目为准。\n·有时，适用多次产出的地脉衍出·启示之花与地脉衍出·藏金之花会具有区域限制。若存在具体适用区域，以「地脉移涌」活动界面中的条目为准。\n·「地脉移涌」与「星之归还」活动的额外产出同时生效时，获取符合条件且适用的多次产出时，优先消耗倍率更高的机会；倍率相同时，优先消耗「星之归还」活动提供的机会。
- "Childe" Tartaglia ｜ 「公子」·达达利亚

- Meeting by the Wharf ｜ 码头偶遇
- That's the one! ｜ 就是它了！
- Normal Attack and Charged Attack hits increase ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> and Normal ATK SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color> for 6s. Max 4 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. ｜ 普通攻击与重击命中时，提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>攻击力与<color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color>普通攻击速度。该效果持续6秒，最多可以叠加4层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。
- Whoa, looks like Jean wasn't the only one waiting for us. Klee and Kaeya are here, too... ｜ 哇，出现在这里的人比我想象中要多…竟然还有小可莉和凯亚…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- What do you think? Do you have any interest in working at Bantan Sango? ｜ 如何？有没兴趣来「万端珊瑚」就职？
- A monster once cornered an adventurer, but was then picked off by a hunting eagle... That eagle dropped this feather, which now carries some of the adventurer's good luck. ｜ 挡在面前的魔物却被捕食的鹰隼盯上，偶尔能带来这种程度运气的翎羽。
- Oh, come now, we were just making analogies, and you know what they say — there's no such thing as a perfect analogy. And well, the things we described do happen! After all, you will not find Beryl Conches in Conch Madeleines, will you? ｜ 哎呀，只是个比喻而已，比喻难免有点失真…而且我说的那种情况也不是没有，晶螺糕里不就没有晶螺吗？
- From the reactions of the illusions of the past you see on the island, destroying the Perch seems to have had some effect. Well, then. One down, three to go. ｜ 从鹤观昔日的幻影的反应来看，破坏「栖木」似乎真的能起作用。那么，一鼓作气将其他三棵「栖木」也破坏掉吧。
- So listen to me and always keep Sumeru roses in the house. ｜ 所以听我的，家中一定要常备须弥蔷薇。
- But in reality, everyone starts from a different baseline. So, I design regimens that account for different circumstances. ｜ 其实每个人的情况都不一样，我指定的运动计划也必须随之做出改变。

- ...In the new world, they bade farewell to the shrouded sun. ｜ …在新的世界，他们告别蒙尘的太阳，
- Wait until two days later (08:00 – 14:00) ｜ 等到两天后（8-14点）
- Right! If there's something you wanna eat, you could just order it from the menu! ｜ 对啊，如果只是想吃东西，店里应该直接可以点菜吧！
- #Yeah! Plus you won't be alone — we're joining too! {NICKNAME}'s a really good writer, y'know! ｜ #嗯！到时候我们也会加入！{NICKNAME}可是很能写的！
- I was forced to do this in order to make a living. My hands were tied. ｜ 我都是…都是被逼的…为了生计，只能另寻他路…
- Nadia ｜ 娜蒂亚
- Chasing tanuki through the woods, and climbing trees to hunt for onikabuto... ｜ 像是在林间追逐狸猫，上树捕捉鬼兜虫…
- Otherwise, some old fool would start nagging me, and what would I do then? ｜ 不然，又不知道要招哪个老顽固的念叨。
- Alright then... ｜ 好吧…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- We are short on manpower, after all. In short, if you encounter any Fatui, Treasure Hoarders, Kairagi, or any of their ilk... Feel free to teach them a lesson. ｜ 毕竟人手不够嘛…所以您在下面如果遇到愚人众、盗宝团、海乱鬼之类的，请毫不犹豫地把他们教训一顿吧。
- Complete the Draconic Pilgrimage challenge 5 times without accumulating more than 20% Sheer Cold ｜ 在严寒累积不超过20%的情况下，完成 5 次「龙之巡礼」挑战
- Xinyue Kiosk provides the best, authentic Yue-Style cuisine with freshly-caught seafood and a light soup to entertain our taste buds. ｜ 新月轩乃月菜正宗，独一无二。以纯鲜海味为骨，辅以清淡高汤，以飨食客。

- Here's your payment. ｜ 这是报酬，您收好了。
- Goodbye! If you meet my son, please tell him to come home once in a while! ｜ 再见，如果见到我儿子盖伊，帮我跟他说，让他有空回来看看~！
- Really? Can I? ｜ 欸？真的可以吗？
- Dropped by mitachurls ｜ 丘丘暴徒掉落
- Surely you're not planning to... ｜ 你该不会是打算…

- That... That's right! Sister Sorush has always taken good care of me... ｜ 没…没错！以前斯露莎姐姐可是很照顾我的！
- (Ah, these two. As expected, they've already found this place. They're quite sharp.) ｜ #（…是这两位。果然，{M#他们}{F#她们}很敏锐，找到这里来了。）
- He does seem a little suspicious... ｜ 感觉他有点可疑…
- Babel, I appreciate your help all throughout this time... Though I'm well aware of the fact that I'm the daughter of a traitor and an outsider. ｜ 芭别尔，一直以来我很感谢你的照顾…即使我明白，自己出自叛徒和外人的血脉。
- Arasaka ｜ 兰萨卡
- True... Outsiders are becoming increasingly active in the desert, and as their interference increases, so too do changes of heart and thought. ｜ 嗯…现在外人在沙漠的活动越来越频繁，部族内部渐渐也有了异心…外人的干涉越来越多，人心思变了。
- It's a huge undertaking... ｜ 这也太费工费力了…
- Yeah, but don't forget we're the chosen ones. ｜ 我们是被选中的人嘛。
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Energy Amplifier Initiation" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「导能原盘·绪论」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Yes. It may take some time and trouble, but I'm sure that you will reveal the truth in the end. ｜ 嗯，或许会费一些周折。但我相信，是您的话，一定能够让真相水落石出。

- ...Very well. Let's go. ｜ …嗯，走吧。

- It's your home, after all, you should be the one to shape it! ｜ 这才是你的家，才有你的样子！

- Fujin's Voice ｜ 浮锦的声音
- Luxurious Sea-Lord ｜ 衔珠海皇
- We've seen similar things before, haven't we? Who knew that someone else would be so interested in them, eh? ｜ 我们之前也曾经探索过差不多的遗迹吧，没想到也有其他人也对这些遗迹感兴趣。
- Ah... Another new soul has joined this world. ｜ 这世界又多了一位新成员呢。
- Administrator, Maritime Authority ｜ 码头管理员
- Simulanka's Evil Dragon ｜ 希穆兰卡的「邪龙」
- *yawn* So sleepy... My master, did you wake me to speak with this servant? *sigh* Why do you love consorting with these coarse folk so... ｜ 哈啊…好困…我的大人，你叫醒我就是因为这个奴才想要见我吗？唉…为什么你这么喜欢跟粗鄙的沙漠人混在一起…
- We're... on the shore? And there's a camp here. ｜ 我们…到海边了？还有个营地…
- Thanks, friend. ｜ 好朋友，谢了。
- Ah! I nearly lost my life at that time. The ocean is like a beautiful woman, only a welcoming sight every so often... ｜ 哎呀，当年那趟出海，我可是差点没命呢。大海呢，就像美女，偶尔见见就好啦…
- (She's strong. I can't rush this. Just like the Traveler said, I need to observe my opponent and look for an opportunity...) ｜ #（她好像很强，这时候不能急。要记住{NICKNAME}的话，观察对手，寻找机会…）
- Radish and Fish Stew ｜ 鲜鱼炖萝卜
- A broken hourglass from which all the sand has escaped. But it's fine, because the passage of time means nothing to someone without a single worry in the whole world. ｜ 因为破洞而空空如也的沙漏。时光流逝对无忧无虑的人没有意义。
- After using an Elemental Skill, increases Normal and Charged Attack DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> for 12s. Max 2 stacks. ｜ 施放元素战技后，普通攻击和重击造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>。该效果持续12秒，最多叠加2层。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- I'm Candace, the guardian of Aaru Village. I'm trying to learn more about the robbery that took place this morning. ｜ 我是阿如村的守护者，坎蒂丝，想来了解一下今早发生的劫案。
- "Got some skills, huh... This time around, let's say the loser has to buy the winner a glass of Dandelion Wine. Deal?"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Rosaria" starts with the Talent Card "Divine Retribution" equipped.</color> ｜ 「你的牌技不错啊？这一局，输了的就请赢了的喝杯蒲公英酒？」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「罗莎莉亚」初始装备有天赋牌「代行裁判」。</color>
- Uchimura ｜ 内村
- It's just that they were supposed to ripen over the last two days... and yet, as you can see, they're still all green and blue. No signs of maturing at all. ｜ 只是这两天明明应该是「山王火榴」成熟的时节，结果还是青青蓝蓝的，一点要成熟的迹象都没有。
- We can fry on a slab of stone and cook using some boar fat. Build a stove from rocks, use dry grass for kindling, twigs for firewood... ｜ 锅用岩板，油用刚刚猎到的野猪的油，搬石头堆成灶，木头和茅草生旺火。
- Antiquity Hunt ｜ 「究古考察」
- *whimper* ｜ 呜…
- Little Rose ｜ 小玫瑰
- To be honest, I haven't given you full disclosure either. I did commission other people before sending you. ｜ 其实，我也没有对你们完全坦白。在你们之前，我委托过其他的人。
- A courtyard wall structure that is often found at the corners, forming a connection between the two wall sections. It is said that the abundance of Chenyu Vale is due to the meandering waterways of the environment and that the ancestors saw the surging waves as symbols of stability, and the leaping fish as symbols of the fertility of the land. Thus the shapes of both waves and fish became common for walls. More than just decorations, they represent a desire for prosperity and calm. ｜ 可见于沉玉谷的院墙结构，通常出现在院落的拐角，作为两段院墙的连接点。传说，沉玉谷富足的物产与谷中蜿蜒且发达的水系息息相关，先民们视翻涌的波浪为安定的象征，以灵动的游鱼为富饶的图腾。因此在沉玉谷，人们喜欢以「波浪」和「游鱼」形状构筑墙壁，不仅是为了装饰，也是为了繁荣和安定的寓意。
- Oh... I almost forgot. Please don't spread the word about this location. ｜ 啊…另外，也烦请客人不要大肆宣传此事。
- Was that the former Dendro Archon? She became so tiny in the end... ｜ 那是前代草神吗…她最后变得好小…
- Supporting Cast ｜ 助演角色
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Liuli Pavilion Sandbearer Floor Lamp.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「琉璃亭却砂木立灯」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- He's in a league of his own in this job — he can do face reading! As in, he can tell instantly if you're someone to worry about, just by looking at you. Most I can do is ask a bunch of questions. ｜ 因为他比我厉害多了，他会看相，能一眼看出谁是坏人，而我只能挨个盘问。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Well, I'll need them to research new recipes, so please pass them to me once you've gathered them all. ｜ 那你搜集齐了之后，就快点带来给我吧，我要快点开始研究菜品了。
- If you truly wish to repay the favor, you can keep this a secret. If anyone asks, just say you were saved by warriors from Natlan. ｜ 如果说到报答，我们唯一希望的，就是不要和其他人提及我们的事，就说你们是受到了纳塔战士的帮助。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Cannot interact while indwelling a Saurian ｜ 魂附状态下无法进行交互
- If I want to become a member of the Liyue Qixing, this work-rate is just what is expected of me, isn't it? ｜ 想要成璃月七星的一员，这种程度的努力难道不是理所当然的吗？
- The Meaty Tribe hilichurl camp is as rowdy as ever, as their celebratory preparations are going better. Use the Eye of Upano mounted on the Strange Samachurl Statue to infiltrate their camp and find the truth! ｜ 「好肉族」丘丘人的营地一样欢腾喧闹，那些家伙的庆祝活动似乎准备得更为顺利。充分利用神秘丘丘萨满雕像上的「乌帕诺之眼」，再度潜入丘丘人们的营地，探查实情吧！
- After all, creating an Ancient Name is quite the complicated process... ｜ 毕竟，打造「古名」这件事本身就不那么简单嘛…
- Can it what? ｜ 也才能？
- What's that in his hand? ｜ 咦？它手里拿着的是什么？
- Give that silver tongue of yours a rest. You might need it to maintain public order at the festival. ｜ 油嘴滑舌对我没用，你那条舌头还是留着维护节日秩序吧。
- Exactly, hence the urgency. ｜ 嗯~嗯~就是这样，如查尔斯先生所说。
- After a while, you and Paimon arrive at the Lil' Fungi's Fun-Tastic Fiesta booth... ｜ 一段时间后，你与派蒙来到了「小小灵蕈大幻戏」的摊位前…
- Complete the stage "All-Round Trial IV" in the "Adventurer's Trials: Metamorphosis" event ｜ 在「冒险家试炼·蜕变篇」活动中，成功通过关卡「全能试炼·其四」
- Windtrace Coin bonus for Rebels captured ｜ 捕获游侠次数的「迷踪币」加成
- But Paimon only sees one person there. ｜ 可是那里只有一个人啊。
- Sit down and play. ｜ 想打就快坐下。
- Maybe next time... ｜ 下次再说…
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- No surer evidence could there be of your true feelings and your commitment. If I had any reservations before, I certainly don't now. ｜ 能看到您有如此态度与决心，我再无忧虑了。
- What? There weren't any before. What's going on? ｜ 啥？！之前还没有呢？这到底是怎么回事！
- Relax, Paimon, you're pretty mature. ｜ 行吧，你还挺成熟的。
- Okay... But wait, we're here to make that annoying researcher, Soheil, apologize. He'll laugh at us if we head back now! ｜ 好，回去…不，等等，我们是为了让那个讨厌的学者索赫尔认错才来的，现在回去，一定会被他嘲笑的！
- #So Benben's the type that's drawn to something similar to itself, huh? {NICKNAME}, no wonder they say you're an experienced adventurer — you observe everything in such detail. ｜ #原来奔奔是会被和自己相似的东西吸引的类型啊！{NICKNAME}不愧是经验丰富的冒险家呢，果然观察细致入微。
- #What? {NICKNAME}, where are you going... ｜ #咦？{NICKNAME}，你要去哪…
- Good Evening ｜ 晚上好…
- It's so lonely here... Let's offer some flowers, shall we? ｜ 孤零零地太可怜了…我们在墓前放些鲜花吧？
- Charged Attack Cyclic DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 重击循环伤害|{param5:F1P}
- In addition, the Tumor of the Withering will exhort Disciples of Decay to come forth and attack. These are monsters who have utterly fallen under the influence of the Withering, and have the protection of the Withering against DMG. <color=#FFE14BFF>Use Dendro or Dendrograna</color> to effectively destroy the shields guarding these monsters... ｜ 除此之外，在「死域瘤」感知危机时，有时会驱役「凋零使徒」进行攻击。这些是受死域彻底支配的魔物，并且有死域的防护抵挡伤害。<color=#FFE14BFF>利用草元素或草种子的力量</color>，可以高效地破坏这些魔物的护盾…
- I have said enough, I believe. ｜ 我已经说得够多了。
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- Active Character ｜ 出战角色
- A little awkward, but Paimon'll take it... ｜ 好别扭啊…
- We need a shopkeeper, a chef, an artist, a circus performer... ｜ 需要有售货员、大厨、画家、马戏团成员…
- {0} / {1} already exist in this world ｜ 当前世界已存在{0} / {1}个
- Anyway, I'm glad I could help. ｜ 能帮到你就好。
- Let's carry on, my dear friend. ｜ 继续狩猎吧，亲爱的朋友。
- Is it really? It looks, uh, kinda cheap. ｜ 那个吗？看起来…还挺便宜的。
- Elemental Skill: V ｜ 元素战技·其五
- Is something the matter? ｜ 怎么了？
- Gain 1 stack of Canopy's Favor after hitting an opponent with an Elemental Skill. This can be triggered once every 0.5s. After a nearby party member triggers a Burning or Burgeon reaction, the equipping character will gain 3 stacks. This effect can be triggered once every 2s and can be triggered even when the triggering party member is off-field. Canopy's Favor: Elemental Skill and Burst DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color> for 6s. Max 6 stacks. Each stack is counted independently. ｜ 元素战技命中敌人后，会获得1层「悬木祝赐」，该效果每0.5秒至多触发1次；队伍中附近的角色触发了燃烧或烈绽放反应后，装备者会获得3层悬木祝赐，该效果每2秒至多触发1次，队伍中的角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。悬木祝赐：元素战技伤害和元素爆发伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>，持续6秒，至多叠加6层，每层持续时间独立计算。
- Well-Equipped Study ｜ 设施完备的书房
- We will. ｜ 一定。
- Boosts your Electro-Charged blessing. Choose between 2 diverging paths:\n1. Electro-Charged: <color=#b863ee>Basic Driftthunder</color>: While Electrosurge is active, create a <color=#b863ee>Driftthunder Blitzcore</color> that follows the active character, dealing Electro DMG to opponents.\n2. Electro-Charged: <color=#f39001>Basic Thundercloud</color>: While Electrosurge is active, create a <color=#f39001>Thundercloud</color> that randomly uses attacks at intervals: \nI. <color=#b863ee>Thundercloud Strike</color>: Deals Electro DMG to opponents within the AoE, and the active character gains <color=#f39001>{0}</color> Elemental Energy.\nII. <color=#0075de>Thundercloud Rainstorm</color>: Deals Hydro DMG to opponents within the AoE, and the active character is healed for <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> HP. ｜ 强化感电祝福，可选择以下两种分支：\n1.感电·<color=#b863ee>初阶浮雷</color>：电涌效果持续期间，将生成一个跟随当前场上角色的<color=#b863ee>浮雷攻核</color>，对敌人造成雷元素伤害；\n2.感电·<color=#f39001>初阶雳云</color>：电涌效果持续期间，将生成<color=#f39001>雳云</color>，间歇性进行随机攻击：\n其一.<color=#b863ee>雳云落雷</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成雷元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{0}</color>点元素能量；\n其二.<color=#0075de>雳云暴雨</color>：对影响范围内的敌人造成水元素伤害，为当前场上角色恢复<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>生命值。
- That's also why I never spare their feelings when I talk to them. If I wanna laugh, I'll laugh. If I'm angry, then I'll unload on 'em. It's hard to stop once you get used to it, though I can never do that when I'm with the Homayanis. ｜ 所以跟他们说话我也不会留情，该笑就笑，该骂就骂，挺过瘾的，在呼玛伊家可不能这样。
- Phew... we're finally done. How did we do? ｜ 呼…完成啦，这下怎么样？

- He's apparently the sponsor behind the competition prizes and the Diadem of Knowledge. But he hasn't shown himself at all... ｜ 据说「才识之冠」还有比赛的奖金都是他赞助的。不过这个人好像一直没有露面…
- ...I'm sorry, Mr. Sylvain, but... we were too late this time. ｜ …非常抱歉，席尔万先生。这一次…我们来得太迟了。
- Yeah, I should probably get back to work as well... ｜ 嗯，我也该继续工作了…
- Mister Connected ｜ 连接先生
- A young Tepetlisaurus with the ability to tunnel between rocks and solid phlogiston.\nThey have not yet formed the horns on their forehead, and their digging skills are still developing as well. It is even common to hear about young Tepetlisaurs getting trapped by rocks while practicing their digging. However, one day, they will grow into a form that may travel freely through even the toughest of soils. ｜ 年幼的嵴锋龙，拥有在山石与固态燃素中穿梭的能力。\n额前尚未形成钻角，而开掘的技术也不够熟练。甚至经常听闻练习挖掘的幼嵴锋龙被山石困住的事。不过终有一日，能够成长为在坚土中自由穿行的样貌吧。
- After all, it is not uncommon for some adventurers to not want to be limited by the Guild, but be happy to accept a fellow adventurer's requests. ｜ 毕竟有的冒险家虽然不愿意被协会束缚，却很容易接受来自另一位冒险家的邀约。
- It's true! Let me finish... I know how I look now. But I used to work at the Palais Mermonia... ｜ 真是这样的，请听我说完…别看我现在这样子，我以前其实也是在沫芒宫工作的…
- We agreed on a break after every two exercises, didn't we? Remember, to keep training from being too forceful... ｜ 以前我们说好了，两次训练之后必须是休息时间，禁止强制训练。
- Uh oh, what do we do? She's mad for sure... C'mon, we've gotta think of something! ｜ 怎么办，闲云肯定不高兴了呀…快想想办法呀！

- Oi, you! Sneaking around here... Explain yourself! ｜ 说你呢，鬼鬼祟祟的，干什么呢？
- Hehe, bragging loudly, I see. ｜ 呵呵，语气倒是不小嘛。
- FINE! It's only you who cares so much about stupid Lotus Heads anyway! ｜ 不吃就不吃！谁稀罕似的！
- Seriously now. It's almost time, and we can't start without him. ｜ 真是的。时间快到了。明明没有他就不行。

- W—Wait a second. Which are you talking about? The past or the future? ｜ …？喂！到底是以前还是以后啦！
- Due to evolution, sometimes contamination clots will <color=#FFE14BFF>link</color> together with each other. If these connected contamination clots are not all cleansed, previously removed clots will <color=#FFE14BFF>regenerate</color>.\nSome contamination cores will be protected by an <color=#FFE14BFF>impenetrable shell</color>, and the surrounding clots must all be cleansed before the shell is removed and the core can be attacked. ｜ 由于演化，有时污染凝块之间会相互<color=#FFE14BFF>连结</color>。如果不将这些连结的凝块全部快速消除的话，原本消除的凝块也会<color=#FFE14BFF>再次产生</color>。\n有时污染核心还会以<color=#FFE14BFF>无法穿透的保护壳</color>抵御攻击，一般来说需要先清除它周围的污染凝块才能将保护壳消除。
- Here's the thing. You remember my younger sister, Anna, right? She's always been sickly, and nothing's managed to cure her. ｜ 是这样，你还记得我妹妹安娜吧，她一直生着病，之前怎么治也没起色…
- A doll made in the likeness of Xingqiu, capturing his chivalrous spirit and willingness to help others. It is a gift from the "Claw Convoy" organization to thank those who adopt animals.\nTo protect the weak is never a solitary path. ｜ 以行秋为原型制作的玩偶摆件，生动地还原了他乐于助人的侠义之心，是「伴爪同行」组织专为感谢收养小动物的爱心人士所制的赠礼。\n为弱者张目，其道不孤。
- Ah, yes. We'd best get the forms you need, fill them out, then bring them to Mr. Clapiers's office before office hours at the Palais end. ｜ 对了，我们还得赶在沫芒宫的下班时间之前拿到表格，并且完全填写完毕，再拿到克拉佩尔先生的办公室里去。
- Zhongyuan Chop Suey, Grilled Tiger Fish... When Rex Lapis came to visit Chihu Rock back in the day, he too was enticed by the smells of the roadside stalls. ｜ 中原杂碎、烤吃虎鱼…当年岩王爷来吃虎岩巡访，也曾被路边摊位上的香味吸引。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 3 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多三段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- And maybe we can even use this opportunity to make a fortune! ｜ 说不定可以藉此机会大赚一笔呢！
- You asked me this question before. My answer was: "It would literally blow your minds." ｜ 曾经你们问过这个问题，而我的回答是「可能会对你们的精神造成巨大的冲击」。

- That Atsuko, if only she was more well behaved... ｜ 竺子这孩子，真是不让人省心…
- Great youkai... So, he thinks I'm an oni, too? ｜ 「大妖怪」…莫非是把我也当成鬼族了吗？
- Tch... The showmanship's not bad, I'll give her that. ｜ 啧…作为一种炫技的手法，确实还不错。
- The key to dispelling the Withering. ｜ 消除「死域」的关键。
- Are monsters truly evil by nature? ｜ 世间魔物，是否生而为恶？
- Faced with Mizuki's psychological onslaught, the entity controlling Emura Chuuya finally reveals itself. This youkai — known as a "nightmare" — is the ancient enemy of the baku, and the mastermind that must be defeated to solve the current crisis... ｜ 在瑞希的心理攻势下，潜藏在江村中弥背后的存在终于露出了本来面目。这种名为魇的妖怪是食梦貘一族的宿敌，也是解决这次事件必须击败的幕后黑手…
- I... I... I crossed the seas, evading the intercepting Shogunate Dogs, crossed light-years and seas of stars... only to be defeated by this mountain... ｜ 我…我，我躲过了幕府走狗的堵截，跨越了数百光年的星海，没想到竟败在了这座山的手下…
- The power of the Abyss descends upon the world, displaying a rejection of all that is. Targets protected by Void Wards cannot be damaged while defended by it. Only by <color=#FFE14BFF>attacking with Elemental Attacks a certain number of times </color>can it be destroyed. Additionally, Nightsoul-aligned Elemental attacks seem to be able to destroy Void Wards with greater ease... ｜ 深渊的力量降临此世，所展露的拒绝一切的姿态，受虚界力护罩保护的对象在护罩存在期间无法受到任何伤害。只有<color=#FFE14BFF>利用元素攻击到一定次数</color>以后才可突破其防御。此外，具有夜魂性质的元素攻击似乎可以更有效率地将之击破…
- Shovel the Elemental Clots into the Elemental Crucible to push the alchemical process forward. ｜ 将纯元素凝块运输至「原素烘炉」内，推进炼金进程

- Citlali's specialty. The fresh, tender greens are surprisingly crisp, while the grilled shrimp is firm with a hint of sweetness. Is this the unique secret art of Granny Itztli's vast knowledge? ｜ 茜特菈莉的特色料理。新鲜的菜叶脆嫩得出奇，烤虾肉质紧实带有一丝鲜甜，再加上单手就能轻松捏起的完美造型…若是手边再出现一本有趣的小说，搭配如此美味，恐怕能看上一天一夜不停歇吧。这就是黑曜石奶奶博学多识的独门秘法吗？

- After casting an Elemental Skill, gain 1 Succession Seed. This effect can be triggered once every 5s. The Succession Seed lasts for 30s. Up to 3 Succession Seeds may exist simultaneously. After using an Elemental Burst, all Succession Seeds are consumed and after 2s, the character regenerates <color=#99FFFFFF>10.5</color> Energy for each seed consumed. ｜ 施放元素战技后，获得1个胤种，该效果每5秒至多触发一次。胤种持续30秒，至多同时存在3个。施放元素爆发后，会清除持有的所有胤种，并在2秒之后，基于消耗的胤种数量，每个为该角色恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>10.5</color>点元素能量。

- The Akasha has stopped functioning, the city of scholars is no longer fanatical about pursuing knowledge, and the right to dream has been returned to Sumeru's citizenry.\nAll of a sudden, dreams — erstwhile "old friends" that have become novelties — are the talk of the town in Sumeru City.\nEven those poker-faced crocodiles must yawn sometimes. Now is the perfect time to loosen up and listen to their chit-chat! ｜ 「虚空」停止运转，学城对智慧的追求不再狂热，须弥民众也迎回了做梦的权利。\n一时间，梦的话题在须弥城的街头巷尾复苏，大家都对这位曾经的「老朋友」产生了新鲜感。\n就连不苟言笑的鳄鱼都有打哈欠的时候，旅行者也大可放松一下，去听听他们的闲聊吧。
- The noises came from the end of the southern waterway. I came out and had a look for myself when I wasn't sleeping well, but I didn't dare to get too close. ｜ 是南边水道的尽头。我有次睡得浅，出去看过。但没敢走近。

- I'm just an apprentice. I've completed some rough sketches, but there are tons of mistakes. I need to get to a shaded valley or tunnel to carry out a detailed survey. ｜ 我只是个学徒，虽然进行了简单的地图测绘，但是错误很多，要去一些被树木遮掩的幽谷或地道里一一进行勘定。
- Goblet of Chiseled Crag ｜ 巉岩琢塑之樽
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- *sigh* How strong must my desire to sell mushrooms be in order to get a Vision? ｜ 唉，你说卖蘑菇的愿望需要有多强烈，我才有可能获得神之眼呢？
- Being limited by his station and work, Ayato does not often appear in public, nor does he have much time for any sort of leisurely walk. However, these obstacles cannot hinder him from learning of new and interesting things.\nPerhaps in the morning, he might spy one of the Yae Publishing House staff poking her head around the place, seemingly here to "report for work." In which case, he may as well pretend not to notice, all the better to hear what new methods she has for skipping work... and then "accidentally" let slip his newfound knowledge to Guuji Yae.\nIn a meeting with those old fogeys at Tenshukaku, there is no need to speak too quickly. After all, watching grown people argue till they are red in the face over petty issues is quite amusing.\nWhile walking through the streets, he might suddenly consider a certain unique snack stand. Going up to the owner, he'd ask if they are selling anything new, how business is going, buy a drink or two to try... and if he finds it interesting, he'll buy a few back for the rest of the household.\nLately, he also lent some encouragement to the young oni who frequents Hanamizaka due to the latter's bug-fighting troubles — out of the goodness of his heart, of course. He also discovered that this crimson oni did not know what the name "Ayato" signified... which was fine, of course. No need to explain such things.\nOn the way home, he might pass Chinju Forest and see passers-by having tricks played on them by the bake-danuki, in which case he will point the illusion out. If the bake-danuki should hone their changeling skills further on his account, why, they should thank him for the inspiration.\nAnd of course, even one so talented as Thoma might sometimes struggle to think of what to make for dinner. Such occasions are perfect for a hot pot game! After all, Ayaka always puts the most unexpected things into the pot — and how proud he is of his sister for that!\nYes, these things are indeed the spice of the Yashiro Commissioner's life. ｜ 受身份与工作限制，神里绫人不常露面，也没有什么时间用于闲逛。不过，这点阻碍无法影响他了解新鲜事物。\n——晨起练剑有时会看到八重堂的工作人员在门外探头探脑，似乎是又来社奉行「报告工作」。不如假装没看到，听听她这次又想了什么新的翘班理由，以后有机会可以「不经意」地说给八重宫司。\n——去天守阁跟那群老古董开会，不必急于发言。看着这些人一把年纪仍在为小利小益争得面红耳赤，实在有趣。\n——走至町街一带，忽然想起有家另辟蹊径的小吃摊。前去询问摊主是不是又有新食谱，生意是否还过得去，顺道买杯饮料尝尝。要是有意思，也给家人捎几杯回去。\n——最近常在花见坂一带出没的鬼族青年，斗虫技术似乎不佳。出于好心，应当稍加鼓励，重振他的气势。闲聊之间发现这名赤鬼并不知道「绫人」这个名字代表着什么…如此甚好，不必特意解释。\n——回家途经镇守之森，恰好撞见又有行人被妖狸捉弄，忍不住顺手指出幻象。妖狸们若是从此发奋修炼出了更精湛的化形术，可得好好谢谢自己才行。\n——即便是托马这样能干的人，也会有想不出晚饭吃什么的时候。此刻正是提出玩火锅游戏的大好时机！绫华每次都能放进最出人意料的食材，真不愧是自家妹妹。\n如此种种，便是社奉行大人的闲趣所在。
- Wait, will that really be necessary? ｜ 有这个必要吗？
- A Letter in Beautiful Handwriting (III) ｜ 字迹华丽的信·其三
- Granny is actually a very straightforward person. She wears her emotions on her sleeve, you know? It's hard for her to hide what she's feeling. You're the same age as her, right? Or... are you even older?\nSorry, I shouldn't ask. That was probably rude... But, if I'm right, maybe you could spend more time together. Granny's been surrounded by people younger than her for a long time, and she's probably had enough. I know she'll be happy to see you. ｜ 奶奶其实是个很直白的人，高兴或者不高兴都会直接表现出来，也不太擅长掩饰自己的情感。你看上去像是她的同辈，或者…甚至比她更大？\n抱歉，这样好像不太礼貌，我不多问了。但如果真是这样，就请你多和她聊聊天吧，奶奶大概受够了身边都是晚辈，见到你会很开心的。
- Only those who have been to that underground space will be contaminated by the dust, and be able to see the hidden message. But once the dust starts to wear off, the hidden inscription will disappear again. ｜ 只有去过那个地下空间的人才会沾染上这种粉尘，从而看到隐藏的留言。等时效一过，隐藏的文字就会重新消失。
- Alright, regardless of what you're thinking, you did some real good this time. ｜ 好吧，不管你怎么想的，这次你确实立了功。

- But... my image of her was incorrect. ｜ 但…这是不对的。
- Hmph! One would never deride others as a means of praising one's own children. The Wangsheng lass displayed great determination and fortitude. Does that not make her deserving of a few words of praise? ｜ 哼！本仙岂是那种凡事喜欢扒高抬己之辈？那丫头有此大义，不值得本仙一句称赞？
- What I really want to show you is the more serious side of The Crux's business. ｜ 我更想带你去见识一些南十字真正重要的业务。

- Leave. ｜ 离开。

- ...We really could use the extra help, especially from capable individuals like yourselves... ｜ …眼下各方面人手稀缺，如果是你们这种实力的帮手…

May the true answers to these three questions bring peace to the world. In my time, I have sought the wisdom of ancient texts from all corners of the world, I have hidden myself here in quiet meditation, and I have studied the language of monsters; all this I have done in the hope of understanding their true nature. I erect this monument to be my witness when the one comes who can resolve these questions once and for all. ｜ 我以先前三问问师弟？他却斥我背离本责，又愤愤离去…如能解此三问，或能平定世间。我四处搜寻典籍，潜修于此，并修习魔物言语，希望能探其本质。立碑于此，望后世者能解此三问。

- Weapon Ascension Material.\nPeople used to say that the Lord of Flowers was the Lord of Joy and Happiness. Freshwater sprang from her sleeves, and thus was the oasis of blossoming flowers born in the desert. Flowers and grasses followed in her footsteps, and gleaming moonlight cleared the way for her.\nIn the bitter days when the sky turned its back on the ground, the Lord of Flowers extended her mercy to each and every one of the mortals, letting them regain their happiness and egos, allowing leisure and luxury to resume. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n人们曾说，花的王者是欢乐与幸福之主。清泉从她的袖口涌流而出，沙漠中便有了百花盛开的绿洲；鲜花与香草紧随着她的脚步，银白的月光为她开道。\n在高天转过脸去的艰苦时代里，花的女主人为凡人遍洒恩惠，人们开始重新认识到快乐与自我，于是再度拾起了闲暇与奢侈。

- Dragonlord Ix Uxul Tz'ib{RUBY#[D]Type-L Self-Regulating Overseer Array Integrated Processing Unit} Bolon Ch'ule-L is my name, aforetime the ruler of Chichen Uctokah. ｜ 我名为圣龙伊·奎库叙·茨{RUBY#[D]L型自律监管机阵统合处理单元}博隆·库·雷尔，曾是统律奇琴乌图的主宰。
- Character Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks will deal 18.75% more DMG, and their CRIT Rate will be increased by 12.5% after using Elemental Skills or Elemental Bursts for 10s. ｜ 角色的普通攻击、重击与下落攻击造成的伤害提升18.75%，且角色施放元素战技或元素爆发后，普通攻击、重击与下落攻击的暴击率提升12.5%，持续10秒。
- I... I can really only give you this much... ｜ 我只是…我只有这些给你…
- Once enough water bodies have recovered, I'll write a long-form report. I'll tell the public what the Fontaine Research Institute has done to our natural environment. ｜ 等到有足够多的水域生态得到恢复。我就会写一份长篇报道。让大众知道「枫丹科学院」究竟对自然环境做了什么。
- Guess this is the score Tailleferre was looking for. Still, we're missing several chunks of it... Where do we find the missing bits? ｜ 这个应该就是塔耶芙尔姐姐要找的曲谱吧？不过看起来缺了好几块呢…要去哪里寻找缺失的部分呢？
- *sigh* Alright... ｜ 唉…
- About my reputation with the Collective of Plenty... ｜ 关于我在「沃陆之邦」的声望…
- The Honorary Knight that saved us from Stormterror. Well, then, given your status, I won't press you on your reasons for eavesdropping. ｜ 击退了风魔龙的「荣誉骑士」，凭这层身份，就先不急着追究你的偷听了。
- Cannot observe the current duel ｜ 暂时无法观看当前对局
- Seriously? They actually give permits out for The Chasm? ｜ 居然可以拿到层岩巨渊的开采许可？
- The current overseer of the funeral parlor? Ahem. I cannot deal with that child. ｜ 当代堂主？嗯…那孩子，我应付不来。

- It's not even a real trap... ｜ 倒也不是真的陷阱啦…
- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获得
- Code Name: Zayin. A high-purity Dendro entity.\nThere are significant deviations in behavior between this being and the other Elemental Hypostases, though no one has yet produced a reliable conclusion as to why this is the case. ｜ 代号为「扎因」的高级草元素生命。\n与其他的无相元素在行为规律上有显著的差异。而导致这一现象的原因迄今未有可靠的结论。

- Fortune Stick: Constancy ｜ 灵签·恒常机关
- I've thought about this a lot of times in the past, but it's taken me this long to finally pluck up the courage to perform for you at such close distance. ｜ 我思考过很多次，现在是鼓起勇气，才敢在那么近的地方表演给你看的。
- Just let me know when you two have things sorted out. I've just had a tiring trip and would like to get some rest while waiting. ｜ 你俩商量好了再给我个准话吧，我也赶了老久的路，先到边上候着去了。

- All the same, do you have any suggestions? ｜ 有什么建议吗？
- Haha, you wanna try your hand at making it yourself? No problem, just give me a second and I'll write out the recipe for you. ｜ 你想学吗？哈哈哈，可以可以，稍等啊，我抄一份菜谱给你。
- Oh, hello. I wasn't expecting visitors at this time. ｜ 啊，你好，我没想到这个时间会有人来。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Anyway, its water bullets are completely harmless! At most, they might soak the guests standing near their target. ｜ 不过，这种装置发射的水球是无害的，只不过打中靶标后，飞溅的水可能把附近游客全身弄湿。

- Exploration Knowledge ｜ 探索知识
- Here's a little remuneration for your help. Please take it. As for me, I need to move on to other tasks. ｜ 谢谢您帮忙，这是一些酬劳，请您收下吧，我要继续处理其他事情了。
- Monsters that threaten the peace of Mondstadt sometimes appear on the city outskirts.\nThough the Knights presently lack the numbers to take them all out one by one, they pay attention to and record such reports, and list such monsters down as Bounty targets.\nYou can check with Hertha to view the available Bounties.\nIf you can track these creatures down in time and get rid of them, report your success to Hertha and your Reputation will surely increase.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Search and Pursuit</color>\nThrough the eyewitness reports available on each Bounty, one can guess the target's most likely location and type.\nOnce you enter its area of activity, quickly activate your Elemental Sight to find any traces it may have left behind.\nThese traces can be found on the ground, attached to collectible resources, or even on other monsters.\n\nHowever, the target will be on the alert for any would-be hunters.\nIf you cannot find sufficient clues in time, the bounty target will flee, causing the pursuit to fail.\nIf you fail in your hunt, you can return to Hertha to re-accept the Bounty.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Special Traits</color>\nDue to the ley lines or other elemental influences, some monsters will experience mutations. Bounty targets are all generally monsters of this sort.\nThe Knights actively gather intelligence on the special features of each bounty target and will list them down in the Special Traits section.\nRemembering each target's special traits and weaknesses is the key to victory. \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only take a certain number of Bounties every week.\nYou can check the number of Bounties you've completed this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared between all cities.\nNew Bounties will become available every week. \n\nOnce your Reputation has reached the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Bounties. ｜ 城市周边，有时出现威胁蒙德安宁的魔物。\n虽然眼下骑士团没有足够的人手一一讨伐，但也会注意收集这些情报，并列入「讨伐悬赏」的对象。\n在赫塔处可以确认悬赏的目标。\n如果能及时追踪、消灭这些魔物，并向赫塔回报的话，就能提高声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：寻找与追踪】</color>\n通过悬赏的「目击者情报」，可以推算出目标出现的地点，以及目标的类型。\n进入对象的活动范围之后，需要快速通过「元素视野」寻找目标留下的痕迹线索。\n这些线索可能滞留在地面上，也可能依附在采集物、甚至其他的魔物上。\n\n但目标也会警觉前来讨伐者。\n如果无法在短时间内快速找到足够数量的线索，悬赏目标就会逃跑，导致讨伐失败。\n讨伐失败后，可以在赫塔处重新领取。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：目标特点】</color>\n因为地脉、元素的影响，一些魔物可能会产生异变。讨伐悬赏的目标通常都是这样的魔物。\n骑士团会积极收集情报，调查悬赏目标的特点，并罗列在「目标特点」中。\n记住目标的特点，以及弱点，是讨伐成功的关键。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能完成讨伐的数量是有限的。\n本周已完成的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的讨伐悬赏。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的讨伐悬赏。
- Gives 30 Hydro Energy to all party members ｜ 队伍角色获得30点水元素能量
- Quit stuttering! If you hadn't panicked and dropped your guard, a few measly monsters wouldn't have been a problem for me! This time, you're giving up part of your pay to thank our savior. Got it? ｜ 别婆婆妈妈的，要不是你乱了阵脚，区区几只怪物，怎么可能奈何得了我？这次你的报酬，自己乖乖交一部分当谢礼吧！
- I came back as soon as I received the report... Have you gotten yourself mixed up with them? You're making a grave mistake, Estienne. ｜ 我接到检举信息就立刻赶来了…你也是他们的同伙？艾蒂安，你在犯很严重的错误。

- It was always going to be somewhat risky. To engage and draw away Morris all on your own... ｜ 我明白。跟莫里斯单独接触…多少是有些风险的。

- An Adeptus Abroad: The Great Pleasure Excursion! Let's go! ｜ 深度出国游！

- Sumeru ｜ 须弥
- Mr. Dvorak! ...Ah, he's already gone. Paimon wasn't even finished telling him everything... ｜ 大叔！…唉，走得真快，还有话没说完呢。

- The current disguises in this Contested Zone are: <color=#FFCC33>storage sacks, wine barrels, Otogi Wood boxes, and short stools</color>.\nThe resistance would often have to meet with their contacts to keep abreast of the situation. The wily Hunters would also switch tacks to tail these informants, thus exposing the Rebels by extension. As such, even the busy, prosperous harbor could become a contested area. These pedestrian streets were good for concealing oneself, but they also greatly shortened distances and the reaction times required. Danger lay in wait around every corner... ｜ 当前「周旋之地」中的伪装物：<color=#FFCC33>储藏袋、酒桶、御伽木箱、矮凳</color>。\n反抗组织需要时常与线人碰头，以获取最新的情报。难缠的猎手们也发展出跟踪线人的战术，随着线人去往游侠们的藏身之地。因此，喧闹繁华的港口也有可能成为周旋的前线。寻常可见的街巷虽易于隐藏，但也大大缩短了反应的距离与时间，也许危机就潜藏在下个转角…
- Yes! Even after being abandoned and neglected so many times, she has finally returned. ｜ 是啊！哪怕遭遇了那么多被舍弃被冷落的挫折，她也总算是回来啦。
- Oberon and I'll wait here for you to return with more information. Thanks! ｜ 我和奥伯龙在这里等你的消息，拜托了。
- No, no, the paid volunteers are for a conventional project to monitor the Ley Lines. All operations follow the prescribed safety protocols. ｜ 没有没有，这只是出于常规地脉监测需求才有的项目，一切操作都符合安全标准。

- From the barren desert, you can behold the forest realm of hidden wisdom, its verdant silhouette secure behind the mighty wall that blocks out the sandstorms, coldly looking down its nose at the desert realm swept by searing winds...\nSurely, the vassal lords whose fragmented kingdoms survived King Deshret's fall must also have looked upon that land of plenty with bitter jealousy... ｜ 从荒芜的沙漠远眺藏匿智慧的森林国度，深绿的遥远剪影阻隔在阻拦沙暴的高墙之后，冷眼睥睨着热风中飘摇的沙之国度…\n赤王之国覆灭后破碎诸国的时代，藩王们也曾以嫉恨的目光，在此遥望丰裕的国土吧…

- Let's go have some fun... ｜ 找点玩的…
- Traveler, clear this up for me — what was the reason that you left the cavern entrance? Did you— ｜ 旅行者，我想确认一下，你们刚才是为什么离开洞口？难道…
- Haha, you certainly are direct! ｜ #哈哈，{M#少侠}{F#女侠}果然豪爽！

- What brings you here, Yaoyao? ｜ 瑶瑶，你怎么跑这边来了？
- High five, Bongo-Head! It was really fun having you around. Paimon hopes you have a good time at Haniyyah's, and is really looking forward to seeing you again next time! ｜ 「咚咚小圆帽」…我们再来击掌吧！这段时间我很开心，你也要高高兴兴地生活，期待着和我们重逢的那天啊！

- Alright, let's hurry up and wrap this up then. ｜ 好咯，那我们就快速解决最后的任务吧。
