- The only thing that still calls out across Dragonspine is the biting, icy wind. Nonetheless, the ley lines will sometimes produce tiny Anemo elemental particles. Complete this natural challenge and you may obtain the red crystals that the ancient tree desires... ｜ 如今呼啸在龙脊雪山的只有刺骨的冰风；即使如此，地脉中有时也会涌现出风色的细小元素颗粒。能完成大地的挑战的话，也能取得古树渴求的红色结晶吧…
- A muscular hilichurl that uses a rock as a shield.\nFighting and eating meat are the two most important things to hilichurls, because those are what make them grow stronger.\nAll young hilichurls dream of growing up to become a big and strong mitachurl, because that way they can eat more meat, fight more battles, and wield those (almost) impregnable giant rock shields. ｜ 以顽岩为盾的丘丘人大块头。\n对于丘丘人而言，最重要的事情就是吃肉和打架，让身体变得强壮。\n如果能成为丘丘暴徒这样又大又壮的战士，就能吃更多肉、打更多架、举起（几乎）坚不可摧的巨大岩盾了。
- Complete the current challenge ｜ 通过当前挑战
- When It Rains ｜ 下雨的时候…
- But he zones out easily and sometimes just stands there talking to himself. He won't react no matter what you say to him. ｜ 但就是容易走神，有时候还会站在原地自言自语，怎么叫都没反应。
- Yeah, yeah! All was *not* well at all! What kind of ending is that? ｜ 对啊对啊，根本没有万事大吉，怎么能就这么结束？
- Mighty Bathysmal Vishaps that use different elements in battle to vent their great rage. After entering battle, they will use the powerful Cleansing Shower attack. Characters hit by this ability will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose a certain amount of Energy</color>. If the character lacks sufficient Energy, they will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose HP</color> instead.\nIf you prove unable to <color=#FFE14BFF>defeat</color> the Frostshrieker Bathysmal Vishap and the Blitzroarer Bathysmal Vishap <color=#FFE14BFF>consecutively within a short time</color>, the Bathysmal Vishap you first defeated will be revived.\nAfter a certain point in the fight, <color=#FFE14BFF>Geo</color> debris pillars will appear on the field. The Bathysmal Vishaps will leap onto these pillars and unleash powerful attacks. After such pillars are destroyed, said Vishaps will fall down and enter a weakened state. ｜ 强大的深海龙蜥之群，操持着不同的元素，向着来者宣泄它们的愤怒。进入战斗后，会使出威力强大的「涤魔喷吐」。命中角色后，角色将<color=#FFE14BFF>流失一定元素能量</color>。若角色的元素能量不足，将<color=#FFE14BFF>损失生命值</color>。\n若未能在<color=#FFE14BFF>短时间内连续击败</color>深海龙蜥·唳霜与深海龙蜥·啸霆，先击败的深海龙蜥会复苏。\n进入战斗一段时间后，场内将出现<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素</color>的阻截石柱，深海龙蜥群将攀附在石柱上，施放强大的攻击。阻截石柱被摧毁后，深海龙蜥将坠落并进入虚弱状态。
- ...By the way, since we've got this rare chance to work together, let me share some recent intel with you! ｜ 对了，既然机会这么难得，我就把我刚刚弄到的情报分享给你好了！
- Among The Seven, Rex Lapis is the oldest deity. ｜ 岩王帝君他老人家，是七神中最古老的神灵。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- *sobbing*... I can't open them, and I can't stop the tears... ｜ 呜…痛得睁不开，眼泪也流个不停…
- Reach the top of the tower in Stormterror's Lair. ｜ 登上风龙废墟的高塔顶端。
- Huh? Where'd he go? ｜ 嗯？那家伙跑到哪里去了？
- I'll have a stool. ｜ 那我要板凳。
- Most Disliked Comment ｜ 「最被『反对』的留言」
- Well, that's all. Our belief is short and simple, but strong. Isn't it? ｜ 呃，就是这些。我们的信念就是这么简短，简短所以有力，您说对吗？
- #Hmm? Look at the conch on that crate, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #嗯？{NICKNAME}，你看箱子上放的海螺…
- I see. Would you two join me on this next commission, then? ｜ #嗯，接下来这个委托，就请{NICKNAME}和派蒙同我一道吧。
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Strongest Single Strike ｜ 最强一击
- Matra's Message ｜ 风纪官的留言
- (A crumpled bill, with a few lines scribbled on the back.) ｜ （一张被揉皱的账单，背面写着几行潦草的字。）
- Tribal Announcement ｜ 部族公告
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Default ｜ 默认
- In a place that the opulent festivities do not reach, a strange monster named Beisht is on the move. Lying in wait in the waters under Guyun Stone Forest, Beisht is preparing a massive offensive. Step into her hiding place and defeat her preemptively to eliminate this nascent threat and defend the festive Liyue Harbor. ｜ 佳节华光难以企及之处，名为「跋掣」的诡秘魔物正蠢蠢欲动。「跋掣」蛰伏于孤云阁的海面之下，窥伺着节庆灯火，似乎在酝酿一场庞大的攻势。踏入「跋掣」的藏身之地，提前将其击败，方可清除这股潜在的威胁，守护佳节中的璃月港。
- Life Point ｜ 生命点
- Taisuke ｜ 大祐
- Complete "Omnipresence Over Mortals" ｜ 完成「千手百眼，天下人间」剧情
- No one knows better than him... ｜ 也许没人比他更懂…
- Well that's a shame. You see, I'm a journalist, and I just happened to snap a picture of you and one other individual in the middle of a deal back at the tournament. ｜ 哎呀，这可难办了。我是个新闻记者，刚才在会场取材的时候恰好用留影机拍到了你悄悄与另一个人交易的画面。
- "Here lies Spartacus the Righteous, known now as Supada no Hiko. Beneath lies the litany of his crimes. Read them and remember our history." ｜ 「义士斯巴达克，今称『须婆达之彦』，之凭吊处。以下为其罪诏之翻译。望参观诸君谨记历史。」
- Luckily, Klee noticed some fish she'd never seen before while she snuck out to play. She caught a few and showed them to Kaeya. ｜ 还好小可莉悄悄溜出去玩的时候，发现了没见过的鱼，嗯…抓了两条上来，问了问凯亚。
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- Before I set off for Natlan, I was warned that the nation has a hot climate, and I should dress light. ｜ 在出发来纳塔旅游前，确实有人提醒过我，纳塔天气很热，要准备些舒适的衣服。
- Kaeya ｜ 凯亚
- Hm, you could be right. ｜ 嗯，有道理。
- While traveling scholars get to study abroad with their certificates in different countries. Isn't that awesome? And they usually bring tons of useful reports back to the Akademiya as well. ｜ 游学者的话，可以拿着证件去各个国家游学，非常威风，还会带很多有用的报告回教令院去。
- To save our project, I've got to prove the value of this prototype as soon as I can. ｜ 为了保住这个项目，我必须尽快证明这台原型机的价值所在。
- Capture V ｜ 捕捉·其五
- Looks like this was kinda hard work for you. ｜ 看你的样子，应该费了点功夫吧。
- Opera House ｜ 歌剧院
- Anyway, absolutely no sugar! I almost fell into its sweet trap in the past... We can't let the same thing happen to Serene! ｜ 总之，绝对不可以放糖！之前，芙佳差一点就坠入了那样的陷阱…不能让瑟琳姐姐也变成那样！
- Hehe, it sounds pretty straightforward. ｜ 嘿嘿，听起来还挺简单的。
- Played by Sasano ｜ 笹野饰
- Madeleine ｜ 马德莱娜
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- Nice, we did well today! Let's keep it up! ｜ 好！今天做得不错！继续保持这种状态！
- Emergency ｜ 临危受命
- Anyway, let's get started! The mushrooms are all ready to go. ｜ 那我们开始吧，蘑菇早就准备好了。
- They're very tough, but also very cautious — and they trust no one but each other. This, I fear, is not a good habit to have. ｜ 他们很坚强，同时也很警惕，除了彼此外不相信其他人，这可不是什么好习惯。
- Natlan - Tepetlisaurus White-Box - Jump - Return to Wall ｜ 纳塔 - 钻地龙白盒 - 跳跃 - 复归墙上
- Ganyu ｜ 甘雨
- Trial of Fluorescent Flame ｜ 「炎彩的试炼」
- Like Tears in the Rain ｜ 就像雨中的泪水
- The Adventurers' Guild is open for business all year round. ｜ 顺带一提，冒险家协会的服务全年无休喔。
- Rocks? Ah! And what are these boars also doing here!? ｜ 石头？呜哇！怎么还有野猪啊！
- Tides Will Guide You Home (I) ｜ 汐海引路人·其一
- La Chanson d'Erinnyes (II) ｜ 伊黎耶之歌·中本
- Just... be careful. ｜ 不过…你要小心。
- Beggarly? ｜ 穷？
- Billboard ｜ 告示牌
- Traveler! Have you brought the stuff? ｜ 旅行者！你把东西拿回来了吗？
- Uh actually, on second thought, maybe we should get to cleaning first. Paimon'll fly up and take care of the top, and you clean everything below. ｜ 不过现在，我们先开始工作吧。我飞到上面去，你就负责擦下面好了。
- Rainforests are very wet. You should always be careful when spending the night in damp places. ｜ 雨林中很潮湿，在潮湿的地方过夜，总是要加倍小心。
- Is there a problem? ｜ 有什么问题吗？
- "In the past, I used cannons to fight external enemies. Now, I use them to destroy my sorrows. Peace is hard-won, and only by picking ourselves up and being happy do we honor the sacrifice of those who died..." ｜ 「过去我用大炮对抗外敌，现在我用它来消灭忧愁。和平来之不易，只有振作和快乐，才对得起逝去的人…」
- Mail ｜ 邮件
- Oh, good morning, Traveler. ...Whenever I see you in the morning, somehow, it makes me feel like... today is going to be a good day. ｜ 早安，旅行者。能像这样在清晨见你一面，我会忍不住觉得…接下来将是顺利的一天。
- What about us? Where should we go? ｜ 那我们呢，我们应该去什么地方？
- A New Letter ｜ 方才的来信
- Loyal Servant ｜ 忠诚的侍从
- Hahaha... ｜ 哈哈哈…
- ... ｜ ……
- Blazing Axe Mitachurl ｜ 火斧丘丘暴徒
- #Alright, you asked me to dispatch a ninja to get rid of the Traveler. Well, the deed is done. Here's some proof: {F#her}{M#his} hair and clothing. ｜ #喂，你们要我找忍者处理的人，我已经解决了，这里是{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}的头发和衣服。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Desert Study: Conscientiousness.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「沙域书案-『慎取』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Well, well, well... A compliment! After all these years! It's about time you knew your place, lowly servant. ｜ 我的天哪，你是在称赞我吗？这么多年，你终于有下仆的自觉啦！
- Overloaded increased ｜ 超载反应强度提高
- Let's take a look around... Maybe we'll find a hidden mechanism that'll show us the way up. ｜ 在周围找找看吧，说不定他们把开路的机关藏起来了。
- You were just playing us to get close to the Exuvia! ｜ 居然利用劣势，反而接近了「仙祖法蜕」…？！
- Hah, we find it kind of funny, you see, had we managed to stay above ground, none of us would have ever had the time to learn any of those skills. ｜ 我们都开玩笑说，要是在地面上，这是一辈子都不可能花时间去认真做的事。
- I swear, why is Virgil still not back yet... ｜ 真是的，维吉尔大哥怎么还没回来…
- Yes, it appears that this is the truth that Sumizome's story is trying to convey. ｜ 对，这就是墨染的故事想要告诉我们的真相。
- Rest ｜ 休息
- Whether it's an ad-hoc assignment or any other task, I'm free to assist... ｜ 无论是临时工作还是其他委托，我都可以…
- Gah! ...I feel like even I'm starting to get influenced... Come on! Take this notebook, I've marked the spots where the little guy has taken me. ｜ 见鬼…我觉得自己也被影响了…来！拿着这本笔记，我把那个小家伙带我去的地方都标注好了。
- Tribal Announcement ｜ 部族公告
- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1408]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A1408] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S14083]</color> once.\nAfter your $[A1408], who has this card equipped, destroys a <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114081]</color> through <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14083]</color>: The next use of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14082]</color> this Round will cost 2 less Elemental Dice.\n(You must have $[A1408] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1408]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A1408]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S14083]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A1408]通过<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14083]</color>消灭了<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C114081]</color>后：本回合下次使用<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S14082]</color>时少花费2个元素骰。\n（牌组中包含$[A1408]，才能加入牌组）
- You toil in vain, and your blood is a worthless sacrifice. ｜ 徒劳的奔走，无谓的血…
- Then... I will be able to... open the safe room lock... there is a button that disables the self-destruct system... inside the safe room. ｜ 如此…鄙人够能…解开急应室门锁…应急室内…有关闭自爆统系的按钮…

- Thanks for helping us get those flowers! Still, I've got to say that something's fishy around here... ｜ 谢谢你上次帮我采来那些花朵！只不过呀…我感觉身边一直怪怪的…
- Ah, so this is how the seal is broken! We can take this path to reach other places... ｜ 原来这里的封印要这样破解啊！之后就沿着这条路去其他地方看看了…
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- Combination 3 ｜ 搭配三
- Don't run away! Arapandu told us that you would be here! ｜ 你先别逃跑！是兰般度告诉我们你在这里的！
- Oh! I've built up some strength! I'm fine! I can sense that the seal is broken. Now, leave the rest to me. ｜ 嗯！我又积累了一些力气，没问题！我能感觉到，封印已经解除了。接下来，就交给我吧。
- So Sigewinne, did you really use that potion yourself? ｜ 对了，难道希格雯真的是用了那种药水才…
- Event Details ｜ 活动详情
- I think that's still not too bad... Is that supposed to be really expensive? ｜ 我觉得也还好…会很贵吗？
- You really care for your students, Paimon Sensei. ｜ 真负责啊，派蒙老师。
- Blade Roller 4-Hit DMG|{param13:F1P} DEF ｜ 刃轮巡猎四段伤害|{param13:F1P}防御力
- Well, at least you young people work fast... Alright, now's no time to slack off. We need to focus, or we still might not make it in time. ｜ 这个年纪的小伙子手脚就是麻利。好，你们也别偷懒，再不快点就真来不及了。
- Oh yeah! Paimon didn't think of that solution! You're so smart! ｜ 对哦，还有这种方法！你真聪明！
- Go with Anna to complete her Adventurers' Guild commission ｜ 与安娜一同完成冒险家协会的委托
- Hmm... If Paimon wanted to go see a meteor shower, the things Paimon would focus on the most would be... ｜ 如果我要去看一场流星雨，我最关心的事情是…
- Consumables ｜ 消耗品
- Ugh, now isn't the time to talk about being ticklish... ｜ 呃…好啦好啦，不是谈论痒不痒的时候啦…
- Weapon Ascension Material ｜ 武器突破素材
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Unlocks when Player Level reaches 5 ｜ 牌手等级达到5级时解锁
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Thanks for coming all this way. I'll take this. Thanks! ｜ 谢谢你跑这一趟，这个我就收下了，辛苦你了。
- (We're just temporary partners, but since the boss gave the word, I guess I'll look after them for a bit.) ｜ （虽然只是临时的合作伙伴，但既然老大叮嘱过了，那就稍微关照些吧。）
- Go back to the meteorite remains! ｜ 返回陨星残骸处！
- "I am Arataki Itto. I was recently framed for a crime I totally did not commit, and now I'm stuck here in prison. I am in urgent need of 500,000 Mora as bail. In return for your help getting me out, I will bring the whole gang over to thank you personally at your house." ｜ 「我是荒泷一斗，最近被人陷害入狱，急需五十万摩拉保释费，请帮助我，等我出狱我会带着整个荒泷派上上下下去你家感谢你。」
- Learn 80 furnishing blueprints ｜ 习得80种摆设图纸
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Thanks so much! Here's a little something for your trouble, detective! ｜ 谢谢你，这是给你的谢礼，请收下吧。
- Hmm, what are you three up to? Mind if I get in on the action? ｜ 几位在聊什么？方便带我一个吗？
- ...Thanks. I'll plant a new pot later. ｜ …这些蒲公英籽我就收下了，等会我再去重新种一盆。$UNRELEASED
- Comforting. ｜ 我觉得你太豁达了。
- He always manages to come up with novel ideas. I'm one of his regular customers. ｜ 那个老板总是会有新奇的想法，我是他的老主顾了。
- "Submit, mortals! Submit, barbarians!" ｜ 「顺从吧，凡人！臣服吧，蛮类！」
- Quicksand Treasure Hunter (III) ｜ 流沙的寻宝者·其之三
- Oh, no, no, let us explain! We were able to get our hands on an entry ticket today, but we haven't decided whether or not to participate. We wanted to get some info about it first. ｜ 不不，你误会了。其实我们今天偶然得到了一张参赛券，但还没决定要不要参加，所以就先来这里打听一下情况。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Level 1 Lumidouce Case Attack DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 柔灯之匣·一阶攻击伤害|{param2:F1P}
- I just feel that many heretofore undiscovered secrets still lie buried here on Seirai Island. ｜ 我总觉得，这座清籁岛上还埋藏着许多我们不知道的秘密。
- Well, what a coincidence. I, too, do not think that the opinion of a struggling researcher who came here out of desperation holds any weight. ｜ 巧了，我也不认为自暴自弃孤注一掷来到此地的落魄学者称得上是学术权威。
- What do you mean Mondstadters! ｜ 哪来的蒙德人啊！
- Cannot switch characters while matching. Please cancel and try again. ｜ 匹配中无法更换出战角色，请取消重试
- Got it! I'll stick close! ｜ 好！我知道了！
- ...Hmm? Of course, I will pass it on. ｜ …嗯？好，吾辈帮你传达一下。
- Defeat all the malfunctioning clockwork meka ｜ 打倒所有失控的发条机关
- "Generally speaking, both juvenile and adult Yumkasaurs enjoy having their noses — the part that protrudes above their mouth — gently pressed by their companions. A bit like how friends might give each other a friendly pat on the back." ｜ 「通常而言，幼年和成年匿叶龙都喜欢被熟悉的朋友轻轻按捏鼻子——也就是嘴巴上边的突起部位。就像朋友给您捶捶肩。」
- Swift Hunt Bond of Life Gain|{param3:F1P} Max HP ｜ 驰猎赋予生命之契|{param3:F1P}生命值上限
- Not juvenile... ｜ 不是儿歌！
- Alright, then stick close. Let's go! ｜ 好，那跟紧了，我们出发！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hm, no matter. It may have taken you a while to catch on, but I'm sure you've also realized by now... That there's something strange about this place. ｜ 不管怎样，就算再怎么迟钝，现在你也应该发现这个地方有蹊跷了吧。
- Dreams are like leaves in a stream. They soon float away with the water. If you want to keep a dream in place, you have to let it grow roots. That way, the dream won't drift away. ｜ 梦就像是在溪水里的树叶，它很快就会和水一起跑掉跑掉不见。所以，如果要让梦一直留着，就要让梦扎根。这样就不会跑掉。
- Matsudaira Kinjirou ｜ 松平金次郎
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- "Bona-Fide Beetle Battle King"? ｜ 「真剑斗虫大鬼王」？
- No, you shouldn't say that. ｜ 别再说这种话了。
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Well, if there really was, then we wouldn't be in this predicament. ｜ 要是真的有，就不会搞成这副样子了。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- The Anemo Archon sought to quell the strife between the two sides, because he believed that such conflict would only scar the hearts of both and that nothing good would come of it... ｜ 风神想要阻止他们的对立，因为他觉得对立只会在双方心中留下伤痕，没有任何好处…
- Whoa! You used to be a tour guide! That's awesome! ｜ 哇，原来托萝莎还做过导览员！真厉害。
- Err, right, there's also a famous big waterfall here! See? There's tons of water, so the waterfall's way big! And because it's way big, lots of water flows down it, and as the water flowing down increases, the water will decrease... ｜ 这里…还有著名的大瀑布！您看！水很多，所以瀑布很大！瀑布很大，所以流下去的水就很多！流下去的水越多，水就越少…？
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- Oh! Sorry! I've already started imagining what it would be like with you in the Special Patrol... Although I'm afraid we still can't offer you millions of Mora per month. ｜ 啊对不起，我已经在设想你进入特巡队后的情景了…虽然我还开不出几千万摩拉的月工资。
- After all, I'm also a scholar. Naturally, I hope to show proper respect and dignity to the God of Wisdom. ｜ 怎么说我也是一名学者，对智慧之神…当然是希望给予足够的尊重与体面。
- A fellow antique collector, are you? ｜ 怎么，你也对古董感兴趣吗？
- Did Paimon tell you that? ｜ 派蒙和你说了吗？
- That's not how the rules work, Sucrose. Don't be a sore loser. That kind of thing is looked down on in TCG circles. ｜ 哪有这样的规则啦，砂糖小姐，输了就得干脆认输，这也是牌桌上的礼仪。
- Heh, the two of 'em wouldn't stand a chance against Isamu. You think Kujou Takayuki would simply sit back while Isamu gained traction? So he decided to strike first! ｜ 啧啧，加一起恐怕都斗不过这个鹰司勇，要真给鹰司家上了位啊，那还了得？所以他干脆先下手为强！
- This is so tough. How can I get a balanced number of Qucusaurs on both sides... ｜ 真难办，怎么才能让绒翼龙们自己平衡下两边的数量呢…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Attain "Last Spark" while playing as a Rebel: be the sole escapee ｜ 扮演游侠达成「最后的火种」：唯一逃脱的游侠
- Since Kazuha made such a request to Sara, that indicates he's already made his choice. Whether we find out the truth or not today, or whatever it turns out to be, he's ready to accept it. ｜ 万叶既然这样做了，就说明他已经做好了准备——无论我们今天能否找到答案，无论答案是什么，他都会坦然接受。
- Very funny, Iaune. So what is this "secret" news? ｜ 非常幽默，艾尤恩。那么这个「秘密」消息到底是什么？
- Go and take care of them all. For such a simple task, I'll give you... one minute. That should be enough. ｜ 你赶紧去把它们全部给清理掉，这么点小事，我觉得…一分钟，差不多了吧。

- A screen used on the stage of the Yun-Han Opera Troupe. It is, in fact, comprised of several screens connected to one another in sequence in such a way that they can block one's vision, while one of the screens serves as a hidden door, allowing characters to take to the stage during the course of a play. In some traditional pieces, there is a special order to how characters take and exit the stage, and depending on the atmosphere the play means to convey, some must appear with minimal fuss. It is in such cases that these screens come into the picture, contributing to a smooth performance. ｜ 「云翰社」的戏台所使用的屏风，多块屏风相连，可以构成视觉的屏障，并将其中一块设置为暗门，以供戏曲中的角色登场。在部分传统戏曲中，角色的上下场有着特定的顺序，视台上氛围需要，一些角色需要不动声色地登场，此时就能运用这种屏风，让戏曲的演绎更为行云流水。

Its giant arms turn in response to the wind, generating ample energy.\nHaving read some Snezhnayan literature on the topic, one alchemist thinks that it may well be possible to store the energy generated by windmills using a mechanism fashioned from a combination of Pyro and Electro slimes. But even if his experiment were to succeed, the Knights of Favonius would never allow such a dangerous plan to proceed. ｜ 蒙德标志性的风车，巨大的叶片迎风转动，即可产生充沛的能量。\n某位炼金术士研究了至冬国的典籍后，认为可以用雷火两种史莱姆组建机关，储存风车能量。但就算他的实验成功，骑士团也不会批准这种危险的方案。

- But I don't think it's a good thing for my son to inherit this land and become a farmer for his whole life... ｜ 可想到子子孙孙也都要这么种一辈子田，好像也不是什么好事…
- I was attacked by monsters. I really thought it was over, but would you believe it... the Fatui saved my life. ｜ 嗯，被深渊魔物袭击，我还以为没救了呢，结果你们猜怎么，居然是愚人众出手救了我们。
- In that case, this little Tepetlisaurus... ｜ 那，这位年幼的嵴锋龙…
- Member of the Gardes ｜ 警备队员
- Investigate the hidden chamber ｜ 调查隐藏房间
- Before the disaster... Are you saying that... ｜ 灾难发生前…也就是说…
- If you're asking about the title, that's all in the past... ｜ 嗯，是说这个称呼吗？都是过去的事了……
- If you miss those opportunities in life, you may never get another chance to make up for them. I suppose that's fate. ｜ 所谓命运，很多时候只要错过，就再也没有机会弥补了。
- Just imagine, if that young master finds Theater Mechanicus intriguing, I might even get a large sum of Mora for further development... ｜ 啊呀，如果二少爷对「机关棋谭」感到满意，我们说不定能拿到一大笔钱作为发展资金呢…
- No back-talk! Or should I not go and find you, and simply let you... let you go hungry from when the sun is up, to when the moon rises, to when the sun hangs high again, and leave you to find your way home? ｜ 不许和奴家顶嘴！不然以后奴家可不去找汝等了，就给奴家从…从太阳还在天上，饿到月亮到天上，再饿到太阳跑到天上，然后再自己想办法回来吧！

- Well, the competition's all about chasing the kindling, and you're all chasing something, too, right? ｜ 你看，比赛要追火种，你们也总是在追逐着什么，不是很像吗？
- This truth remains, whether you choose to believe it or not. Your sensei taught you ninjutsu so that you may step in when a mission needs you. ｜ 而这样的事，就算一直无视下去，它都不会消失。你的老师将忍术传授给你，就是为了让你能应对这样的任务。

- Twenty-Five Groschen... ｜ 二十五个钱币…

- Ah... ｜ 啊…

- In that case, let's get going. ｜ 既然如此，走吧。
- A renowned architect from Sumeru who perhaps cares a bit too much about too many things. He is an aesthete troubled by reality. ｜ 须弥著名建筑设计师，对太多事物抱有过度关怀心。美学主义者，为现实所困扰。
- Monsieur Neuvillette, someone claiming to be from the Spina di Rosula just checked in with us. ｜ 那维莱特大人，刚刚有人过来登记，对方自称是刺玫会的成员。
- Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle ｜ 胜利时，角色被击倒次数小于2
- The "Meadow of Gems," how does it start... Ah yes, "Commerce and trade, like springs and streams, begin with the mountains and end with the seas..." ｜ 《珠玑宝矿》…唔，「凡工商万业，如泉如流，起于山岩，终于汪洋…」
- That's always been my style. I think it's interesting. The readers will love it! ｜ 我的风格一直是这样，我觉得这样的剧情很爽快，读者肯定也会喜欢的！
- Among other things, I'll be teaching some handy sewing techniques. So, providing everything goes smoothly, I'll be needing to buy quite a lot of fabric from your store. ｜ 家政课会教授缝衣服的技巧，如果能顺利开课的话，我也会从店里采购许多布料作为教学用具。
- ...Wow, it looks just like what my eyes would see. ｜ …真的，看上去跟真的一模一样。

- Are you sure we don't need to give this more thought? Paimon thinks there's something off here... ｜ 再想想吧，好像有哪里不太对劲…

- You agree, do you not? ｜ 你说是不是，勇士。
- I just so happened to stumble upon your notice in The Steambird, so I decided to see if he'd come back for her... But, it looks like I overestimated him. ｜ 碰巧我看到了报纸上的启事，想来看看他会不会为了自己的猫现身…但现在看来，算是高估他了。

- About Teyvat ｜ 关于提瓦特…
- The Pari who watch over the Sunyata Flowers are exposed to the constant encroachment of the defilement, so they must be wary of any bodily harm it may incur. ｜ 守候「净觉花」的花灵终日面对污秽之物的侵袭，当然要时刻注意躯壳的劳损。
- We took part in the Nilotpala Cup Beast Tamers Tournament, didn't we? It was great fun hanging out with our shroom buddies! ｜ 之前我们参加了「月莲杯驯兽师大赛」，和蕈兽伙伴们玩得很开心啊！

- Amidst thunderous prayers, your opponent begins to falter! ｜ 如雷的祈祷声中，敌人已显败相！
- But? ｜ 不过？
- Watch carefully! Heat the oil in a pan, then take a handful of crystalflies — wings removed — pop them in, and voila! Delicious deep-fried crystal— Hey! Where are you going? ｜ 看着点哦！像这样烧热一锅油，然后，把去掉翅膀的晶蝶这样放下去炸…哎呀你别走啊，超香的啦！
- Cool... a coercion contest... ｜ 哇…这两个人在互相敲诈呀…
- How is Tunner holding up? ｜ 特纳的身体还好吗？
- This is an adeptus relic from Liyue, right? It's incredible. I thought you were joking when you asked me to get into this pot. ｜ 这是璃月的仙家之物对吧？简直难以置信，你让我进到这个壶里来的时候，我以为你在开玩笑呢。
- Fruit of Fulfillment ｜ 盈满之实
- Oh... yeah, sure! C'mon, brother, stop rambling. Let's go! ｜ 喔…哦！好！哥哥别唠叨了，快走啦！
- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- The bad guys keep coming around, and we can't always stay in the woods like Aranara. ｜ 坏家伙来来回回的，真是太可恶啦，我们又不能像兰那罗一样一直留在森林里…
- I couldn't fight them off, so I could only flee for my life, and ended up stumbling my way into this inn. ｜ 我又打不过这群怪物，只能掉头就跑，跌跌撞撞一直跑到了这客栈里面。

- Jean? ｜ 琴？

- Hehe. Ah, youngster, you will understand someday. ｜ 呵呵，年轻人总会理解的…

- Unused poison was later found in the suspect Shiroyama's office. In his testament, he confessed to having planted the poison found in Ryuuji's house. ｜ 后在嫌疑人城山办公室中搜出未使用完的毒药，其在遗书中坦白，龙二家中所发现的毒药系栽赃。
- I've been reminded of many people, too. Kitsune Saiguu, Makoto, and all the other friends who I watched pass even further back. ｜ 也想起了很多人，狐斋宫，真，还有更早以前在我眼前逝去的诸位友人。

- Then, the purple-eyed Autumn left home. Nana wandered here with her and became friends with us. ｜ 后来，紫眼睛的秋姐姐离开了家，娜娜陪着她一起流浪到了这里，和我们成为了好朋友。
- #{NICKNAME}! Are you alright? Answer me! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！你还好吗！请回答我！
- Think nothing of it, Traveler. As I see it, you, too, represent many possibilities, and I am glad to have met you here. ｜ 您真是太客气了，旅行者。对我来说，您也象征着许多可能。所以我非常高兴又在这里见到您。
- Specially-Shaped Saurian Search ｜ 殊形之龙参寻战记
- Default ｜ 默认
- Why are these used to make the Holy Blade? ｜ 为什么这些东西会用来打造圣剑啊？
- By the way, Keqing, you're the one in charge of the fireworks show, which means you know the best viewing spot, right? ｜ 对了对了，刻晴既然是「烟花会」负责人，肯定知道烟花的最佳观赏地点吧？
- Wings of Merciful, Wrathful Waters ｜ 慈水怒涛之翼
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Have you noticed the... makeup that Natlanese people wear? Or body paint, or tattoos, or graffiti, or whatever it's called — anyway, it looks really cool!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I have noticed! "Body paint" is right, although it's not just any old paint. Apparently, it contains phlogiston.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Wow, really?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yep. If you're interested to try it out, I'm pretty sure they offer a body painting experience specially for tourists — but they just use normal paint for that.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Ooh! Well, since we're here... why don't we try it? All part of the experience.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Sure thing. You'll need to pick a color palette and a motif first though. Each tribe has its own style.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Alright, Paimon chooses, uh... Paimon chooses... Ugh! They all look so cool! Choosing between them is impossible.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Meh, choosing is losing! Paimon will take them all!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Wow... Today I learned that Paimon is a maximalist... Well, I'm sure some people would say "less is more," but I say — you do you, Paimon!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> What are you talking about!? Paimon never said anything about using them all at once! She just wants options, so she can switch up her style every day!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...Oh. That's too bad... I woulda loved to see Paimon with an elaborate arm-tattoo...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Stop! Nope! Stop it! No imagining Paimon with an arm-tattoo! Not allowed! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说起来，我发现纳塔人身上都有些不同纹样的…呃…油彩？涂鸦？虽然看不懂，但看上去好酷！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我也发现了！听说是用涂料画上去的哦，这种涂料用燃素为原料制成，跟普通涂料不太一样呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？居然是这样吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但如果派蒙也感兴趣的话，我记得有专为游客提供的涂鸦体验服务哦，会用普通涂料来替代。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的吗真的吗？正所谓「来都来了」…不如…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>好啦好啦，可是不同的部族喜欢用的色彩和纹样风格都不一样，那派蒙选一个喜欢的吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那我选…呃，选…哎呀！各有各的特色，根本选不出来嘛！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼。小孩子才做选择，派蒙我全都要！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哇哦…想不到派蒙现在的审美风格是「极繁主义」…虽然不清楚别人会不会觉得奇怪，但我一定会支持你！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我又没说要同时画在身上，我的意思是一天换一个，六天不重样啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>哦。好可惜…看来花臂派蒙只能靠想象了…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不许可惜！还有快停止这种奇怪的想象！
- Leave Domain ｜ 退出秘境
- You know I'm only one pair of hands, right? ｜ 那，多我一个也不多…
- Different opponents have a different number of Weaknesses on them. Some opponents have golden Critical Weaknesses. The buffs you will get from spotting 1 Critical Weakness are equivalent to that which you will get from spotting 2 normal Weaknesses. If you exit Time Dilation without spotting any Weaknesses, you will not use up any Fayz Potions. ｜ 不同敌人身上的「破绽」数量不同，部分敌人身上存在金色的「致命破绽」，捕捉到1个「致命破绽」累计的技能增幅条与捕捉到2个「破绽」相当。如果未捕捉「破绽」直接退出「时停超感」的状态，则不会消耗溢神剂使用次数。
- Ugh... alright... I am quite hungry. I suppose I shall accept your kind offer. ｜ 唔…那好吧，我也确实饿着肚子呢，就接受你的好意吧。

- The character to which this is attached <color=#FFFFFFFF>takes -1 DMG and deals +1 DMG</color>.\nThis status will provide 2 instances of <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro Application</color> (Can be depleted using Elemental Reactions): Once the instances are depleted, this status will be removed, and the character to which this is attached will be <color=#FFFFFFFF>unable to use Skills</color> until the end of this Round. ｜ 所附属角色<color=#FFFFFFFF>受到的伤害-1，造成的伤害+1</color>。\n此状态会提供2次<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素附着</color>（可被元素反应消耗），耗尽后移除此状态，并使所附属角色直到本回合结束前<color=#FFFFFFFF>无法使用技能</color>。
- You... have a really impressive drive. ｜ 墨田小姐的行动力真强。
- Includes furnishings that can't be drag-selected ｜ 包含不可被框选的摆设
- Speaking of which, the guy who was flame bearer before you — I've heard that his Saurian buddy comes from that time. ｜ 说起来，你们的前任游火人，他的龙伙伴据说就是那个时代的遗留物。
- I've been waiting for this holiday for so long, but now that it's here, I can't figure out which patterns I like... ｜ 终于等到了节庆的假期，却一时间想不出自己喜欢哪种花纹了…
- "If you'd like to see the magnificent sights of Chenyu Vale by raft, please wait here a moment..." ｜ 「若是客人想要乘竹筏观览沉玉风光，可于此稍待片刻…」
- Master? Servant? What does that have to do with us? ｜ 主人？仆从？这和我们有什么关系…
- Message ｜ 留言

- If nothing else, I think that I can grant them a little happiness that way. ｜ 咱觉得，这样他们好歹也能快乐一些嘛。
- ... ｜ ……
- That sounds troublesome. Now if only we could simply settle this through combat. ｜ 听上去还真是麻烦，要是能靠战斗解决就好了。
- But since it's Sakujirou... I don't feel there's any way we can get involved. ｜ 但如果是朔次郎的事，我觉得…我们没有办法插手。
- Fujita ｜ 藤田
- I had planned to spend the festival with Master this year, however... ｜ 今年我本想陪伴师父，但是…
- "...During the observation of maritime creatures, a Blubberbeast pup was rescued from a ray-style clockwork meka that lost control..." ｜ 「…观察海洋生物的时候，从失控的鳐型发条机关那里救下了一只幼体膨膨兽…」
- Since your problem has already been successfully resolved, I believe it will be unnecessary to post your commission. As for the reward, you can simply give it directly to this young lady. ｜ 既然你们的问题已经解决了，那么也就不用我帮你们发布委托了吧。至于报酬的话，你们直接交给这位小姐就好了。
- Twinning Isle ｜ 双双岛
- Illusory Bubble Duration|{param1:F1}s ｜ 泡影持续时间|{param1:F1}秒
- When we started out, you were just another stranger in a world I didn't understand. But after everything we've been through, I can say this for certain: My bow is yours, now and always. ｜ 我们刚开始搭伴旅行时，对我而言，你还只是一个陌生人，来自我所不熟悉的世界。但既然如今我们已经一同经历了这么多，我可以向你保证：我的弓永远与你同在。
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- (Maybe falling for scams is a moron's purpose in life.) ｜ （也许被骗就是笨蛋存在的意义吧。）

- (But things are never that simple, are they...) ｜ （总感觉…事情没这么简单…）

- Hey there, about the commission... ｜ 关于委托…
- Men-Mayhem ｜ 拉面状多重波谷
- A flower touched by the witch who once dreamt of burning away all the demons in the world. The anonymous flames affectionately caress the hands of those who touch it. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的魔女触碰过的花朵。无名的火舌温暖地舔舐触碰它的人。
- Exactly. You're well aware, I'm sure, that Citlali has been alive for more than two hundred years. That means she lived during the era of the Battle of Seven Colors! ｜ 嗯，两位想必也知道茜特菈莉是一位活了两百多年的大萨满，她亲身经历过「七彩之战」发生的时代！

- Thank you, Honorary Knight. I am very satisfied. ｜ 辛苦你了，荣誉骑士。我对这里十分满意。

- That's right, this is what we go trawling for every day. It's just junk, junk, and more junk... Maybe that stingy rogue Goldman eats the stuff... ｜ 没错，这就是我们成天打捞的东西，尽是一些这样的破烂垃圾。那个成天吃破烂的吝啬鬼…
- Cannot proceed, the tracks are not connected. ｜ 轨道未联通，无法前进。

- Merchants already have enough challenges to deal with, and as Paimon explained, my help was unconditional. Please, sell your wares to me at the price you would sell them to any other customer. ｜ 商人行商也有难处，如派蒙所说，我帮您绝非是要占您的便宜。这些货物，请您按正常的价格出售给我。
- Individual designation modification request... Via records... 150 years after the war... Designation changed to one from a list of the fallen — Ehecatl. ｜ 个体识别的称呼，变更请求是…通过记录…在那场战争后的一百五十年…变更名为，战亡名录——厄卡特尔…
- Waah, this place gives Paimon the creeps. You go first... ｜ #呜呜，{NICKNAME}，你走前面吧，我有点害怕…
- Character Story 3 ｜ 角色故事3
- Hello. ｜ 你好。
- D—Darn you... How can you wear that solemn face while bullying me like this... ｜ 可、可恶…居然一本正经地欺负人到这种程度…
- But, I still failed. I couldn't find a way to fulfill her wish. ｜ 但我们还是失败了，并没有找到帮她实现愿望的方法。
- That's the tribe to the north. ｜ 就是北边的部族啦。
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Found it. ｜ 找到了。

- Looks like... I've been correct all along. ｜ 看来…我的认知是正确的。
- #And then, we can name it after ourselves! Something like... "{NICKNAME} and Varesa's Glorious Grilled Meat Fortress"! ｜ #就用我们的名字来命名…比如…{NICKNAME}和瓦雷莎的辉煌烤肉大要塞！
- A... bird? No, I am a Pari. We live in the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 小…小鸟？我们是花灵，平时住在甘露花海。

- Come on, let's go! ｜ 来吧，出发吧！
- The current formula will exchange 1 of this type of fish for 3 servings of Fish ｜ 当前配方1份可兑换3块鱼肉
- The disabled machine crashed on top of the lost book. There's no way to retrieve it now. ｜ 失去动力的机器压在了丢失的书上面。我已经没办法把它取出来了。
- Of course! See you later! ｜ 好，回头见！
- "With all of your wisdom and input, we are confident that the Nilotpala Cup Beast Tamers Tournament will be an event that takes Sumeru by storm!" ｜ 「集结大家的才智后，相信『月莲杯驯兽师大赛』一定能成为风靡须弥的活动！」
- A bottle ornament with a golden frame and the appearance of an emerald gem. The "gemstone" is made of glass, and balances aesthetic appeal with cost... ｜ 金色框体与青色宝石外形的瓶体配饰，「宝石」由玻璃制成，兼顾了美观与成本…
- *sigh* But I can't simply go back empty-handed. My colleagues at the Ministry of Civil Affairs will tease me. "Were you seeking inspiration out there, or just respiration?" ｜ 唉，但这么出来一趟，总不能空着手回去吧。那总务司的同事肯定要说我「采风采风，采了个空」吗？
- You can invite all of your friends to see the fireworks. Consider it a gift from me to you! ｜ 叫上我们的伙伴都来看烟花吧，就当是我送你的祝贺礼！
- Camera has been adjusted to the correct angle ｜ 已经将镜头转至正确角度
- What about Ororon? ｜ 欧洛伦的事呢？
- A couple days ago, while I was {0}, I noticed a tiny hilichurl stomping back and forth with a stick that's taller than it and mumbling something incomprehensible. I am afraid it's some kind of curse against the Almighty Shogun! I just hope the Commission would do something about it. ｜ 前天，我{0}的时候，发现有个块头很小的丘丘人，拿着比自己还高的棍子，在念叨什么听不懂的东西，恐怕是诋毁将军大人的咒文吧！真希望奉行所的大人们能想办法处理一下。
- There's a saying that light novels are essentially a case of "buy art, get words free." I'd agree with that. Too bad most of the top artists have jam-packed schedules, so it's extremely difficult to commission them... ｜ 有句话叫「买插画送轻小说」，在我看来所言非虚。只可惜有名的画师大多排期已满，很难约到了…
- We were commissioned by the chief of the People of the Springs to gather evidence of your scamming activities! With these receipts, your scamming days are over. ｜ 我们受「流泉之众」的首领委托，前来收集你诈骗游客的证据！有了那些收据，你这次可跑不了了！
- The ninja discovers guards ahead. The broken wooden planks must've alerted the enemy. The ninja decides to find a way around them... ｜ 忍者发现前方驻守着敌人…也许是破坏木板的动静让敌人有了察觉吧。忍者决定想个办法绕过他们…
- A pocketwatch that has stopped at a certain point in time. ｜ 停滞在某一时刻的精致怀钟。
- Sangonomiya Kokomi ｜ 珊瑚宫心海
- As for the reward, you don't need to worry. I'll follow the usual Guild regulations. You won't be working for free! ｜ 报酬什么的你也不用担心，我会按照协会里的规矩算给你，保证不让你白跑。
- #Hey, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #嘿，{NICKNAME}。
- I know I shouldn't really interrupt them, but reheating the food just ruins the flavor... ｜ 我当然不应该干涉客人们。但重新热过的菜，风味上会差很多…
- But I fear that we haven't the strength to continue exploring and help you break through this darkness. ｜ 不过探索并协助您破除黑雾这方面…我们实在是力有未逮。
- Ooh, let's see... Whoa, hot! ｜ 我摸摸看…哇，好烫！
- Oh, really? ...Is it that obvious? Yikes, I've been outed... ｜ 啊，真的吗…这么容易被看穿的话就糟糕了…
- Head to the Flower-Feather Clan ｜ 前往「花羽会」
- Eliminate ｜ 翦除
- I spoke to your mom and dad — they were singing your praises. They said the world's your oyster now. ｜ 你爸爸妈妈都和我表扬你呢，说你现在很有出息。
- Basically. ｜ 差不多。
- Reach the destination within the time limit. Defeating an opponent will give you a little bit of extra time. ｜ 在限定时间内抵达终点。消灭一个魔物会使时间稍微延长。
- #That's the first time Paimon's heard {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} make that sound. ｜ #还是第一次听到{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}这样叫呢。
- Hesperus' Boons ｜ 赫斯珀洛斯的好东西
- Well... That's what I was told during my induction training, probably to rouse a semblance of personal responsibility in us. The point is, monitoring the hydrology data is pretty important work! ｜ 这个嘛...入职培训的时候是这么说的，大概为了唤醒我们心中微弱的责任感吧。总而言之，监测水文数据可是相当重要的工作！
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Although it isn't the cuisine I wanted to eat, I'm already satisfied to be able to taste such a novel dish. ｜ 虽然不是我想要吃的那一道，但能够尝到这种新鲜的菜品，我也已经很满足了。
- She's a ninja with a nasty habit of disappearing the moment I turn around. *sigh* She's always neglectful of her duties. ｜ 她是一位忍者，只要我没有看住她，她就会消失不见，从来都不会好好工作。
- ...Hiding? ｜ …避世隐居？
- Allow me to greet you on behalf of the Hu family's three youngest!\nThey're really lively kids, so try to understand and don't be upset if they scratch you a bit or are a bit noisy! (Remember that it is imperative to have a member of our staff treat any bites or scratches)\nIt'd be great if you got along with them! Yippee! ｜ 代我们胡家爱字辈三只后生向你问好！\n这几个小朋友都特别活泼，如果被它们挠了一下或者叨了一嘴，请别生气！（一定记得找工作人员处理伤口）\n要是你能跟它们相处愉快，那就太好啦，我很高兴！
- Forget it, I'll just give the rest of them to the birds. I'll just get something to eat once Roialte and I are done with our business. ｜ 算了，薯条就分给紫金渔鸥们吧。等我和洛耶茨先生办完事，再去买点东西吃好了。

- Lyney's specialty. He covered the fruit you picked with velvet and then uncovered it — voila! You were greeted by a colorful assortment of gummies. You sampled one and your mood immediately changed. Did the great magician cast some incredible enchantment spell to bewitch the heart while no one was watching? ｜ 林尼的特色料理。他用绒布盖住了你刚刚采摘下来的果子，掀开绒布，斑斓多彩的软糖瞬间映入眼帘。吃了一颗，心情突然发生了某种变化。这难道又是大魔术师趁人不注意，偷偷施加了不可思议的俘获人心魔法？
- Fuufuu Windwheel DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 风风轮伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Wait... Changsheng, are you saying... Neither of you had actually met Jialiang or Ayu before all of this? ｜ 欸？听长生这说法…你们以前没见过嘉良和阿雩吗？
- Diary of a Valiant Struggle (I) ｜ 勇猛奋斗日记（一）
- We're not talking about that kind of trouble... *sigh* Let's just get his mushrooms for him, shall we? ｜ 我们不是在说这种问题啦…唉，总之我们先去林子里帮他采蘑菇吧。
- A unique statue discovered during "Journey Through Hilinigmatic Terrain" and that has the same shape as the statue that suddenly appeared in Dadaupa Gorge. Indeed, it is that "Mystifying Megachurl" that has left you confused about its origin, unable to understand its objective, and otherwise confuzzled. Perhaps the next time you visit the Divine Ingenuity Domain, you will have a chance to meet this unique Hilichurl once more? ｜ 在「奇境谜丘探幽行」的冒险中寻获的独特雕像，与突兀出现在达达乌帕谷中的雕像有着相同的造型，正是令人想不通来历，看不懂目标，摸不着头脑的「神神秘秘大大丘丘」。或许下次有机会造访「神工天巧」的秘境时，还有机会见到这位独特的丘丘人？
- Wonderful. Then I'll see you in three days. I look forward to it very much. ｜ 好了~那就三天后，恭候您的光临了，客人。
- Talk to Beidou ｜ 与北斗交谈
- I gotta say, you're awfully particular when it comes to taking care of that cat. Hehe, you even provided me a list of materials to use for his cat toy. ｜ 不过，你照顾那只小猫的方法可真细致啊，还专门把做这份猫玩具要用的材料一项项列给我…
- You could say that. I worked as a miner for some time, but ever since my mining team was shut down, I've had to take on odd jobs everywhere. ｜ 算…是吧。之前做过一段时间矿工，但我在的那支矿队停工了之后，我就只能四处打点零工。
- The Tree who Stands Alone ｜ 孤木孑立，无林可依
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You're right. Please go meet the children. Let them know you are their new friends. ｜ 说的对，请见一见「孩子们」，让他们知道你们是他们的新朋友。
- Sh—Shall we see how he's doing? ｜ 我、我们要不然还是去问问他怎么样了吧。
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Rally ｜ 重振
- In the past, an order dwelled here, exploring the secrets of the spirit and fate. ｜ 在过去曾有教团在这里探索精神与命运的秘密。

- I'm up next! I'm Intrepid Valberry! Director 42 of a criminal gang! ｜ 然后是老子！老子叫「勇猛落落莓」，是一个犯罪团伙的四十二当家。
- But Domon was different. The first thing he did when he joined was go straight to our sensei and ask him, with a beaming smile on his face, how to become the best in the world. ｜ 但土门不一样，他拜入师门第一件事，就是笑着问师父，「如何才能成为天下第一」。
- Eroded? ｜ 被磨损的宿命吗？
- You mean I'm supposed to dip this hash brown in jam? Ugh, this is sacrilege! ｜ 这个…这个土豆饼的蘸料居然是果酱？完全不合理！
- Mikawa Flower Festival... huh, that does ring a bell. ｜ 三川花祭，我对这个名字好像也有点印象。
- But Havria instead chose to flee. She thought that by giving up before a fight could start, she could save herself and her people from the war. ｜ 但赫乌莉亚选择了逃避。她认为只要在争斗发生之前就放弃，战争就永远不会波及到自己和子民。
- Not sure how this happened. ｜ 不知怎么就变成这样了。
- Well, I'll get designing, then. I'll let you know when the blueprints are ready. ｜ 等我先设计一下，出了图纸之后再找你商量。
- Seems like this is the key to unlocking the treasure chamber. ｜ 看起来，通向藏宝室的关键就是这个了。
- This is the real "Annapausis." ｜ 这里是真正的「安眠处」。
- Challenge Data ｜ 挑战数据
- Well, Paimon's not sure how much Lord Barbatos would know about taking care of cats... But that aside, we've never even worked at a shelter before, but somehow we've been turned into the saviors of the entire operation... ｜ 先不说巴巴托斯懂不懂照顾猫啦，我们也没有管理收养所的经验，结果突然就变成救星了…
- Cool Steel ｜ 冷刃
- I should also mention — this time the cutoff was 5, but I just set that to whatever I feel like. ｜ ——顺便一提，一开始的阈值是我看心情定的。
- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Surely, it must be a very difficult dish... ｜ 这道菜肯定很难做吧…
- Hmm, this taste... well, it doesn't seem to taste like a Liyue or Inazuma dish. The taste is really new to me... ｜ 唔，这种味道…好、好像不是璃月的菜，也不是稻妻的菜，味道还真是新鲜…
- This sudden turn of events dealt a heavy blow to the Yashiro Commission. Behind the scenes, things became very unstable. ｜ 突如其来的变故，令社奉行遭到巨大冲击，内部暗流涌动。
- Wow, look at these, the Udumbara Pistils! So, this is one of those glorious eras, eh? ｜ 哇！竟然真的带来了「忧昙花」的花蕊，看来…如今是个好时代呢…
- Repertoire Coins ｜ 千音币
- *whimpers* ｜ 呜呜…
- In its earliest form, this festival celebrated the birth of Greater Lord Rukkhadevata. Nowadays, however, it marks the birthday of Lesser Lord Kusanali. ｜ 最早是庆祝大慈树王的生日的节日。但如今日期被改为了小吉祥草王的生日。
- Dreamdrifter Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 梦浮持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- And ding ding ding, we have a winner! In that case, let's go. "Ad astra abyssosque," as Katheryne always says! ｜ 哼哼，正确的判断！那么，我们走吧！就像凯瑟琳经常说的，向着星辰与深渊！
- Matra's Message ｜ 风纪官的留言
- Our little Paimon's having trouble reading those small letters? ｜ 派蒙看小字也会不舒服吗？

- An elite Fatui special agent who can manipulate Cryo in battle. In combat, they will use the Hunt Down skill to attach a Bond of Life to characters they hit. While Bond of Life is active, the character will take continuous DMG, and Hunt Down will deal more DMG to them. ｜ 愚人众当中精锐的特务，能够驱使「冰元素」进行战斗。在战斗中，会进行「猎杀」，向命中的角色施加生命之契，在生命之契存在时使其持续受到伤害，并提高猎杀对其造成的伤害。
- Er... Does "the aquabus repairman might've been put in a bad mood by my many questions" count? ｜ 嗯…水道检修员大哥因为被我问了太多问题烦到了算吗？
- At Lan's direction, Tiantian of the Adventurers' Guild has been put in charge of distributing commissions, but she has no idea what sort of commissions she should be giving out to adventurers... ｜ 在岚姐的指示下，璃月港冒险家协会的甜甜正负责分发各类委托，但是，她似乎不知道到底冒险家协会该发布何种委托…
- Book in the Woods ｜ 林中小书
- Hmm, so it was indeed written by all of you. ｜ …果然是你们一起写的。
- Follow the scammer "guide" ｜ 跟随骗子向导
- You really are confident in that device of yours. ｜ 你对这台装置真有信心。
- ... ｜ ……
- Eh? ｜ 哎？
- I got careless! ｜ 大意了！
- I wonder when I'll be able to build a Jade Chamber of my own? *sigh* It'll take a lot more wealth than I have now. ｜ 什么时候我也能修一座群玉阁…唉，眼下我的财力还远远不够。
- Are you ready to stop whining now? Do you have any idea how rare an opportunity like this is for a small-time paper like ours!? ｜ 闹够了没有！你知不知道，这样的机会，对我们这种小报来说有多难得？
- I see, I see, so you want to know how Thousand-Wind Wine is made? Well, you came to the right person. I happen to know a little rhyme called... well, as it happens, "Thousand-Wind Wine." ｜ 原来是这样，是想知道「千风佳酿」的做法吗？那你们又问对人了。我知道一首歌谣，它的名字…嗯，刚好也叫做「千风佳酿」呢。
- Detection units produced by Fontaine Research Institute using new models of artificed components. Its original purpose was monitoring all kinds of environmental data. ｜ 枫丹科学院利用新型奇械构件生产的微型探测单元，原本用以监测各类环境数据。
- Then throw in some Jueyun Chilis grown at a high altitude, where the low humidity and varying temperature lends them a unique dry heat. ｜ 再选取长在高山上的绝云椒椒。低湿度和大温差，使得它能够产生特殊的干香风味。
- Reply ｜ 回复
- I don't think you'll accept this commission either, will you? Well, if you don't want to, it's fine. ｜ 看你的样子，你也不会接我的委托了。如果你真不愿意，那就算了。
- No we're not! ｜ 不是啦！
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- No, no, please... Please listen to me. You got it all wrong... ｜ 别，别别别，英雄您听我说完，这真的是误会…
- Scholar's Clock ｜ 学士的时钟
- No problem. I will grow into a new Ashvattha Tree, bear the Bija using your memories and dreams, and use my roots to reconnect the corroded bridges between dreams. ｜ 嗯。我会长成新的觉王树，然后将你的回忆与梦结成惟耶之实，用我的树根，将被无留陀侵蚀的梦之间的桥梁重新连上。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- After all, if even the fact that "you are guarding a secret" is considered a secret, then you will fall into an endless cycle of keeping the secret of keeping secrets. ｜ 毕竟，如果连「正在保守一件秘密」这件事都是秘密的话，那么您就要陷入无限的保密死循环了。
- But noooo, even so, Gattineo still just has to classify it as "secret." ｜ 没错，但就算这样，加特尼奥也非要给它定一个「秘密」。
- Equipment Card ｜ 装备牌
- You see, the mines have been closed due to recent events. ｜ 是这样的，因为最近的那些事情，矿井已经封闭了。
- So, back to the matter at hand. The things we need answers on are one, where did those super evil-looking hilichurls come from, and two, what does Starsnatcher have to do with the yakshas. Right? ｜ 这么看，满身邪气的丘丘人的来源，还有「天君」与夜叉的关系，是这次事件的疑点呢！
- To help Hora relax, you'll need to gently clean his back with the big brush... ｜ 为了让霍莱放松，你首先得用大刷子轻轻清理它的后背…
- Freminet: Progress ｜ 菲米尼·行进
- Bulletin Board ｜ 公告板
- Charity Event! A Great Success! ｜ 义卖活动！完满收场！
- Some measure of the consciousness still remains... ｜ 意识会以某种形式留存下来…
- Show the Orders to Mack ｜ 向麦克展示命令书
- Wheel ｜ 威尔
- Hello! I heard from Furuya Noboru that you're an adventurer from afar. ｜ 你好！听古谷升说，你是来自国外的冒险家？
- ...Wait, really!? ｜ 哎呀，真的吗？
- You found a ragged notebook in the village. It records the sad story of a father who sought to revive his wife by sacrificing his daughter Shenhe. ｜ 你们在村中发现了一份残破的笔记。笔记中记录了一位父亲以女儿阿鹤换取复活妻子方法的悲伤故事。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Curse you all, Forest Rangers... ｜ 你们这些巡林员…
- You're right! Everyone loves beauty, don't they? ｜ 对对，爱美之心，人皆有之！
- So the plan for tomorrow is... journey across the ocean, make it to the end of the world, and defeat a dragon. ｜ 那么我们接下来就是等到明天，跨过大海前往世界尽头讨伐邪龙了对吧？
- Phew... she's finally gone. She's gone for good now, right? ...Right? ｜ 呼…她终于走了，不会再，回来吧…
- A humanoid figurine sitting on the ground. Can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nThis model is said to be based on a certain skilled miner. Many people live the life they desire via hard work, though one should also pay heed to the words of one gentle head nurse: "Don't skew too hard towards work. You've got to strike a balance between work and rest." ｜ 席地而坐的人像模型，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据说，这款模型是以某位能干的好矿工为参考制作的，许多人正是靠着勤奋劳动过上了自己想要的生活。当然，也请注意某位温柔的护士长的话：「一味地努力也不是好方法，务必注意劳逸结合哦。」
- Nobuhiro ｜ 信博
- What happened? ｜ 发生了什么？
- The Great Mushroom's Place ｜ 大蘑菇之地
- Challenge Starts ｜ 挑战开始
- All of this is because of you. Thank you very much. Can you make me a promise? From now on, please, let me protect you. Do you accept? Yes or no? ｜ 这一切都是因为你在，谢谢你…可以答应我一个愿望吗？今后…就让我来保护你吧，好不好？
- What a calculating and conniving guy. ｜ 真是个谨慎又狡猾的家伙。
- As you wish, sir. ｜ 如您所愿，先生。
- Hydro Abyss Mages have Hydro Wards. Electro can break through their defenses effectively. ｜ 深渊水法师的护罩以水元素铸就，雷元素攻击可以有效破解它的防御。
- A small coin pouch of Mora that doesn't weigh much; you'd sometimes forget it's even there. ｜ 装着摩拉的小小袋子。没有多少重量，偶尔会让人忘了它的存在。
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- I wanted to stay for a little longer. I'm still thinking about everything you taught during the class... Even though a lot of it went right over my head, I still thought the houses you drew were really pretty. ｜ 我再留一会儿。我还在想卡维老师在课堂上教的内容，虽然很多地方听不懂，但我觉得卡维老师画的那些房子很好看。
- Skill DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param4:F1P}
- CD|{param9:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param9:F1}秒
- I'm really sorry... I probably need your help to get some. ｜ 真是不好意思，可能要拜托你帮忙收集一下了。
- Hmph, Mondstadt fools! If you think you can sweet-talk your way past me, think again! ｜ 呵，愚蠢的蒙德人，这样的说辞就想收买我吗？
- Godwin... ｜ 古德温…
- What's wrong? ｜ 怎么了？
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- All I know is that ever since Lesser Lord Kusanali returned to Sumeru, she's never left the Sanctuary of Surasthana or made a public appearance. ｜ 不过据我所知，小吉祥草王大人回到须弥之后，就从没有离开过净善宫，也没有在公众面前露过面。
- *sigh* I haven't seen her in a good long while since coming to Liyue on my own for work. The last time I held her in my arms, she was nowhere close to the weight of this polearm... ｜ …唉，独自来到璃月工作后，我已经很久没见她了。上次抱起她时，好像还远没有这把长枪重…
- After returning with the ultimate treasure of a thousand blooming flowers, the children often continue the adventure in their dreams. The Flower Carriage is every bit as magnificent in dreamland, and the road ahead stretches on endlessly. The destination matters not, as all they need to do is enjoy the pleasure of riding along on the Flower Carriage... ｜ 带着千朵鲜花的至宝归来后，孩子们时常在梦中继续冒险。梦中的花车依旧华丽盛美，前行的道路无尽延展，目的地已不再重要，只需享受乘坐花车时的欣喜…
- Namecard style.\nThe most difficult part of writing a travel journal is coming up with the beginning. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n完成了游记写作最困难的部分，就是写个开头。
- #Hmm... Wouldn't it be difficult with just the three of us? {NICKNAME} has important things to do, and Salsa has homework, right? ｜ #这…只靠我们三个应该会很困难吧。{NICKNAME}也有重要的事要做，萨莎不是也有作业要做吗？
- Xiangjun ｜ 香莙
- Character Details ｜ 角色详细
- Mona ｜ 莫娜
- But sometimes, when I wake, I see friends who should not be here anymore... Are they monsters? That must be it... They're monsters that have taken the form of my friends. ｜ 但有的时候，醒来却能看到本来不应该再出现的朋友…那些是怪物吗？大概，是变成我朋友模样的怪物吧。
- You are...? ｜ 你是…
- Fine fine, I'll be honest with you... The desert and rainforest survival kits are worth two and a half million Mora each. But buy one get one free sure sounds like a good bargain, doesn't it? ｜ 好吧好吧，和你实话实说也行啦。沙漠和雨林的旅行大礼包，拆开来卖的话，分别都值二百五十万摩拉。但买一送一听起来比较划算嘛，你不觉得吗？
- As I told you, I've already lost my chance to be saved by the Lord of Dendro. ｜ 我刚刚就说了，我早就失去了被草之王拯救的机会。
- Treasure Maps? Oh, you must mean Zhang Shun's maps. ｜ 藏宝图？哦…你是说张顺押在我这的那些是吧。
- I won... Looks like all that practice wasn't in vain... ｜ 赢了…那些练习总算没有白做…
- Friendships, Wishes, and Regrets ｜ 友情，愿望与遗憾
- I'm the one who is an adventurer. ｜ 我才是冒险家。
- Are you looking for treasure? ｜ 你在寻宝吗？
- You must triumph over powerful opponents in "Feast of the Departed Warriors." You can change the <color=#FFE14BFF>Basic Score</color> you can obtain by choosing different combat conditions, while you can change your <color=#FFE14BFF>Score Multiplier</color> by choosing your challenge difficulty. However, your opponents' special traits and the challenge difficulty will also change accordingly... ｜ 在「离垢者肃心旅宴」中，旅行者需要战胜强大的敌人。通过选择不同的战斗条件，可以改变挑战成功后的<color=#FFE14BFF>基础积分</color>，选择不同的挑战难度则可以调整<color=#FFE14BFF>积分倍率</color>，但敌人的特性和挑战的难度也会发生相应的改变…
- Uh-huh... Yeah, there's still a silver lining. I guess... ｜ 嗯嗯…对，好事。嗯…
- There's not much left to wrap up, so I'll take it from here. Guess this is where I'll say goodbye. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，收尾工作我会顺手处理掉，我们就在此告别吧。
- Ugh... Let us explain, would you? ｜ 真是的，好好听人说话啦！
- The Millelith takes away the hooligans who were surrounding the young lady with white hair. ｜ 围住白发女子的流氓被千岩军带走了。
- The Rhythm that Nurtures the Sprout ｜ 新芽迸发的曲调
- Okay, we'll find a place to rest for the night. When should we meet tomorrow? ｜ 这样也好，那我们就先找地方住下，明天什么时候会合？
- Next up, the main event. When do we start? ｜ 接下来才是重头戏，什么时候开始？
- Hajime, Mr. Amenoma! It's me! ｜ 阿创，天目先生！我来啦！
- I run an antique store — they call me the most reliable antique appraisal expert in Port Ormos. ｜ 我是开古董店的，也是奥摩斯港最可靠的古董鉴定专家。
- This is a marriage between the Kujou Clan and the Hiiragi Clan. The Kamisato Clan must demonstrate an appropriate level of respect. ｜ 九条家与柊家联姻，神里家理应拿出与之相符的重视。
- Oh, yeah — please don't tell Lady Guuji I'm here... If she finds out, I'm toast! ｜ 啊，对了，千万不要告诉宫司大人我在这里，被抓到可就糟了…
- You recognize us? Ah, are you... one of the people who wrote the commission letter? ｜ 您知道我们？难道说您是撰写委托书的一员？
- Let me take you somewhere new. ｜ 我带凯亚去没去过的地方玩吧。
- You should use it too, Paimon. ｜ 还有你也一起，派蒙。
- You show great intuition, as one would expect of a Paladin. That is correct, I have come here often since my accession. ｜ 不愧是卫士阁下，一下子就抓住了重点。没错，自从我即位后，就经常来这里。
- Ice Lance DoT|{param3:P} ｜ 冰枪持续伤害|{param3:P}
- Ah, children, come, come! Haha, you've arrived at just the right moment. I've been looking for you. ｜ 孩子们，过来，过来。呵呵，你们来得正好，我一直在找你们呢。
- I barely have any memories of my birth parents... The last time I saw them was long before I had any understanding of the world around me. ｜ 我对亲生父母没有多少记忆…懂事之前就没见过他们。
- Food ｜ 食物
- It seems everyone has managed to arrive on time. ｜ 看来大家都准时到场了。
- Puzzle time, huh. ｜ 看来又是解谜环节了。
- A traditional Sumeru dessert. The sickly sweetness explodes in your mouth like a bomb, leaving your teeth rattling in the wake of its saccharine shockwave. The appropriate amount of sweetness lifts the spirits, but too much of it becomes a terrible burden. ｜ 传统的须弥甜点。甜腻的冲击宛若炸弹一般，在嘴里爆裂开，甚至让牙齿隐隐发痛…适当的糖分能使人心情愉悦，一旦过量却会成为难以承受的负担。
- A mysterious ship has dropped anchor outside Liyue Harbor. The ship appears to be quite luxurious, all the more reason to hop right on board... ｜ 在璃月港的海边停着一艘神秘的船，看起来十分华贵。而你却冒冒失失地直接闯了进去…
- Tighnari ｜ 提纳里
- Potion ｜ 药剂
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Sure, Paimon will help you tell Alhaitham, but whether he chooses to forgive you is up to him. ｜ 好吧，我替你们跟艾尔海森说，不过他愿不愿意原谅你们，我就不知道了。
- You have "greedy" written all over you. ｜ 长的一副贪婪模样。
- I couldn't possibly cause a diplomatic incident just like that, could I? ｜ 为、为了我们两国的外交关系，我也不能动手啊！
- Successfully complete all stages of "Bloomflower Trials: Offensive Battles" ｜ 成功通过所有「荣花演武·进攻战」的关卡
- Oh... No, it's nothing urgent... ｜ 这…倒没有那么急…
- According to intelligence, the target has the following special traits:\n·Invulnerable to Cryo DMG\n·Invulnerable to Electro DMG\n\nAdditionally, the target has the following weakness:\n·Takes increased DMG from polearm-wielding characters ｜ 根据调查，目标具有如下特性：\n·冰元素伤害无效\n·雷元素伤害无效\n\n此外，目标具有以下弱点：\n·使用长柄武器的角色造成的伤害提升
- ... ｜ ……
- Abyss Mage ｜ 深渊法师
- I will let you prepare. Takatsuki Dougire and I will be here, no matter how long we must wait. ｜ 我可以让你准备，无论你要准备到何时，我和「贵月胴切」都会在这里等你。
- Promised Dream of Days Past ｜ 昔时应许之梦
- Out of consideration for his health, my wife and I would like him to have an environment conducive to rest. You understand, don't you? ｜ 为了他的身体健康考虑，我和我太太希望他能拥有一个安静的休养环境。你会理解的，对吧？
- Ah, this is the one. Here, take it. ｜ …就是这本。给你。
- In some sense, you could even say that it is a living thing. ｜ 从某种意义上说，也算是「活物」。
- Releases a honed wind projectile that deals Anemo DMG. ｜ 施放烈风射弹，造成风元素伤害。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- Can I get food to-go? ｜ 吃的可以打包吗？
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- An artificed Frostarm Lawachurl. Be extra cautious when fighting it! ｜ 被拟想而出的「丘丘霜铠王」，与其战斗时需要多加小心。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- The Taste of Home ｜ 家乡之味
- Haha, it's all thanks to Miss Dunyarzad's sponsorship that the children can meet the Knight of Flowers. ｜ 要不是迪娜泽黛小姐的赞助，孩子们也没机会见到我这个花之骑士啊，哈哈。
- They're only hilichurls, you can take 'em... ｜ 只是丘丘人，你自己也可以…
- Go and examine the dandelion ｜ 上前观察蒲公英
- Who needs to be taken home? ｜ 要送谁回去吗？
- I tried to get the attention of many others who visited before, but they were all either quickly whisked away by Tlazolli, or simply refused to believe me. ｜ 之前我尝试了好多次，但那些来家里做客的叔叔和阿姨要么被特拉佐莉用各种方法请走，要么就是都不相信我。
- (There are a number of comments stating people's understanding of Paimon's decision, a concern for the condition of the competitors, and their hopes of the competition being continued in the future.) ｜ （留言中还有许多对赛事状况的讨论，大家都对派蒙的决定表示理解，关心着选手们的身体状况，并希望赛事能正常举办下去。）
- Now that was a great warm-up! Most praiseworthy. ｜ 这次你的热身运动做得很到位，值得夸奖。
- Photo-Taking Mode ｜ 留影模式
- If anything, too much by-the-books learning might snuff that sort of potential out. ｜ 对于无师自通的天才，让他们按部就班，循规蹈矩地学习涂鸦技巧，或许会扼杀他们发展的潜力。
- No, we never did anything of the sort! We're busy people too, so we'll be on our way... ｜ 没有的事！我们还有别的事要忙，就先走了…
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Since you're here, and Lisa is here, and this is a flower shop... You might as well get a bunch of flowers, right? It only makes sense. ｜ 既然来了，还是照例挑一束花吧？
- You lose consciousness... ｜ 失去了意识…
- (With a very heated look in his eyes, too.) ｜ （而且眼神还相当热切的样子。）
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- Maybe? ｜ 或许吧…
- So, what can you tell me about Dragonspine... ｜ 关于龙脊雪山…
- Because I wanted to know what you'd changed. ｜ 因为我想知道你改变了什么。
- (The dry well is locked and looks like it could be opened with the corresponding key...) ｜ （枯井的井口被锁住了，看上去可以用对应的钥匙打开…）
- #Well, it's nothing special. I just need you to help me get some more crystals, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #嗯，也没有别的要求啦，只是需要{NICKNAME}再帮我开采一些晶石。
- Phew... It didn't go out of control, truly unexpected. Our lives have been spared yet again. ｜ 喔，它真的没有失控，真是出乎预料。我们又捡了一条命啊。
- You seem like you've drunk a lot... ｜ 你喝了很多酒…
- But then there was this one time when the coach was a little... strict with their words, and the student in question just happened to have quite a temper... *sigh* Yeah, that's not a fun one to talk about. ｜ 但是有一次因为教练在指导时言辞有些…严厉？偏偏那个学员也是个脾气火爆的人物…唉，当时的场面我都不愿再提。
- Faster, stronger! ｜ 更快，更强！
- Remember the order — Start by the chair, in the water, by the fire, and finally, on the wall. ｜ 记住顺序：先是椅边的，然后是水中的，火旁的，最后是墙上的。
- It's a fairy tale, a fantasy. But... should I tell him, or shouldn't I? ｜ 那只是童话书里的东西，是幻想出来的故事，该不该现在告诉他呢？
- Charged Attack DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Heavy Hit Taken: II ｜ 重受击·其二
- Well, come back later when you have the time. ｜ 嗯，等你有空了再来玩吧。
- ...You, young lady over there, turn around and let me have a look. Ah, so this is from The Case Files of Miss Orith. I thought it was the second female lead from Great Detective Herlock. All Fontaine clothes look the same to me. Alright, you can be on your way now. That's all I wanted to say. ｜ …哈，小妹，你转过来给我看看。嘶，这是《奥西兹小姐事件簿》啊，嗨，我还以为是《赫尔洛克》系列的女二号呢。枫丹的衣服在我看来都一样。行了，你继续吧，我没事了。
- Elder Zurvan clearly associated with the Order of Skeptics when they were first established, but after my birth, all contact seemed to be lost between them. ｜ 明明矫论团建立之初，前辈也是有参与的，但是在我诞生之后，他们之间已经没什么往来了。
- Agh! This is a terrible situation. With our lighthouse down for the count, we'll have no light... That means no return to the village for our venturers! ｜ 这可真的糟糕。灯塔跌倒，没了灯光…那些出去远游的冒险客们可就回不了村了。
- Nahida ｜ 纳西妲
- Giant Guard ｜ 巨人卫兵
- Are you busy? ｜ 坎蒂丝是在…
- But as long as I can bring everybody a smile... ｜ 不过，只要大家开心就好了…
- True... now that I think about it, Cloud Retainer would be quite capable of taking care of anything on her own... there's no need to worry about her. ｜ 嗯，冷静下来想想，诸多情况真君都能应对变通…无须担心。
- Arcane Fruit Collector ｜ 魔果收获手
- So how'd you do it, huh? Were you born stronger than your most fearsome foe? No! Do you rock up to every fight believing that your odds of winning are a hundred percent? Of course not! ｜ 难道一开始，你们就有着凌驾于那些大人物之上的实力，就有着十成的把握获胜么？
- Find the Temari ｜ 找到手鞠

- The conches in various parts of the archipelago have been affected by the chaotic wavelengths present. This has caused them to record sounds around them. If you incline your ear to the shell opening, you might hear the words of others amidst the whispering of the tides. ｜ 群岛各处的海螺亦受到纷乱波长的扰动，意外收摄了周围的声响。将耳朵靠近壳口，或可在潮汐声中隐约听到他人的话语。

- So you are an adventurer after all, and quite the experienced one at that! You were able to dispose of such powerful monsters so easily... there really always is a bigger fish. ｜ 原来是冒险家前辈！真是人外有人啊，这么难缠的魔物，你们一下子就解决了。

- A Plasma Field will be generated at the edge of the challenge area once the challenge begins. While within the field, characters will be hit by a lightning strike once every <color=#f39001>2</color>s and take Electro DMG. The area covered by the field will gradually expand as the challenge proceeds. ｜ 挑战开始后，场地外围会产生等离子场。角色在等离子场中时，每<color=#f39001>2</color>秒会受到一次落雷打击，遭受雷元素伤害。等离子场的范围会随着挑战时间推进而向场地中心扩张。
- Keqing, who has dedicated a large portion of her energies to Liyue Harbor, indulges in an unexpected pastime when she can spare a moment — shopping.\nOn her days off, she changes into ordinary clothes, contacts a few close friends, and enjoys a day of strolling around Feiyun Slope and Chihu Rock, just enjoying the act of buying things.\nAfter Rex Lapis' departure, Keqing managed to maintain this method of decompression despite her busier schedule, though with one subtle difference.\nOn one of her shopping trips, she happened upon a small and unremarkable stall that sold cute Rex Lapis clay figurines with tiny bodies and big heads.\nPersuading her friends to visit the silk store opposite, she approached the stall, took a figurine in her hand, and began to examine it.\nShe knew that she didn't have much time. So, after glancing around to make sure that no one was watching, she paid for, picked up, and packed away her prize in one swift single movement.\nBut no sooner had she placed the figurine into her bag and heaved a sigh of relief than one of her friends, silk bundles in tow, tapped her on the shoulder.\nIn the end, all was revealed. Her friends were quite curious: Wasn't Keqing a skeptic among skeptics? Why would she buy one of these?\n"For... For introspection, of course! There's nothing wrong with self-reflection, is there?"\nSo she said, and it would be convincing, too — if Keqing didn't already have an entire shelf dedicated to Rex Lapis self-reflection memorabilia... ｜ 将绝大部分精力奉献给璃月港的刻晴，闲暇时竟会采取一种旁人难以预料的消遣方式——消费。\n休息日，她会换上朴素的衣裳，约上三两好友，漫步在绯云坡与吃虎岩，享受购物乐趣。\n帝君离去后，越发繁忙的刻晴依然保留这一解压方法。只不过，其中依稀产生了一点变化。\n一次逛街途中，她偶然瞥见路边一个不起眼的小摊上摆着岩王帝君的二头身土偶。\n刻晴当机立断，找借口把好友们支到街对面丝绸铺里，自己来到摊前，将帝君的土偶拿在手里仔细端详。\n她知道绝不能在这件事上浪费太多时间，便小心翼翼地观察四周。确定不引人注目后，购买、付款、取货一气呵成。\n将土偶收进包里，刻晴才长舒一口气，露出暖洋洋的微笑。正在此时，一个抱着丝绸的朋友拍了拍她。\n事情最终暴露了。大家都很诧异，刻晴分明是最不敬神的人，为什么会购买帝君的土偶呢？\n「我、我买这个只是为了自省！没什么不行的吧！」\n「自省」一说姑且解释得通。但事实上，这类「自省」用的小物件，刻晴已经不知不觉地买了一整柜。
- Uh... As the morning dew does what now? ｜ 以拂晓的…什么来着？

- *sigh* These silly Blubberbeasts just won't leave, will they... ｜ 唉，这群赶不走的膨膨兽…
- A deliciously fragrant Liyue dish. The roughly processed shrimp and half-cooked crab roe give off an odd smell, reeking of the charnel stench of some brutal crab-shrimp war. Considering that the raw ingredients themselves are still quite fresh, this shambling nightmare could still be classified as food... if one were to ignore the stink, anyway. ｜ 鲜香四溢的璃月菜肴。未经细致处理的虾仁和半生不熟的蟹黄中散发着诡异的气息，彷如刚刚发生了一场残酷的虾蟹战争。考虑到原料本身还算新鲜，只要无视了气味，或许这盘狼藉也勉强可以被归入食物的范畴…
- The Sublime Anemograna seem to be able to guide powerful winds, forming them into whirling currents capable of sucking opponents in. - They say that there was once a handsome but eccentric young man in the Fontaine Research Institute, a prodigy in potions and alchemy. ｜ 他们是这样说的，说枫丹科学院有一个容貌美丽但性格古怪的少年，他是个药剂炼金学科的天才。

- I've never played before. ｜ 我没玩过。

- That said... Just look at what you're wearing! You're definitely not someone I need to worry about... ｜ 不过，呃…看你穿得这么古怪，肯定也不是什么坏人…
- There are so many scattered ruins here... I wonder what happened. ｜ 这里有好多破碎的遗迹…真是好奇，之前发生过什么呢…
- An exceedingly durable cabinet hewn and carved from a single large stone, built in the same style as those sturdy ones in the Chuwen Fair. Although this stone cabinet has a limited number of compartments, each one boasts substantial capacity and impressive weight-bearing abilities. Whether it be weapons carried by warriors or goods carried by traders, all can be securely stored. Therefore, the Weary Inn has intentionally placed these stone cabinets in its guest rooms, providing travelers with a convenient place to temporarily store their luggage. ｜ 使用一整块大型石材雕刻而成的立柜，有着极佳的耐用性，与楚汶市集内的部分立柜款式相同。虽然这种石柜分隔数量有限，但每个分隔都拥有极大的容积和强大的承重能力，无论是战士携带的武器还是行商背负的货品，都能得到妥善的安置。因此，倦意之屋特意在供人休憩的客房中安置了这种样式的石柜，方便旅客们临时存放行李。
- Although the conviction states that Shiroyama grew to resent Takatsukasa Isamu due to work conflicts, it's not detailed enough for us to understand the motive. Perhaps you should give it some more thought... ｜ 定罪书里虽然提到「城山与上司鹰司勇有工作冲突，心怀怨恨」，但不够详细，无法明白是什么动机。你再想想？

- Talk to Iaune ｜ 与艾尤恩对话
- Sounds like quite an ordeal, huh? Fortunately, if you know how to use a Crafting Bench, it makes things much easier these days. ｜ …哈哈，你别打退堂鼓，如今活用「合成台」的话，「霄灯」的制作就方便很多。
- You're seriously gonna use a novel to tell people how to run an army? Pretty sure that's called being an "armchair general"... ｜ 居然试图用小说里的东西指导军队，这就是别人说的「纸上谈兵」吗？
- A makeshift hut commonly found throughout the Collective of Plenty, constructed with Flammabomb Wood poles acting as its framework. It is said that one defining feature of these temporary huts is that their support poles are sharpened at the tip. This design enables individuals to put the huts together relying solely on their own strength, without the need for additional tools. Of course, sufficient strength is a prerequisite — otherwise, the hut would be quite unstable. Fortunately, for those who live in the Collective of Plenty, such a requirement is hardly an issue... ｜ 由「燃爆木」木棒为框架搭建而成的临时棚屋，可在「沃陆之邦」周边广泛见到。据说，这类临时棚屋的一个显著特点是其支撑杆均为尖锐的木棒。这种设计允许搭建者在无需任何辅助工具的情况下，仅凭个人力量就能完成搭建。这一切的前提是搭建者必须具有足够的力量，否则可能会导致支撑不稳。当然，对于「沃陆之邦」的居民来说，这一前提通常不构成问题…
- Ah, no, no... It is just... Let's just call it a scholar's pride, shall we? ｜ 哈哈，不是这样的。怎么说…算是身为学者的自矜吧。
- I thought there was room for improvement. ｜ 我觉得还差点意思。
- With Katheryne's help, you start filling out the forms. Alternating between hesitance and doubt, you use up bottle after bottle of ink, but the stack of forms also gradually shrinks. As you finish the last form, both Katheryne and you breathe a sigh of relief... ｜ 在凯瑟琳的指导下，你开始填写起了表格。在时而犹豫，时而疑惑的书写中，一瓶又一瓶墨水接连耗尽，但好在旁边的表格之峰也在逐渐坍塌。终于，最后一张表格填写完毕，你和凯瑟琳同时如释重负般地舒出了一口气…

- Ahem! ｜ 咳咳…！

- Important considerations for any chef. ｜ 传递了厨师的心意呢。

- #Your words wound me, {M#my dear sir}{F#my lovely lady}. I have many friends and not a single enemy. Virgil is just one of my many friends — and ah, speaking of dear Virgil... ｜ #您这话可真令人伤心，{M#尊敬的先生}{F#可爱的小姐}。我可没有敌人，只有许多朋友，维吉尔也是其中之一。只不过，亲爱的维吉尔…
- A timepiece from a nation of old that waited for their warriors' return. What flows inside is not sand, but bits of ice that never melt. ｜ 等待勇士归来的故国人民所用的时计。其中流淌的并不是沙，而是不化的冰屑。
- In my estimation, this cobbled-together fellow here would have failed on us halfway through. ｜ 按照我的预期，当我们前进到大概二分之一的距离的时候，我拼出来的这位伙计就会罢工啦。
- Use Floaty Splodies to defeat 3 opponents 4 times in a single challenge ｜ 单局挑战中使用「飘飘爆弹」击败3名敌人，累计进行4次

- For every point of the entire party's combined maximum Energy capacity, the Elemental Burst DMG of the character equipping this weapon is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>0.21%</color>. A maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>70%</color> increased Elemental Burst DMG can be achieved this way. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的元素能量上限的总和，每1点能使装备此武器的角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>0.21%</color>，通过这种方式，元素爆发造成的伤害至多提高<color=#99FFFFFF>70%</color>。
- Sure, I'll give it a go. ｜ 我来试试。
- That's right, that's me, and here's my adeptal fruit Paimon. ｜ 不错，是我，还有仙果派蒙。
- I've heard Grandpa Lu say that the tea ceremony is actually for the Carp adeptus who planted our first tea tree! ｜ 听陆爷爷说，奉茶典仪其实也是为以前种下第一棵茶树的鲤鱼仙人供奉的仪式呢！
- When you challenge the Galezone, you can also try out these Windgrasper Challenges. Collect a specific number of Windcoins within the time limit to complete that challenge. When initiating these Windgrasper Challenges, you can also obtain the following buffs:\n1: The active character obtains the Whirling Winds effect, Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks that hit opponents will create an Eye of the Squall, which will constantly pull opponents in a small AoE towards its position. The Eye of the Squall will last for <color=#f39000>4</color>s. Whirling Winds can activate at <color=#f39000>4</color>s intervals.\n2: All party members obtain the Plantar Winds effects that will greatly increase the active character's jumping height and increase Plunging Attack DMG by <color=#f39000>50%</color>. ｜ 在挑战「风境」时，旅行者也可以尝试进行「揽风挑战」。在限定时间内搜集到特定数量「风循币」后，即可完成挑战。在进行「揽风挑战」时，旅行者也会获得以下增益：\n1：当前场上的角色获得「涡卷风」效果，角色发动普通攻击，重击，下落攻击并命中敌人时会产生一个「汲风眼」，将小范围内的敌人不断牵引至「汲风眼」的位置，「汲风眼」持续<color=#f39000>4</color>秒。「涡卷风」效果有<color=#f39000>4</color>秒的发动间隔。\n2：队伍中的所有角色获得「足底风」效果，大幅增加当前场上角色的跳跃高度，并使其下落攻击伤害增加<color=#f39000>50%</color>。
- Snake Handler Gulabgir seems to be in trouble... ｜ 弄蛇人古拉布吉尔似乎遇到了点麻烦…
- Hah... How adorable... ｜ 呵呵，真是可爱…
- Oh, I don't know about that. No guarantee. ｜ 呵呵，我可不能打包票说，肯定能看懂，
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Huh, even though you seem a little cold and reserved sometimes, you're still really considerate! Our target isn't necessarily the Water Imp, though, we're primarily here to investigate the disappearance of the fish. ｜ 嘿嘿，虽然菲米尼说话冷冷淡淡的，人还是很体贴的嘛。不过我们的目标也不一定是水妖，我们主要是在调查鱼群消失的秘密。
- Venti always looks so relaxed whenever we run into him. Paimon can't help but be jealous... ｜ 每次见到温迪，他看起来都好悠闲，真羡慕…
- Correctamundo! ｜ 没错，就是这个！
- Here, this place looks nice and open. Why don't you all rest here for a second? ｜ 这里地势开阔，行，就在原地稍稍休息下吧。
- Hmm... but why would you need to identify the gray areas? ｜ 唔，但你为什么要摸清灰色地带呢？
- Witness my great undertaking. ｜ 见证伟业吧。
- Find your companions in the cave ｜ (test)在洞窟中寻找同伴

- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- In that case, Oni King... I'll stay here in Liyue. Firstly, this will enable me to follow up with Chef-sama and discuss our study plans in detail. ｜ 既然如此，鬼王，我就留在璃月好了。一方面可以跟着厨神姐姐，仔细询问学习机关术的事宜。
- Go to the location of the hidden treasure ｜ 前往「藏宝地」
- I trusted in your ability, so I didn't double check the data. I handed it in directly... and a lot of it turned out to be wrong. ｜ 因为我相信你的能力…就没复核数据，直接报上去了，好多数据都错了。
- Although I don't remember doing any of this... ｜ 虽然不知道我做了什么…
- Those monsters aren't easy to deal with. But... if you insist on going, I won't stop you, either. ｜ 那些魔物…可不好对付。但…既然你们执意要去，我也不再阻拦。
- Now, this "expert" you mentioned... When can we expect their arrival? ｜ 你说的那位专家，何时能到？
- Waterfall DMG|{param2:F2P} Max HP ｜ 水瀑伤害|{param2:F2P}生命值上限
- Now I understand why this set needs to be so perfect and why it's okay that it doesn't turn a profit. ｜ 那我理解了，这套棋子确实应该做得非常好，不赚钱也没关系。
- Monsieur Os ｜ 呜斯先生
- Food ｜ 食物
- The edges of my frame boards were refined with folding saws so that the pieces fit together perfectly. Then they were joined together and reinforced with large rivets, making me indestructible... There's no way I could end up like this! ｜ 「棚板」之间呀先用「摺锯」锯出吻合的锯痕，才用「通钉」细密固定，可以说是坚不可摧…不会变成这个样子的啦！
- No! Our reunion no longer has any meaning — there is no way for us to create any new memories. ｜ 不，不是这样的。我们再相见已经没有任何意义，我们已经无法再创造任何新的回忆了。
- Scattered like leaves in the wind. ｜ 真是风雨飘摇啊。
- No, Iotham was the last one that went missing. ｜ 不对吧！优丹是最后一个走失的才对…
- No, the review didn't target any specific report, but me personally... ｜ 不，这种审查并非是针对某篇报道，而是针对于我这个人…
- I want to look around some more... ｜ 还想再逛一逛…
- Find Roussimoff and buy tickets ｜ 找罗西莫夫购买奖券
- Oh, I've already told the Knights of Favonius all about you and your antics! ｜ 你做的事情，我已经通知西风骑士团了。
- Hahaha, not at all. The Acting Grand Master positively terrifies me. Why would I ever do anything that might displease her? ｜ 呵呵呵…我那么害怕琴团长，怎么敢做出令她不开心的事呢？
- We read about that in the journal. What did you mean by missing "courage," Arashakun? ｜ 对哦，之前在笔记里也看到了，兰沙恭，你说自己失去了「勇气」到底是怎么一回事啊？
- Ancient Chronicle of the Dreamseeker Priest (IV) ｜ 古寻梦祭司的记录·其之四
- Oh yeah, I posted that commission. ｜ 对，那个收集月莲的委托，委托人就是我。
- I could go and ask... ｜ 我可以去问一下他们…
- I help look after the little ones in the village. It helps me worry less knowing they are taught to be obedient and well-behaved. ｜ 现在就帮帮村里人照顾下小娃娃们，孩子们又乖巧又很听话，让我也省心不少啊。
- Look! Look, over there! ｜ 你看，你看，那边！
- Haha, great! I better get on it, or someone might beat me to it! ｜ 哈哈，好啊，说做就做。不过应该不光是我会做，大家都会争先恐后地去记录这段故事吧。
- Oh yes, there is one more scene next. ｜ 啊对，接下来还有一幕。

- A lush and lovely sakura that blooms at spring's beginning in classic "ikkonzome" pink. Legend has it that these sakura were once used as a very precious dye that required the collected essence of a hundred sakura trees just to make one kimono. Such an article of clothing was once worth more than precious gems.\nFortunately, Her Excellency, the Almighty Ogosho, thought little of what mortals might consider "high-class," and set forth a decree ordering sakura trees be protected from being used as dye-making material. Such was for the best: a lovely sight for all to behold is far more practical than a bit more opulence adorning some high-official's body, after all. ｜ 郁杌幽丽的樱树，初春之时呈现出典雅的「一斤染」色。传说这种樱树曾被用于制作极为贵重的染料，收集上百棵樱树的精华，才能提炼出堪堪浸染一件着物的份量。因此，这种染料的等重的价值超越了不少昂贵的宝石。\n好在稻妻最为尊贵的大御所大人对凡人观念中的「高雅」外物缺乏兴趣。为了保护樱树，大御所大人降下诏令，禁止提炼该种染料。人人皆可欣赏的美景，自然比达官显贵身上的华丽衣物来得更实在。

- According to legend, the blow that brought an end to the serpent god was struck right here. Even to this day, the remnant reverberations of lightning continue to ring across this deep canyon in Yashiori Island, as if the spirits of thunder still chatter about the legendary scene that tore through the sky and the earth thousands of years ago... ｜ 传说中，终结蛇神的一刀正是在此处斩下的。在这道横贯八酝岛的深邃峡谷中，雷光的残响至今不绝，仿佛属雷的精灵仍在喋喋不休地议论着数千年前，划开天空与大地的传奇光景…

- <color=#37FFFF>Ajaw:</color> Kinich, have you ever wondered why you're not surrounded by adoring followers? Be honest, it keeps you up at night, doesn't it? Tossing and turning in the moonlight, wondering why you don't have any friends... But take heart, for the wisdom of the Almighty Dragonlord, K'uhul Ajaw, is right here within your grasp. Prostrate yourself before us, beg for our words of guidance, and we may yet deign to show you the way.\n<color=#37FFFF>Kinich:</color> Oh, 'cause you're so popular yourself? The only following you have is a long list of people who want to slap you in the face. ｜ <color=#37FFFF>阿乔：</color>基尼奇，你有没有反思过自己不受人们追捧的原因？看着月亮翻来覆去睡不着觉的时候，心里一定很苦恼吧？智慧圣龙库胡勒阿乔就在面前，汝为何不匍匐在地，乞求吾降下谕旨，为汝指点迷津呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>基尼奇：</color>你一定是因为自己做得太好，才会让追随者们都想把你狠揍一顿。

- These shrubs are commonly seen within Sumeru City and are dotted with flowers that make its branches look as if countless yellow butterflies are resting upon them. Though it is not a particularly stunning landscape plant, it still possesses a mundane beauty that shows off the spectacle of urban life without stealing the spotlight, especially when compared to brighter flowers. However, for some researchers, these seemingly "complementary" flowers stir up a very different feeling in their hearts... ｜ 须弥城内寻常可见的灌木，星星点点的「蝶黄」色花朵遍布其上，像是有诸多蝴蝶栖息在枝头。作为景观植物，它的外观算不上惊艳，但贵在「寻常之美」，以并不引人注目的力道点缀城区，衬托出部分花卉明丽的色彩。但对某些学者来说，这样的「陪衬植株」反倒引起了他们内心中别样的共鸣…

- A wooden ceiling made from fragrant cedar. Simple and lovely, it is a great match with furniture of all kinds.\nThe main use of ceilings is to catch the dust that falls from the beams and other structures, and thus they have also gained the moniker "Dust Bearers."\nThey say that such honorific nicknames are given to many other things in Liyue: curtains, tables, chairs, table, and even Mora. ｜ 以「垂香木」制作的木制天花板，简练美观，搭配各种色调的家具都很是合适。\n因为主要作用是承接房梁或其他房屋结构偶尔会落下的灰尘，所以天花板也得到了「承尘」的雅称。\n据说在璃月，不仅是天花板，窗帘、桌椅、甚至碗筷和摩拉都有雅称。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: There once was a great knight who was cursed to spend the daylight hours looking like a shabby old drunkard.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Only in the dead of night would he return to his true form: a mature, brave, and self-respecting knight.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Is there a way to lift the curse?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Only if someone is willing to show genuine, heartfelt respect to the knight.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Alright, I can do that. Let the curse be lifted!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Ta-da! The curse has been lifted. Now, Grand Master Varka can choose for himself whether to be an old drunk or a respected knight.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And then he said, "I'm sorry, but I've been a shabby old drunk all along." So now he's a shabby old drunk both day and night.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Wait, that's terrible!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: There's a different version of the story in Natlan that goes like this: There once was a young girl cursed to become a snobby, stuck-up old lady during the day, only turning back into an innocent girl during the night.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: And, um... the only way to lift the curse was, uhh... having conversations about topics she liked.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: Well, I can already guess where this is going. If this was Madam Faruzan, then once the curse gets lifted, she'd probably say something like, "Hmph, and what's wrong with being old? Do you have a problem with that, young lady?"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Right! And if it was Citlali...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: She'd get all anxious and pouty, and say, "But... but I've been an innocent young girl all along..."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: ...There's no actual curse in either of these stories, is there? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>曾经有一个伟大的骑士被诅咒了，白天只能以邋遢的酒鬼大叔形象出现。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>只有夜深人静的时候，他会展示出自己专业、成熟、勇敢的骑士本来面目…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>有没有什么办法解除诅咒呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>只有发自真心的尊敬可以解除酒鬼大叔身上的诅咒。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那我就去当这个解除诅咒的人吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>噔噔！诅咒解除了，现在法尔伽大团长可以选择成为酒鬼大叔或者可靠的骑士。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>然后法尔伽说，我本来就是邋遢的酒鬼大叔，真是对不起哦。于是白天黑夜全都是酒鬼大叔了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>太糟糕了！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>纳塔流传的故事则是，有一个被诅咒的女孩子，白天是为老不尊、目中无人的老婆婆，晚上则会变成单纯的少女。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>只有…呃，只有和她聊喜欢的东西才能解除诅咒。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我都能猜到结局了。珐露珊前辈的话，一定会「呵呵呵，年纪大怎么了，新生娃子你们有什么意见吗？」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没错，而茜特菈莉就会——\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>茜特菈莉应该就会又委屈又着急地说：「我本来就是普通女孩子啊！？」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>好像也没有诅咒？

- Yes! That's the one. I can't afford to let that happen again... I really must rein in my drinking. ｜ 没错！就是这把，我以后可不能…嗯，以后要喝少点了。
- You're back! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！你回来了？
- Excellent! Only a true hero like you could have immediately seen through the true essence of this trial! ｜ #好，好！不想{M#少侠}{F#女侠}竟能一眼窥破此中真意，不愧是当今豪杰！
- #Lemarcq, {NICKNAME}, let's take them down! ｜ #勒马克，{NICKNAME}！动手！把他们都放倒！
- Sure, but that's a little sudden of you... ｜ 借用厨房倒是没问题，可你们为什么突然…
- An ornamental urn that once belonged to the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Mournful winds seem to echo within its empty interior. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的首饰瓮，空空如也的腹内仿佛回响着哀戚的风声。
- Defeat Local Legend, Rulers of the Chizhang Mountains. ｜ 战胜地方传奇·赤璋巡岳府君。
- I didn't bring my Tetrasour Wolfhooks or Type-V Bittermore Calla Lilies with me when I left home today, though... Will you be dropping by Mondstadt City tomorrow? ｜ 但我今天出门时没把四倍酸钩钩果和伍式嘟嘟莲苦味加强版装进包里…你明天会来蒙德城吗？
- Refunds 15% of the ore used when crafting Polearm-type weapons. ｜ 锻造长柄武器时，返还15%消耗的矿石。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒

- Great, let me have a taste. ｜ 那太好了，让我尝尝。
- Yes. ｜ 对。

- Huh? Why are you apologizing? ｜ 嗯嗯？为什么要道歉？
- In most cases, it's because I think the texture isn't quite right, or the flavor needs a lot more work... But that doesn't mean I'm about to give up. ｜ 多数是因为我觉得口感不佳，要么就是味道上还有很大改进空间…但我没打算在半山腰停下来。
- So if I also stay and help... Umm, that still sounds kinda scary... ｜ 那我要是也留下来帮忙…呃，还、还是有点不敢。

- It was tribespeople from the Flower-Feather Clan who guided us through... Perhaps you can make similar arrangements. But whatever you do, do not breathe anything in... ｜ 当时是「花羽会」的部族成员带我们穿越过去的…或许你们也能找到同样的手段，不过，这过程中可得小心，不能随意呼吸…

- In our journey through the ages, it is inevitable that Oz and I will sometimes act separately. ｜ 长久的旅途中，奥兹偶尔也会与本皇女分头行动。
- But Zurvan said that you guys shouldn't know about the Great Songs' existence, you know? ｜ 不过祖尔宛不是说，矫论团的人应该不知道「灵光绝唱」的存在才对吗？
- That's not the kind of person he is. ｜ 提尔扎德不是那种人。
- I'll make one for him. ｜ 我编一个给你好了。
