- Adeptus! Please return me to my original position, that I may restore peace to the land... ｜ 这位仙人！还请将我复归原位，以镇此方安宁…
- Thank you! I'll make a few more improvements, and then I'll hand it in. ｜ 谢谢你，那我再修改一番就去交作业啦！
- A Millelith member would like to ask Noelle for help... ｜ 一名千岩军似乎想要拜托诺艾尔帮忙…
- A smiling woodcarving head that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It's painted pink and reminds people of huge flowers in full bloom.\nThe curvature of one's mouth is proof of one's friendliness and politeness. Just like most of the Aranara in the fairy tales, these make new friends with sincerity and a smile. ｜ 露出笑容的木刻脑袋，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。以颜料涂制成粉色，让人联想起大朵盛放的花。\n嘴部弯曲的弧度是友好与礼貌的证明。童话中大部分的兰那罗便是这般，靠着真诚与笑容结识了一个又一个新朋友。

- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- <color=#FFCC33>Menacing Projectiles</color> and <color=#FFCC33>Energizing Projectiles</color> will appear at intervals during the challenge. You will take DMG if hit by Menacing Projectiles, while Energizing Projectiles will grant you Fayz Force and increase your Verification Score. ｜ 挑战中将间歇性出现<color=#FFCC33>威胁弹幕</color>与<color=#FFCC33>能量弹幕</color>，被威胁弹幕击中会受到伤害，触碰能量弹幕可获得「溢神能量」并增加验证分数。
- No! It can't be! That's impossible...! ｜ 不！不可能，难道你是…？！
- Well, no matter what, we should head back and tell Nakul what happened. ｜ 唔，不管怎么说，先回去告诉纳库尔吧。
- A fantasy novel doing the rounds among the tribes of Natlan that is said to be translated from a popular work by the reputedly famous Fontainian author K'n-yan. The Natlanese who have visited the Court of Fontaine, however, claim to have been unable to find the original — nor has anyone managed to find a local who's ever heard of an author named "K'n-yan". ｜ 在纳塔的部族间流传的幻想小说，据说翻译自枫丹著名作家昆扬的大热作品。然而根据曾经到访过枫丹廷的纳塔人的说法，他们从未找到过这本小说的原版，当地人也没听说过名为昆扬的作家。
- Oh, we weren't waiting long at all! Is there something else you wanted to tell us? ｜ 不久不久，夏沃蕾有什么事要和我们说吗？
- Keep exploring ｜ 继续探索

- Hoho... I am indeed very happy to see Vanarana so lively, with so many Aranara having returned home. Ah, I never thought that I'd be able to participate in Festival Utsava in person... ｜ 呵呵呵…老身看到桓那兰那这么热闹，有这么多兰那罗回家了，真是太高兴了。哎呀，没想到能亲身参与无忧节…
- Anyone else would probably make it around three paces. ｜ 如果一般的人进去，应该能坚持差不多三步的路吧。
- As for the Akademiya... As long as we come up with an appropriate course name, we should be able to get away with this... ｜ 至于教令院那边，嗯…只要想一个看起来说得通的「课程名称」，就能应付过去了…
- It's a pity, though... I was so close to achieving the state of mind that Shenhe was talking about... ｜ 只可惜，差一点就能抓住申鹤说的那种心境了…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- What's more, you've met and helped our family. ｜ 更何况你和我们一家相识一场，这样吧，我也没有什么其他能做的事。

- Thanks for your time. ｜ 不打扰了。
- Master Lu, I'm almost done with the four-chair set the village head wanted, but I ran out of wood for the last chair. ｜ 路爷，村长要的椅子一套四只，除了最后一只木头不够，其他我都打好了。
- Diluc... I mean, Master Diluc has had a rough go of it these past few years, but he seems to be in good spirits this year. ｜ 迪卢克少爷…不，迪卢克老爷这几年过得很不容易，但今年我看他心情还挺不错的。
- When a character hits an opponent with a <color=#FFCC33>Charged Attack</color>, a Pyro/Hydro/Electro/Cryo shockwave will be unleashed randomly at the character's position, dealing respective Elemental DMG. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#FFCC33>{0}</color>s. Completing specific challenges in the trial will further elevate shockwave DMG. ｜ 角色的<color=#FFCC33>重击</color>命中敌人时，将在当前角色的位置随机释放一次火/水/雷/冰元素冲击波，造成对应元素的伤害。此效果每<color=#FFCC33>{0}</color>秒至多触发一次。在试炼中完成特定挑战，可以使冲击波伤害进一步提升。
- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- "Well, I think that's a great idea. I'll hit Citlali up later. She might be interested, too." ｜ 「我觉得挺好的，等会我去找茜特菈莉聊聊，说不定她也会很有兴趣。」

- Unfortunately, my mother didn't realize that I had put it there. When she had a meeting with a client the next day, she handed my blueprint to him by mistake. The client was completely confused by this "new" blueprint, but apparently he felt too tongue-tied to question such a famous architect. ｜ 没想到第二天母亲一时疏忽，错把我那份设计稿交给了委托人。委托人看了半天也没看懂，又碍于母亲的名声不方便当场询问。
- Enter the airborne workshop ｜ 进入空中工坊
- Good luck. As for your training route, just leave it to us. ｜ 加油。修行的路线就交给我们吧。
- Everything has been prepared, and once initialized and in operation, the Spike will not need any initial elemental energy input to maintain its charging state. ｜ 一切都已准备好，之后就能启动并进行运转，而且甚至不需要用元素力给予「普尔希娜光钉」初始动力，也可持续充能。
- Besides, as a deaconess, I could never simply ignore such a matter. I must take the appropriate actions and make things right. ｜ 而且我作为祈礼牧师，也更加不能忽视这件事…必须要妥善处理才好。
- Never mind this for now. I'll go take a look at the situation. Need to make a report to Lan later... ｜ 先不说这些了，我得再去看看情况。等会还要去给岚姐报告呢…
- Yep, that's right! But although it's the most impressive-sounding of the three, to be honest, we all made an equal contribution toward the founding of this world. ｜ 嗯，没错哟。虽然这个名字听起来厉害了点，但其实当时我们三个人出的力都差不多。
- The volcano has always been known for accidents and mishaps, and remains a vulnerable spot for monster attacks. They could come in from both inside and out, so it's the least we can do to keep a close eye on it. ｜ 火山自古以来就是事故多发地，无论是从里还是从外都容易遭受魔物袭击，我们可得看紧点。

- Good, let's keep going then. ｜ 嗯，我们继续前进吧…

- Now, give it a try. ｜ 好了，你自己去试试看吧。
- Oh, come on, you only think it's rare because you never used to listen to a word I say. ｜ 哎呀，那不还是因为以前的你根本听不进去嘛。
- Truth be told, we aren't sure whether trying to keep him here is the right thing to do. But equally... it doesn't feel right to let him leave when he's in this state. He's a lost soul. ｜ 我们其实也不知道该不该挽留他，但总觉得…不能让他像这样失魂落魄地离开。

- Concerned ｜ 关心

- And then there were three. ｜ 他们三个走了呢。
- (The infirmary is often empty in the afternoon. This is likely related to Sigewinne's absence during this time.) ｜ （中午的医务室总是空荡荡的，希格雯小姐不知所踪，这之间应该有关联。）
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- One hereby declares you Captain of the Royal Guard of the Immernachtreich. ｜ 幽夜净土的宫廷侍卫长已然就位。
- "The smuggling case was solved by the joint forces of the Gardes and Marechaussee Phantom..." This is the one. ｜ 「警备队与逐影庭联手破获了一起走私案」…就是这个。
- Clear the path shrouded in shade and the rift choked with filth! ｜ 去清理幽影盘踞的道路与淤泥盘踞的罅隙吧！
- You're bound to run into something in such a strange and eerie place... ｜ 行走在这种阴森诡异的地方，说不定就会看到什么不该看到的东西。
- Don't worry. Leave this to me. ｜ 交给我吧。
- Go, friend! ｜ 加油，朋友！
- Wait, what!? So all of this was a complete waste of time!? ｜ 喂！那不是全白费了吗！
- About that book and the battle we just fought... ｜ 关于那本书和刚才的战斗…
- Ugh... It's the thought that counts. ｜ 心意我领了。
- You two just gotta keep playing it natural and join the contest. Got it? Okay, see ya later! ｜ 总之你们还是和之前一样，放心参加试胆大会就行。回头再见——
- With all these certificates, a sailor is equipped to solve most of the problems of navigation. ｜ 拿到这些证书后，一名船员就具有了解决航海中大部分问题的能力。
- See you next time! ｜ 那就来日再见了！
- Open the iron gate ｜ 开启铁门
- So this is... where it ends... ｜ 只能…到此为止了吗…
- Still, if I want to get a new plank, who knows when I will finish that barrel. ｜ 不过，如果想要新找一块木板的话，不知道什么时候才能把木桶给做好。
- Failed to save ｜ 保存失败
- Of course I do, that's what I'm supposed to do! ｜ 那也是理所当然的嘛。
- I like summer! But not just summer. ｜ 可莉喜欢夏天！但也不是只喜欢夏天…
- Besides that, the sandstorm at the top of the Mausoleum of King Deshret is still as I remember it from my youth. So, I suspect that Tirzad never entered the Mausoleum of King Deshret. He probably made it all up. ｜ 并且，赤王陵顶端的沙瀑和我年轻时候相比，也没什么变化。所以我猜提尔扎德他根本没进赤王陵，而是杜撰了经历。
- An artificed spare clockwork component belonging to Coppelius. It powers this artificed dancer.\nThe artificed dancer whirls to a platinum tune, performing an unending waltz of icewind. Coppelius's dance will not stop. He will continue whirling till the bell tolls. ｜ 属于科培琉司的奇械发条备件，能够为奇械舞者提供能源。\n奇械舞者踏着白金的音节，不知昼夜地为观众献上冰风的轮舞。科培琉司不会停下舞步，直至丧钟敲响。
- Looks like I'd better tread carefully! ｜ 看来我要小心喽。
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- You know Penny? She's spoken to you about me? What a coincidence. ｜ 原来你们认识佩妮？她对你们说了我的事？那可真是太巧了。
- So you didn't even make those wings! ｜ 「燃素翼」原来不是你们造的啊！
- Haha! So, the final trial. Sometimes, the most dangerous moment comes precisely when you're closest to victory... ｜ 哈哈，最终的试炼，有的时候，最危险的反而是最接近胜利的时刻呢…
- Speaking of which, Kama was pretty quick to make a getaway during that fight, huh... ｜ 说起来…刚刚战斗的时候，阿釜跑得好快。
- There have been so many things that need taking care of lately, so I might have to bother you with cleanup duties next time as well. ｜ 近期还有不少要花精力的事，下次清理可能还要麻烦您了。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人

- A crop rack built from Otogi Wood that can be used to cultivate all kinds of fruits and vegetables.\nAlthough the Shogunate gives a certain monthly subsidy to fruit farmers for the sake of supporting the local fruit industry, it is impossible to say how much Mora the farmers actually get their hands on. - These duels are once in a century! Each table is a storm of activity, and old grudges will be settled on this day! ｜ 世纪之战！决赛桌前雷雨翻腾，古今纷争于此作结！
- Scorpions are only active under the veil of night. There is still some time before the night falls. Why don't we plan how we hunt the Scorpion? ｜ 毒蝎昼伏夜出，现在距离夜晚还有一段时间。我们可以先计划一下捕猎方式。
- Afratu ｜ 阿弗拉图
- Pardon us for a moment! ｜ 你先忙，不打扰了！
- But sometimes, when I wake, I see friends who should not be here anymore... Are they monsters? That must be it... They're monsters that have taken the form of my friends. ｜ 但有的时候，醒来却能看到本来不应该再出现的朋友…那些是怪物吗？大概，是变成我朋友模样的怪物吧。
- I am a merchant who has traveled a very long way. Is this how this kingdom deals with trades? ｜ 我虽是行商却也是远道而来，难道王国的规矩是这样把客人招待？
- I've watched every one of her matches. She constantly adapts her strategy, and excels at employing rare and unusual tactics. ｜ 她的每场比赛我都看了，这位军师战术多变，也擅用奇策。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Sure. ｜ 没问题。
- Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with Millennial Pearl Seahorse ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中小王子处进行酒馆挑战，在友好对局难度千年珍珠骏麟中获得胜利后获取
- We aren't "little" anything! You're just way too big! ｜ 我们才不是什么小东西啦，只是因为大家伙你太大了而已！
- Faced with the overwhelming evidence, the embassy won't investigate this any further. In fact, they'll be only too happy to blame it all on a rogue operation by you. ｜ 证据确凿的情况下，使馆不会再要什么交代，反而会把一切归咎为您自作主张。
- About Us: Rumors ｜ 关于我们·传闻
- Talk to Nora ｜ 与诺拉对话
- Shame... I thought that this would make for an interesting story, but Kama wouldn't tell me how it all went down. ｜ 明明感觉可以写成有趣的情节，但阿釜就是不愿意告诉我过程。
- She enjoys being free and traveling around. She must have been really unhappy at being trapped in Inazuma. ｜ 她那么自由自在，喜欢到处探险游玩，被锁在稻妻国内才难受呢。
- I learned a lot yesterday. I'm sure I can handle a few design elements while you get some rest. ｜ 昨天我已经学到了不少，应该可以应付一些简单的设计工作了。等你养好精神，再来验收也不迟？
- Achoo! Ugh... ｜ 哈啾！呜呜…
- I put up a good fight, and we won, even though it cost us dearly... ｜ 我还是打了一场好仗，我们赢了，虽然付出了很多代价…
- Yet, according to the Saurian Relics Association's records, these young Saurians that bear this mark are wracked by uncontrollable forces that rise within their bodies as they grow... ｜ 只是…据龙遗物研究协会的记载来看，这些身上有「焰主之祝」印记的幼龙大多数在成长过程中，受体内不可控的力量摆布…
- #We're just lucky we had {NICKNAME} to help out. What if something had happened to you, huh? What would I say to our audience, hmm? ｜ #还好这回请来了{NICKNAME}，不然真要是有个万一，我们还怎么跟台下交代？
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- You practiced with Baron Bunny? ｜ 是和兔兔伯爵练习的？
- Bizarre Transcript ｜ 怪异的抄本
- And if you still remember the tabletop game, Fungus Mechanicus, then you can give the brand-new Lil' Fungi's Fun-Tastic Fiesta a try. ｜ 不止如此，如果你们对以前玩过的桌上游戏「灵蕈棋阵」还有印象，那也可以来试试全新的「小小灵蕈大幻戏」。
- Okay, I'll head down to the harbor and see about changing the tickets... I'm warning you, you'd better not go spending all our Mora while I'm gone! ｜ 我就先去港口那边打个招呼…你们千万注意控制成本！
- The leader of the Three Royal Blades is right over there, waiting for your arrival... ｜ 请…我们「王下三人众」的首领在那个方向恭候您的到来…
- Go to the venue to attend the toasting ceremony ｜ 前往会场参加举杯仪式
- ...Yes, this does have the hallmarks of something Pervases might do. ｜ …原来是他啊，确实有他的风格。
- Coco... Yes. That's what that girl called me — the one who woke me up from the Core of Chu'ulel... But I could not save her... ｜ 绿宝…啊，是那个小女孩给我起的名字，正是她将我从统律之心中唤醒的…但我却没能救得了她…
- An Aranara-style dish that Paimon drained her brain juice dry to improve. But in fact, it only requires a few common mushrooms from Sumeru, along with some extra seasonings. As for its flavor, you'd believe you've tasted the wildness of nature — ahem, "the scent of the remaining heaps of dirt" is probably the more accurate description though. Such bounties of the mountains and forests are best left for the boars to savor. ｜ 经过派蒙苦思冥想改良后的兰那罗烧菇，其实也就是市面上常见的须弥烧菇多加了点调味料。该说是野性的味道好呢，还是应该说…充满了没有洗干净的泥土的芬芳。唉，此等自然馈赠，可能只有林中的山猪才能甘之如饴吧。
- #You've arrived, {NICKNAME}. I hope that our hospitality hasn't disappointed you. ｜ #你们来了。{NICKNAME}，希望部族的招待没有令你失望。
- "Count Crushmore," "Instant Kill"... I never knew there were so many elite beetle-fighters in Liyue. ｜ 「天崩石裂」、「不如一刀」…没想到璃月也有这么多斗虫强者。
- This... What's going on? Why aren't you eating anymore? ｜ 这…这是怎么回事？你怎么也不吃了…
- We would get over it, of course. But, if you do die, just go without regrets. ｜ 我当然没什么所谓，你们只要别不甘心就好。
- Hmm, I should probably take a look at the other envelopes first... ｜ 唔，还是先参考一下其他「祝柬」吧…
- Hmm... ｜ 唔…
- But Venti's telling his story! What makes you suddenly wanna have a meat feast!? ｜ 咦？不是在听故事吗？怎么突然要吃这种东西！
- Holy Sovereign's Notes (V) ｜ 圣王的手记·其五
- If Paimon helps you out, that'll just make more trouble for Yanfei, and then Shinobu will owe her a favor. ｜ #不然，我和{NICKNAME}帮你，岂不是在给烟绯添麻烦，让阿忍欠人情么？
- Meeting you has really opened my eyes to things other than cooking. Like what? Well, such as... um... for example... I can't think when you put me on the spot! Forget it, I'll stick to cooking from now on. I have a new recipe for you to try, actually... ｜ 自从认识你，我好像学会了不少料理以外的知识。欸？呃…你问我都有些什么？嗯…嗯…你突然这样问，我又有点想不起来了。算了算了，我原本就不擅长这些，还是给你做两道新菜尝尝吧！
- Whoa, that was close! If this wind blows my hat off, all the props I keep inside it would come tumbling down onto my head. ｜ 呼，好险。要是帽子被风吹跑的话，里面的道具就会哗啦啦砸在我脑袋上了。
- Hey, that's pretty good! I'll have to remember that for my ad posters. ｜ 噢这个说法好！我要记下来，到时候宣传海报用得上。
- I still need three Henna Berries. Could you get them for me? ｜ 我的药方里还差三枚赤念果，拜托你帮我去采三枚回来吧。

- Labyrinth Warriors ｜ 谜境悬兵
- Rhythm of the Great Dream ｜ 大梦的曲调
- #Besides... {NICKNAME} isn't a beetle fighting professional, so even if you come with us, you won't get too many work opportunities. ｜ #而且…{NICKNAME}也不是斗虫专业户，你跟着我们，不一定有那么多工作的机会哦！
- Huh. Wait. Paimon's remembering something... ｜ 嗯？等一下，我总觉得好像想到了点什么…
- ...Thrice-damned wretched worms... I wish not to gaze upon such... crude misuse of Phlogiston... Such shameful barbarism! ｜ …受诅的蠹虫，恶心的劣种，竟让我看到那些…如此拙劣的、滥用燃素的方式…何等野蛮的羞辱…
- A fishing point located in the southern waters of Ochkanatlan. It has considerable quantities of fish, but for most anglers, coming here to fish is considered quite dangerous. For this reason, the abundance of fish here has been preserved for many a long year, awaiting champions who have mastered both sword and rod... ｜ 位于奥奇卡纳塔南侧水域的钓点，鱼类资源可观，但对于多数鱼师而言，前往此地钓鱼的风险较高，因此，丰富的鱼类资源正为鱼竿与剑的双重强者长久留存…
- Your training is almost at its end. You'll definitely win Zurvan's approval! ｜ 斯露莎的训练还剩最后一点就结束了，肯定可以得到祖尔宛的认可的！
- Master Zhang and Shenhe start making the Wonder Cores and the Adepti Sigils. ｜ 老章和申鹤开始各自制备千奇核心与仙家符箓…
- And what good is that if your novel gets axed long before you get there? ｜ 在那一天之前，你的这本小说就要被腰斩了！
- Does anyone have a Kamera? ｜ 有人带留影机了吗？
- {0} remaining ｜ 剩余{0}次
- In the past, people could only discover secrets within stones by breaking huge boulders apart... Say, maybe only the heavy cannons on battleships could do that? ｜ 以前的人们要发掘石头里的秘密，还要把大块的岩石打碎…只有战舰上的重炮才能做到吧？
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- <color=#FF5E41FF>A Chaos Cluster</color> has appeared! ｜ <color=#FF5E41FF>混沌能量团</color>出现了！
- There's no way that'd happen, stop overthinking it. ｜ 怎么可能，别想太多了。
- Welcome to stronghold numero two of the Arataki Gang, haha! ｜ 欢迎回到荒泷派第二据点，哈哈。
- Feather of Jagged Peaks ｜ 嵯峨群峰之翼
- ??? ｜ ？？？

- But... Plus, lots of the guests are visiting from other nations. We can't just bring in some random chef off the street — we have a reputation to uphold! I refuse to let someone else ruin the good name we've made for ourselves here! ｜ 客人里头还有不少远道而来的外宾，这要是随便找个厨子应付，万一砸了我们客栈的招牌…我第一个不答应！

- Free the trapped person ｜ 解救被困的人
- Only the hubris of one who believes themselves above the world can give rise to miracles. ｜ 狂妄自大地认为自己高于世界才能引发奇迹。
- How did it go? Did you take care of them? ｜ 怎么样，你把那些赤鹫都解决掉了吗？
- Optimist or not, everyone has bad dreams. Maybe they're just hidden even deeper in your mind... You're a unique case, as I suspected. ｜ #不，所有人都会做噩梦的，可能是藏得太深了，{NICKNAME}果真是很特殊的案例…
- I'm Baulard, a peripheral intelligence officer. What "peripheral" means is that I'm not very important. ｜ 我叫伯拉尔，一名外围情报人员。外围的意思，就是不怎么重要的那种。
- Forget it. Forget it! I have nothing to say to attention-deficient louts like you. Here's 1,000 Mora — take it and be off! ｜ 算了算了，和你这种办事心不在焉的人没什么好说的，就1000摩拉，拿好了，赶紧走人！
- All party members' Shield Strength decreased by 50%. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的护盾强效降低50%。

- Patrice ｜ 帕特里克
- Ah, raring to go, I see. That's the Envoy's Yasnapati, indeed. ｜ 哦哦，干劲满满啊，不愧是尊使的谒颂主。
- Okay. Here you go. ｜ ——喏，给你。
- And furthermore, do Onikabuto really come in this size? You're not trying to con me, are you? ｜ 话说回来，真的有这么大的鬼兜虫吗？你不会在骗人吧？
- A unique type of Trap said to utilize technology developed by the Fontaine Research Institute. Equipped with a metal protective cage and hook bars, the device contains a light made from Marcotte extract.\nWhen tossed in water, the light flashes at a certain frequency to attract nearby Maintenance Meks, which are often referred to as "Water Maintenance Fish" or "Iron Fish." Maintenance Meks have powerful bites, but they are only able to bite onto the specially made external bars which hook them firmly in place. The contraption is essentially a special kind of bait designed to catch valuable "Iron Fishes."\n\nSuitable for catching Maintenance Meks. ｜ 极为特殊的「诱捕装置」，传说运用了枫丹科学院某开发组外流的技术。装置外部装有金属制作的保护笼和咬钩筋条，内部则是含有茉洁草提取物的灯具。\n投入水中后，装置内部的灯具会以特定频率闪烁，吸引附近的「维护机关」，也就是人们俗称的「水域维护鱼」或「铁鱼」。「维护机关」们的咬力强大，但也只能咬到外部的特质筋条，并牢牢固定在上边。本质上，这也算得上是一种特别的「鱼饵」，专用于钓获价值不菲的「铁鱼」。\n\n适用鱼种：维护机关类。
- Oh, now this is not bad. You've got some skill, alright. ｜ 哦！这个东西不错啊，你手脚还挺利索的嘛。

- Oh, and by the way, the limited edition perfume I bought previously is coming in soon. Would you like some? I can lend it to you. ｜ 倒是前不久我买的限量款香水就要到了，你需要吗？可以借给你哟。
- Though as expected, the mastermind isn't here... ｜ 始作俑者果然没有躲在这里呢。
- *taps the tea cauldron* Or like this... ｜ （敲击茶釜）像这样…
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰

- Find the owner of the voice ｜ 寻找「声音」的主人
- No. In fact, he'd actually bought one back a long time ago. He even knows about everything that's happened recently, and asked me to try the typewriter to see if the size was appropriate. ｜ 没有，大哥其实早就带了一台回来，还说自己已经听说了事情的来龙去脉，让我先去试试打字机的尺寸。
- Well, guess I'll just wait here for him... I bet Daddy would be worried sick if he came home and couldn't find me. ｜ 好吧，那我还是在这里等着吧…要是爸爸回来的时候找不到我，他准要着急了。
- Default brightness restored ｜ 已恢复至默认亮度
- Mystery Cache effect triggered, lose all of your Fantasia Flowers ｜ 触发神秘收获效果，失去全部「幻剧之花」
- Don't worry. The Shogun's not broken, I've just temporarily disabled many of her functions. ｜ 不用担心，那是我本人所为。将军的很多功能，都被我暂时禁用了。
- Hiratsuka, Yae Publishing House ｜ 八重堂的平冢
- I said, get out!!! ｜ 给我滚！
- Artificed Mechanicus: Glacial Bloom periodically fires a Frost Bullet that moves in a straight line. Deals Cryo DMG to the first opponent it hits. ｜ 每隔一段时间，「拟想机关·鲛冰万华」就会自动向前发射直线移动的霜棱，对首次命中的敌人造成冰元素伤害。
- Pack-Wearing Monster ｜ 怪物带背包
- Nilou, there will always be a victim, whether it's me or the theater. You can't eat your cake and have it, too. ｜ 总会有牺牲的，妮露，无论是我还是剧场，没有两全的办法。
- ...Let's discuss that over by the tent. There were a few things that I didn't bring up because the madame was here. ｜ …我们去帐篷那边聊吧，刚才祖莉亚夫人在，我也有些话没说。
- My Kamera's in pretty good shape. ｜ 留影机的状态还不错…
- So, this is where futures come into play. Futures are not your run-of-the-mill, face-to-face trading, but a "trading agreement." ｜ 所以，这个时候期货就出现了。期货不是一般的当着面一手交钱一手交货，而是一种「交易协定」。
- But because I was getting up so early... my singing wasn't getting any better. Sometimes I'd be half asleep, singing the wrong lyrics, it was a disaster... ｜ 不过…因为起得太早了，最开始我练习根本没什么成果，有时候迷迷糊糊地连唱了什么都不知道，一点练习效果都没有…
- Complete "As Light Rain Falls Without Reason" ｜ 完成「仿若无因飘落的轻雨」剧情

- This looks like part of the same set as the one that Kokomi gave us... Wait, now's not the time for that... ｜ 这个东西，似乎和心海给我们的是一套欸。不对，不是在意这个的时候了…

- ？？？ ｜ (test)米卡的来信

- Use the Gaze of the Deep to move the floating Shadowy Cubes. ｜ 运用「幽邃鸦眼」，可以移动漂浮的「幽暗方块」。
- You're really annoying, you know that? ｜ 你很烦欸。
- Huh? What's wrong, High Priestess Citlali? ｜ 欸？茜特菈莉大祭司，怎么了吗？
- But by the time I met him, he'd already become old and was called the old ghost, and he'd also come to dislike children. ｜ 但我见到他的时候，他已经老了，被人叫作鬼老头，变得讨厌小孩子。
- If you're looking for the Knights of Favonius, they're busy with those monsters again. ｜ 如果要找骑士团，他们现在没时间，「那群魔物」又回来了。
- Hmm... Let's put this away for now. I'll let Curve take a look later... ｜ 唔…先把这个收起来好了，等我回去给曲线检查一下…

- Xixi ｜ 西西

- I don't quite feel at home. ｜ 没有宾至如归的感觉…
- #"O brave and keen {NICKNAME}, let this noble Saurian lead you to the most precious gem in the world!" ｜ #「勇敢而机智的{NICKNAME}呀，就让本贤龙指引你找到超级厉害的宝石吧——」

- So, your first possession, hmm? What was it like? ｜ 第一次被附身，有什么感觉吗？
- #(What do we do, {NICKNAME}? Do we still stick to this offer?) ｜ #（{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我们还要坚持这个数目吗？）
- This is the amount assigned by Sango herself, so I believe it should be commensurate. Please take them. We may yet have more work for you in the future. ｜ 这是社长亲自指定的数目，应该是十分合适的，请收下吧，说不定之后还要麻烦你。
- #But Paimon and {NICKNAME} fought Storm-Storm. So, is he a bad dragon too? ｜ #但是，派蒙和{NICKNAME}跟风风龙战斗的话，风风龙也是坏龙吗？
- Oh, sure. We don't really have anything to do now, and we wanted to go to the opera house anyway. ｜ 好啊好啊，反正我们暂时也没有什么事情做，而且之前本来就说要去歌剧院的。
- All she wanted was for her daddy to sing to her... Such a simple thing. Such a small thing. And I failed to give her even that... ｜ 她的愿望是那么的简单、渺小，可连这样的事情我都没能为她做…
- *snore*... Grilled Chicken Drumsticks... Nom nom nom... ｜ 呼噜…烤鸡腿，嘿嘿…
- Message ｜ 留言
- Still, no matter who you are, good heroes from all walks of life, please watch over us here in Liyue, and grant us your blessings! ｜ 总之，无论身份如何，各路英雄豪杰，请保佑我们璃月人的生活日新月异吧！
- Go to Quest ｜ 前往任务
- But within Teyvat, the stars in the sky will always have a place for us. Even if astrology is resolutely rational, fate remains arbitrary, cruel, but romantic. ｜ 但提瓦特的星空里永远有你我的位置。哪怕占星术是绝对的理性…命运却是无常、残酷与浪漫。
- Base Shield DMG Absorption|{param3:F1P} Max HP+{param4:I} ｜ 护盾基础吸收量|{param3:F1P}生命值上限+{param4:I}
- Gorou's face is twisting up something awful... ｜ 五郎一脸无法忍受的表情啊…
- Ahem... Y—Yes! Commander, this is the Traveler I mentioned. ｜ 咳…是，是的！长官，这位就是我向您提到的那位「旅行者」。
- To be able to overcome problems by oneself, that's the point of training, right? ｜ 遇到困难时自己想办法解决困难，这才是训练的目的吧？
- Well, we've played with Teucer long enough, haven't we? Paimon thinks we've tried our best here... ｜ 嗯，不过我们已经陪托克玩了很久了吧？也算是尽我们的全力了…
- Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just getting ready. Who better than an Outrider to mop up some hilichurls on the delivery route? ｜ 哇，是你们。我正准备去呢，清理商路上的丘丘人什么的，交给侦察骑士再合适不过了！
- Biat ye, ye pupu dada mosi! Plama ye upa dada! ｜ Biat ye, ye pupu dada mosi! Plama ye upa dada!
- Unless you know of any other parasites who'd shamelessly come here every day asking for food... ｜ 除了他还有谁，天下就他一个人腆着脸天天在我这蹭饭…
- But I can't, you see! Goldman designated this spot... never mind that quite a few people were injured, or even lost their lives while working here. ｜ 那可不行啊。这里是戈尔德曼划定的地点…之前就有不少人在这里打捞时受了伤，甚至丢了命。
- This is an important item; we can't leave it out of the picture. Let's find another place for it. ｜ 这可是重要道具，不能放到画外。换个地方吧。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- That's right. You can't go back on your agreement with us now! ｜ 就是就是。要不然，也太对不起我们了！
- This sounds just like something you would say. ｜ 这回答很有你的风格。
- Anyway, thank you very much. Is there anything more you can tell me about Guuji Yae? ｜ 非常感谢，请问还有什么关于八重宫司的消息吗？
- Mr. Gorou, did you come here to check on the fertilizer as well? ｜ 五郎先生，难道你也是想要看看这肥料的情况，所以才过来了吗？
- If I don't do this, the Shogun's rules can never change, and Inazuma can never move forward. ｜ 不这样做，将军的法则就无从改变，稻妻亦无「前进」可言。
- What are you two talking about? Are you... complimenting Paimon? Hmm, doesn't quite seem like it... ｜ 你们在说什么奇怪的话，嗯？是、是在夸我吗…总觉得又不太像。
- Then get ready to use it. Tonight's grand finale should be coming up any minute now. ｜ 那就拿好吧，接下来应该才是今晚的重头戏。
- Ah, well, since you asked... Forgive me for being blunt, but I'm afraid not. The scenery here makes it a great place to live. But, it's missing quite a few necessities as far as a perfume studio is concerned. ｜ 如果你这么说…请恕我直言，这里风景很好，是适合居住的地方，可作为制香的工作室还欠缺了不少必要的布置。
- Well, um, that's because my shoes aren't suited to climbing. If I change shoes, I can definitely get you! ｜ 那是…那是因为我的鞋子不适合爬，要是换双鞋，肯定能抓住你！
- After using her Elemental Burst, <color=#FFD780FF>Hour of Burning Skies</color>, every point of Fighting Spirit present when it is used increases the DMG that the current active party member deals by 0.2%. The maximum increase obtainable this way is 40%, and this effect lasts 20s, decaying over this duration until it reaches 0. ｜ 施放元素爆发<color=#FFD780FF>燔天之时</color>后，依据施放时的战意，每点战意都将使当前场上角色造成的伤害提升0.2%，通过这种方式至多使队伍中的当前场上角色造成的伤害提升40%，该效果持续20秒，并会在持续时间内逐渐降低为0。
- Place beat notes according to the rhythm of the music ｜ 音乐播放过程中可根据节奏布设音符
- CD|{param12:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param12:F1}秒
- Talk to Atea ｜ 与阿伽娅交谈
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- The majesty and divinity of Rex Lapis at the rite made a deep impression on me, one that stayed with me my entire life — from my personality to the path I've chosen in life. ｜ 仪式上帝君的威严与神武令我十分震撼，甚至影响了我的一生…包括我的个性与人生道路的选择…
- Good timing, I just finished building a new deck... ｜ 你来得正好，我刚刚组了一套全新的卡组…
- No. ｜ 否。
- Soft rock, actually. ｜ 是轻摇滚。
- Huh!? Why would he say something like that? I mean, the guy's old, but he's still in great health. ｜ 啊？这怎么能瞎说呢，人家老先生活得好好的。
- Do your best, then. I'm not going easy on you just because you're my big brother. ｜ 那你可要卖力些，我可不会因为你是大哥就放宽标准。
- Favorite Food ｜ 喜欢的食物…
- Chlothar ｜ 克洛达尔
- ...Faunal contact? ｜ 动、动物？
- I can't cope... ｜ 这可怎么办…
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Phewee! Now that was fun! I can see why it's such a popular game. ...Hm? Oh, it's not about winning. All that matters to me is that I get to play with my partner! ｜ 呼啊…玩得真开心，这种卡牌游戏果然很有意思。欸？胜负无所谓啦，重点是能和搭档你一起玩卡牌啦。
- An envelope containing no particularly special information. If there is any information here, then it is that the letter within is already gone. ｜ 没有什么特殊信息的信封，如果一定要有，那就是里面的信已经不见了。
- Okay, I think I get the gist of things... ｜ 嗯，我大致明白了…
- And what enlightenment have you gained, perchance? ｜ 那你参悟出什么了？
- New Entry ｜ 新怪物
- These kids ran faster than birds could fly... ｜ 这些小家伙，跑得比飞的都快…
- Before we sign up, let's see who the other competitors are! ｜ 报名之前，我们先了解一下参赛者的情况吧。
- Are... the ones I have at home not enough? Then... ｜ 只用家里的那些…不够吗？那么…
- Blazin' Trails ｜ 烈火踏歌行
- Gluttonous Yumkasaur Mountain King ｜ 贪食匿叶龙山王
- They say he had every scroll ever written up to his time committed to memory, and that he was willing to go from tribe to tribe and share those tales... That said, they also say that he also mooched a lot of food and drink off them along the way... ｜ 据说他能记住古往今来所有织卷上的故事，并且愿意去往各个部族讲述，虽然…据说他也经常顺便骗吃骗喝…
- Wait, do you mean that Bona awakened you hundreds of years ago? ｜ 等等，你的意思是说，你被玻娜唤醒是几百年前的事情？
- And what's with that pile of knickknacks? Are they worshiping them? ｜ 难道说，那堆玩意里头，有它们想要供奉的东西？
- However, the Almighty Shogun was far more powerful than any human being. In a direct confrontation, the duel would be over in an instant. ｜ 只不过，将军大人的实力实在高出人类太多，如果直接与武人较量，这场对决恐怕瞬间就结束了。
- Don't panic. The operating system is working fine, and we've marked the target correctly... It should just be that we have reached our designated location. ｜ 别慌，运作机制正常，手动标的正常…应该是我们到达位置了。
- You don't believe me? Well, you should check the quality of my products before you make any judgment. ｜ 不信？那让你看看我的货品质量，自己判断吧。
- Fancy seeing you here, Master Diluc. ｜ 贵客贵客！
- Yeah, and we were attacked, too! Right when we were having fun with the play-testing... ｜ 然后又袭击了游乐了一整天、心满意足的我们…
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Life has taken plenty from us, like it did from Jemma. But at least it left us with each other. That's what gave us the strength to get through the darkest days. ｜ 命运同样从我们身上拿走了许多，好在给我们留下了最为重要的彼此，让我们能够度过那段艰难的时光。
- Area Progress: #1#/%1% ｜ 区域进度：#1#/%1%
- Each challenge has its own unique Roiling Resolve mechanism, which will confer buffs that correspond to the party's total Resolve.\nThe higher the party members' total Resolve, the more powerful the buffs.\nMake effective use of these buffs to complete challenges more easily. ｜ 每个挑战都具有独特的「激荡战意」：根据队伍中角色的战意值总和，提供特定的增益效果。\n队伍中角色的战意值总和越高，获得的增益效果越强。\n留意该效果并善加利用，即可在挑战中获得可观的助益。
- Retrieve the package beside the body of water ｜ 回收雪山中水域边的包裹
- Whether something is true or not simply isn't that important. The main thing is whether the story being acted out on the stage is splendid enough. ｜ 真实不真实本来就没有那么重要，只要舞台上正在上演的故事足够精彩就好了。
- Keep a close eye on them, Hisashi. ｜ 盯紧一点，尚。
- Wonderful! Ah, such excitement! Come then, traveler from afar, dear esteemed guest: Can you pass the test this time around? This way, please...! ｜ 好嘞！真是激动人心啊！那么，异邦的游者，了不起的客人，这次能够通过考验吗！请吧——！
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:P}
- I won't, Little Paimon. ｜ 我知道呀，小·派·蒙。
- Surely, now that I consider it, the Great Songs might have been stolen by now, were it not for the fact that only Lady Sorush may touch them. ｜ 这样一想，若不是只有斯露莎大人才能触碰那「灵光绝唱」，说不定早就被人捷足先登了。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Wait, so that means we're... ｜ 喂，难道说我们…
- Go with Hu Tao to meet your friends ｜ 陪胡桃去见见朋友们
- Heart of Clear Springs (II) ｜ 清泉之心·二
- Klee: Friendly ｜ 可莉·友好
- Step by Step ｜ 冒险就要步步为营
- Look at you, you're a national treasure. Even Gentry Maocai is in awe of you. ｜ 不愧是名动璃月的大角色，连茂才公都怵你三分呢。
- Our cart was also attacked. And now, our supplies are scattered everywhere... ｜ 我们装物资的车也被袭击了，东西散得到处都是…

### Part 068

- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Talk to Liloupar ｜ 与利露帕尔对话
- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- Oh, Paimon knows that feeling! When you know you've forgotten something but you can't remember exactly what it is. ｜ 啊，我懂这种感觉呢！知道自己忘了一件事，却想不起具体是什么事。
- As always, there will be a variety of activities taking place. Oh, but there is one of particular interest... The Ministry of Civil Affairs is planning a fireworks show this year. It should certainly be worth your time. ｜ 还是老样子，各种杂事。对了，总务司今年策划了一场「烟花会」，值得一看哦。
- This is the price she must pay... Yet I would not call it a bad thing. ｜ 这就是她要付出的代价了，但…这也并不失为一件好事。
- So long as the stage won't affect performance, I have no objections to Ms. Yun and Er'ye's arrangements. ｜ 只要这戏台修完了不再影响平时演出，具体怎么修都听云老板和二爷安排。
- Did you find anything? ｜ 你那边有什么头绪吗？
- You're 100 percent drunk... ｜ 根本就是真的喝醉了…
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Sennight Gauntlet ｜ 七日历练
- Test Package ｜ 测试包
- Most Liked Comment ｜ 「最受『支持』的留言」
- If more simple and low-cost watchtowers can be built, we will be able to control the border efficiently. ｜ 若是多多兴建结构简单，成本低廉的瞭望塔楼，就能有效控制边境线。
- I'm not too sure myself. The only thing that didn't change was his cheery disposition. He said there was absolutely nothing to worry about and that he had gotten into a fight, that was all. ｜ 我也不知道。唯一没变的，是他爽朗的表情，他说不用担心，只是被人打了而已。
- You bring Azalai up to speed on sourcing goods... ｜ 向阿扎莱讲述了订货的经过…
- Xiao, this gift envelope is for you. ｜ 这封祝柬，送给你。
- What do you mean... ｜ 什么是原本不可能…
- Rainy days are perfect for spacing out... ｜ 雨天适合发呆…
- "Don't listen to their baloney! All you have to do is eat well, get lots of exercise, and you'll be as strong as I am!" ｜ 「你别听这个人胡说，你只要好好吃饭，好好运动就可以强壮起来的！」
- Blond... dresses all funny... It feels like Paimon's heard this one before... ｜ 金发…衣着不同寻常的陌生人。总感觉这样的形容之前就听过一次了…
- We're just here to support you. ｜ 归根到底，我们只是外援。
- Create 1 <color=#80C0FFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#1102}Hydro Die</color>.\n(You must have at least 2 {SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color> characters in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ 生成1个<color=#80C0FFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#1102}水元素骰</color>。\n（牌组包含至少2个{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>角色，才能加入牌组）
- This area's combat effects are unknown. ｜ 此地存在的战斗效果未知。
- That's enough fuss for today. You two, take him away. The Honorary Knight and I have other matters to attend to. ｜ 不太明白你在吵什么。麻烦两位把他带走吧，我和荣誉骑士，接下来还有事要做。
- Traveler, Paimon! Did you hear the news? I made it through the selections for Masterful Chefs! ｜ 旅行者，派蒙！你们听说了吗？我顺利通过厨王争霸赛的预选啦！
- There are a lot of people in here. Could they all be refugees? ｜ 屋子里好像聚集了很多人，都是来避难的吗？
- Traveler on the Road ｜ 「路上的行者」
- Yes, though I try to avoid using it. I dislike the unfair advantage it gives me against my opponents. ｜ 嗯，只不过以「神之眼」退敌有恃强凌弱之嫌，所以我不太喜欢用。
- The Spindrift Knight, a scion of the old aristocracy, and the Captain of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company. The reason for which a descendant of the ancient nobles might join the Knights remains a great mystery in Mondstadt to this very day. ｜ 古老家族出身的「浪花骑士」，西风骑士团游击小队队长。身为旧贵族后裔却加入了堪称死对头的西风骑士团，该事件至今仍是蒙德一大谜团。
- Achieve victory in the stage "Hot Potato" ｜ 在关卡「烫烫爆弹」中获得胜利
- Do you drink wine? Dandelion wine has a unique body to it. Oh, you're underage? You should try Mondstadt's apple cider vinegar. I know just the place. ｜ 你喜欢酒吗？蒲公英酒的口感就很特别。什么？还没到喝酒的年纪？呵呵，那试一试蒙德的苹果酿吧，我知道一家还算不错的店。
- Score {param2} points ｜ 评分达到{param2}
- Amber's specialty. One side is obviously uncooked. The other side gives off a subtle scent of something burnt. Close your eyes and have a big mouthful, just to keep Amber happy if nothing else. ｜ 安柏的特色料理。一面泛着血色，另一面散发着微妙焦香气味的肉排。闭着眼大口吃下去，安柏会很高兴的吧。
- I've heard that you're flexible, highly experienced, and one of our top adventurers to boot... ｜ 我听说，你善于随机应变，精通各种冒险知识，身手也数一数二…
- Windfall ｜ 顺风而行
- Mysterious Samurai ｜ 神秘的武者
- Status Removed: {0} ｜ 失去状态：{0}
- If, one day, Dragonspine did become home to gardens and orchards, there would be more reasons for people to visit. Perhaps, a little life is the key to attracting people. ｜ 假如有一天雪山上有了花园和果园，人们接近雪山的理由也会变多吧。说不定，生命才是吸引人的根本。
- Liyue Reputation ｜ 璃月声望
- It's fine. As long as everyone wears little accessories, you can tell what they're supposed to be! ｜ 没事的，只要戴上小配饰就能区分大家的身份了！
- Forget it, then! ｜ 那还是算了！
- If we wish to access the Great Song of Khvarena, we need to find a way to bring Farrwicks, which radiate Khvarena, in. ｜ 要想顺利到达「灵光绝唱」那里，得想办法将散发着灵光的「灵芯」带进去才行。
- Gambler's Feather Accessory ｜ 赌徒的羽饰
- Come to think of it, though, what's so fun about chucking stones, anyway? When's Auntie Atea coming back? I kinda miss her. ｜ 仔细想想，丢石子也没什么好玩的。阿伽娅阿姨什么时候回来啊？我有点想她了。
- I'm not telling you all this to show off, I just want to make sure you listen in to my commentary! Getting a quick low-down on Fontaine will make sure you can have fun here, eat well, and buy all the things you want... ｜ 说这么多不是为了向您炫耀啦，只是想请您多听听我的解说，快快了解枫丹，在这个国家玩得开心，吃得尽兴，买到想要的商品…
- Use {0} {1} to speed creation up? ｜ 要消耗{0}个{1}加速制作吗？
- Surpassing Cup ｜ 超越之盏
- Now that is an interesting question. But all I can offer is my own conjecture. ｜ 这个问题确实很有意思，但我只能说说我的推论。
- Not only that, but every name has been circled. Thinking back on the course of events, you fall silent... And then, you explain the full story. ｜ 此外，每个人名都被画了圈。想到整件事的过程，你沉默了…接着，你说明了事情的始末。
- Ousia Bubble DMG|{param1:F1P} Max HP ｜ 荒性泡沫伤害|{param1:F1P}生命值上限
- Uh-oh, Paimon has a bad feeling about this... ｜ 呜哇——跳出来一个好不妙的家伙！
- Are you referring to those Eremite mercenaries? Are you afraid of them? ｜ 嗯…你是说镀金旅团的那些人吗？你不会是害怕他们吧？
- Baby Yumkasaurs are incredibly cute, and my Saurian companion, Hitata, was especially clingy. He used to jump into my arms the minute he saw me, even from quite a distance. My sister, Hine, would get so jealous — whenever she saw Hitata run towards me, she would do the same. Before I knew it, I would have an armful of baby Saurian and baby sister at the same time, haha. ｜ 幼年的匿叶龙特别可爱，我的龙伙伴希塔塔特别特别黏人，只要看见我，不管离我多远，都会开心地冲进我怀里来。这让我妹妹伊妮有点嫉妒，所以她看到希塔塔跑过来的时候，她也会跑过来，我得同时接住他们两个，哈哈哈。
- #{NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}？
- I can't take this from you. ｜ 我不能收。
- Hunted down!? ｜ 追杀？！
- "The rules for the competition haven't changed: The one who eats the most of the specified dish within the time limit wins prizes!" ｜ 「本届比赛依然采用经典规则——在限定时间内吃掉最多数量指定料理的人，就能赢得奖品。」
- Can't you see that I have a follower right here? ｜ 这不是还有我的跟班吗？
- Performance Progress ｜ 演出进度

She will gain 1 stack when obtaining a Puffer.\nIn addition, whenever Mualani obtains 2 Puffers within a single instance of the Nightsoul's Blessing state, she will recover an additional 12 Nightsoul points over 2s. This effect requires the Passive Talent "Heat-Resistant Freshwater Floater" to be unlocked first. ｜ 进入夜魂加持状态时，玛拉妮获得2层<color=#FFD780FF>踏鲨破浪</color>的浪势充能；玛拉妮获得豚豚球时，获得1层浪势充能。\n此外，玛拉妮在一次夜魂加持期间获得2个豚豚球的2秒内，额外恢复12点夜魂值。该效果需要解锁固有天赋「耐热型淡水豚豚」。

I asked around, and it seems like that's just an in-joke among Akademiya students — there is no 20-language graduation requirement after all. But I don't get it... how is that funny? It's only gonna put people off studying there. ｜ 很少见到比我还自来熟的人！在教令院附近闲逛时被她当成了新生，非要带我进去参观，还说什么现在加入知论派就能享受二十种语言教材大礼包，包教包会，吓我一大跳。问了别的学生才知道这是他们院的内部笑话，根本没有这种毕业要求。所以到底哪里好笑？只会让人更不想加入吧。

- Let's keep it up. We've got to convince him that this venture won't make money and that the meteorites are super dangerous. ｜ 就这样说服他，告诉他这笔生意绝对赚不了钱，还有…那个陨石真的很危险。
- ...For many of us, I'm sure the last few days have seen unforgettable levels of stress and fatigue... ｜ …想必这三天里，各位都经历了许多难忘的事，或是不安，或是疲倦…
- The Grand Master placed Mika on the front line of the expedition team not simply because he met the requirements of the mission — more importantly, he was impressed by Mika's hardworking and grounded nature. - A powerful warrior from the source of the springs, whose bravery has been acknowledged and for which they may wear the Saurian Crown.\nA warrior who can temporarily harness the power of the waves to shuttle back and forth. It is said that one must undergo three states of training to master this skill: First, to adapt. Second, to submit. Finally, to drive. Mastering this method of movement is merely the entry-level requirement to become a Saurian-Crowned Warrior of the People of the Springs, and the greatest among these Warriors can even use this skill to sail on land. ｜ 来自流泉之源，勇武受到认可，得以获授龙冠的强大武士。\n能短暂借助海浪之力来回穿梭的武者。据说要熟练掌握这样的技巧需要三个阶段的修炼：首先适应，其次依从，最后驱使。掌握这样的运力之法只是成为「流泉之众」龙冠武士的入门要求，而龙冠武士中的高手甚至可以短暂借此施行陆上行舟的法门。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- ...Huh? ｜ 欸？
- #Hey, you there! You better play nice with {M#him}{F#her}, or Paimon will make you regret it! ｜ #啊那边那个讨厌鬼，敢打到{M#他}{F#她}我就跟你拼了！
- Benoit boards the aquabus in a hurry alongside you. He seems to be in a frenzy, constantly talking to himself. Any attempts to get through to him seem futile. The moment the chance to get off the boat arrives, he runs on ahead, as if having long had a goal. You have to hurry to catch him... ｜ 伯努瓦带着你们焦急地登上了巡轨船。 他仿佛陷入了狂躁之中，不断喃喃自语，整段航程中你几乎无法与他交流。 一下船，伯努瓦就直直地向前冲去，好像早有目标一般，你不得不快步跟上…
- But looks like the fissures have been blocked off. Let's go back and tell Sheeshroom the good news! ｜ 不过好在裂口已经堵上了，我们回去告诉大蘑头吧！

CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG are fixed at 20% and 100% respectively.\n·Within 8s of being affected by Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, DEF is decreased by 30%. ｜ 处于纳西妲自身施加的<color=#FFD780FF>蕴种印</color>状态下的敌人，将受到以下效果影响：\n·受到的燃烧、绽放、超绽放、烈绽放反应伤害能够造成暴击，暴击率固定为20%，暴击伤害固定为100%；\n·受到原激化、超激化、蔓激化反应影响后的8秒内，防御力降低30%。

- It's nothing. ｜ 没事。

- Erinnyes, Melusine... Pahsiv, protect! ｜ 伊黎耶，美露莘…珀西芙，保护！

- As long as we stick to the plan, I'll give up the lead role... so it won't matter anymore, right? ｜ 如果计划顺利，我让出了主演的位置…这封信应该也不用管了吧？
- "The situation in Higi Village goes most ill. Gongozaemon is the best swordsman among us and was still in fairly good shape..." ｜ 「…绯木村的情况很不妙，权五左卫门是我等当中剑术最强的，身体也还算健康…」

- Pushing yourself too hard will only affect your exam performance. ｜ 这样消耗体力，反而会影响成绩吧。
- You should thank the Traveler this time, Doushin Shikanoin. Otherwise, I don't think I would have let you off so easily. ｜ 鹿野院同心，这次多亏有旅行者在，否则不会让你那么好糊弄过去。
- They aren't like those traveling scholars who wander about outdoors. I believe they're people more akin to myself — technical experts who spend most of their time in their studies researching items. ｜ 可不是那些天天在外面转悠的游学者。我想他们更类似我这种人，是些整天闷在学斋里研究物件的「技术员」。

- Anyway, sorry about the butterfly thing. With the way you suddenly came running over like that, I thought you were hired to take us out or something. ｜ 刚才抱歉啦，看你突然冲过来，还以为是哪里派来的刺客呢。
- The exhibition includes flowers from every corner of the world, each with their own unique properties and needs. With that in mind, the curator commissioned a flower pot from Kshahrewar, capable of retaining heat and moisture... ｜ 这些花卉来自天南地北，习性各不相同。策展方专门向妙论派订购了特制的花盆，可以在一定程度上保温保湿…
- Oh... Thanks, it's really nice of you to say that! I... feel a lot more confident now. ｜ 呜…谢谢你能这么说！我…我心里好像一下子鼓满了勇气。
- (I've been following them this whole time, and still, they ignore me... Do they really not care?) ｜ （跟踪他们到现在，这群人一直当我不存在，真够目中无人的…）
- No, you do. That's what the report says, and what the report says is the truth. ｜ 不，你就是跑得很快，周报里就是这么写的，这就是事实。
- Mm? Oh, it's nothing. Let's head inside. ｜ 没什么，我们快点进去吧。
- *sigh* This is too much work for one person... ｜ 唉，这怎么顾得过来…
- Beware the blinding sands that ride on the winds here as you seek out the Wilderness Balloons. Additionally, try to remember what route the balloons are set up along. If you encounter a sandstorm, you can return to safety using the said route. ｜ 在此处搜集「野踪气球」时，可别被风沙迷了眼睛。另外，请仔细保存「野踪气球」的布置路线图，如果突遇沙暴，可以沿着布置路线回到安全地带。
- Thank you. We'll see you soon! ｜ 好，我们走啦！

- They're very different from us. They're willing to do anything to achieve their goals, so I've always refused to work with them. As I know the most about the treasure's whereabouts, they have me in their sights. ｜ 这些人与我们不同，无所不用其极，因此我拒绝与他们同流合污。而本人维吉尔又是掌握了最多线索的人，自然是他们的眼中钉。

Please keep this a secret for me, though — I don't wanna hurt the other dogs' feelings! ｜ 在所有的品种里，我最喜欢深栗猎犬。你看它们眼睛上方的花纹，是不是很像眉毛？所以它们总是一副憨厚又认真的样子呢。\n不过这件事还请帮我保密，千万不要告诉别的狗狗！

- Hiding Pots are special Holding Pots created by the organizer that will appear at certain locations after a given period. Hiding Pots will change positions whenever they are hit, and must be hit 3 times to be fully destroyed. The first hit on a Hiding Pot will award <color=#f39000>20 points</color>, the second <color=#f39000>30 points</color>, and the third <color=#f39000>40</color>. However, if it is not destroyed within a certain period of time, it will be moved off the field. ｜ 「匿壶」是主办方设置的特殊容壶，在一段时间后，会在某个地点出现。当「匿壶」每次被击中时，「匿壶」都会变换其所在位置，需要连续击中「匿壶」三次，方可将其击碎。初次命中后可获得<color=#f39000>20分</color>，第二次命中可得<color=#f39000>30分</color>，第三次命中可得<color=#f39000>40分</color>。但若在一段时间内未能击碎「匿壶」，它就会被搬离台上。

- I've heard a lot about Miyuki's little sister. Quite the character, I'm told. Although she comes from a family of shrine maidens, she's gone her own way in life — tried her hand at many different trades, studied abroad in Liyue, even ended up joining the Arataki Gang... Fascinating girl. Maybe I should have Miyuki introduce me. Yes, that'll work — Miyuki wouldn't dream of refusing my request. ｜ 听说阿幸的这位妹妹很有个性，虽说出自巫女世家，却远离神社，学了许多门手艺，甚至去过璃月留学，最后还加入了荒泷派…如此有趣的女孩子，应该让阿幸帮忙引荐一下，嗯，阿幸肯定不会拒绝我的。
- I've come up with a few ideas, and I'm planning to find some moist soil today. ｜ 目前我有几个想法，今天的话…我想找一些常年阴湿的土壤。
- Don't just sit there, Zhongli! Go welcome our guest in! ｜ 客卿别愣着，快给人家开门去！
- Falling Thunder DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 威光落雷伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Great! Okay, here goes nothing: Take us to... ｜ 好！出发啦，我们要去——
- The Professional ｜ 狩猎专家
- So don't you lay a finger on him. Just find yourself a corner to rest if you're tired or cold. ｜ 总之你别想打他的主意，累了冷了的话就找个角落先休息吧。
- Bard's Arrow Feather ｜ 琴师的箭羽
- Feeling homesick? Moved to tears? Go ahead, let it out, you can ugly cry here! And hey, maybe if you ask your friends nicely, they'll make you a nice mountain to rest your little head so you can live here forever! ｜ 怀念吗？激动吗？感慨得快要热泪盈眶了吧！小小基尼奇，快求求你这朋友再为你挪一座山来，枕着脑袋美滋滋地住下吧！
- My son Sage wanted to come out today to find the place he read about in his fairy tales. I hope he didn't give you any trouble. ｜ 我的儿子小萨基又闹着出来，想找童话里的那些地方了。希望没有妨碍到你什么。
- Sumeru ｜ 须弥
- Really? I just learned a lot of survival skills here, that's all. Been busy keeping myself alive, you know? ｜ 哪有啦，只是在这里学习了很多生存的技巧，为了保证自己活着，忙忙碌碌一直没闲着而已啦。
- But as a result, we lost the intel advantage that we'd expected our alchemical recon equipment to give us. ｜ 如此一来，却又丧失了我方在预想中利用炼金侦察设备带来的情报优势。
- I think I've heard of this one... ｜ 好像之前听说过…
- Researcher's Notes ｜ 研究者的手记
- Okay, well first things first, we gotta find a way back in! C'mon brain juice, don't fail Paimon now! Um, okay, maybe if we both ram into it at the same time, really really hard— ｜ 想要帮她，怎么都要先进去才行。怎么办，怎么办，要不要撞一下试试…
- It's as you've guessed. I'm referring to the riches offered to the statues of Watatsumi — the gifts of forebears to their descendants. ｜ 没错，实际上就是埋藏在海祇尊像下的供奉财物，也就是前人为后人准备的礼物。
- If you're here to make a trade, you have to be prepared to be penniless, and not just dream of overnight riches. ｜ 来这做交易，不能只想着一夜暴富，还得做好一贫如洗的准备哦。
- A child with a group of adults! Sounds pretty close to Paimon! ｜ 小孩跟大人的组合，没那么常见吧！
- It must be Living Spring and no other! ｜ 一定要「活源水」，其他的水都不行！
- Do you have a job for me? But I'm not yet Master Lu's apprentice, so I can't represent Fanmu Carpenter's. ｜ 找我？路爷还没收我当徒弟呢，我可不能代表范木堂。
- Come, draw your weapon and try your chances against me. ｜ 来吧，把你的武器亮出来，和我赌一赌胜负。
- Reach the target location within %1% second(s) ｜ 在%1%秒内到达目的地

- "My immediate superior wants me to approve the contractor's proposals for clearing out the ruins of the Fontaine Research Institute and reconstructing the Callas Line to ensure the project isn't delayed." ｜ 「面对承包商清理枫丹科学院废墟，重建卡雷斯线的方案，我的直属领导要求我快速通过，以保证工期的正常运行。」

- To tell you the truth, I'm still not sure whether I have what it takes to represent the Rtawahist Darshan in the Championship. ｜ 其实，直到现在，我也不知道自己有什么资格做明论派的代表。

- Come on, please help me. I've prepared your payment already. ｜ 拜托拜托，你看，我报酬都准备好了，你就帮帮我吧。
- Yes, haha, as the daughter of the Yashiro Commission, this is how Miss Kamisato is accustomed to receiving guests. ｜ 呵呵，作为社奉行的大小姐，神里小姐一般都是这样待客的。

- I'm fine... Actually, I heard Chief Wayna wasn't really on board with your plan to go to the Night Kingdom. ｜ 我没事。听说你们来的时候，瓦伊纳首领并不是很赞成你们去夜神之国。
- Neat Note ｜ 工整的字条
- Simply put, more exquisite and ingenious toys require more investment, which will increase the price... Just as clockwork toys cannot be sold for the same price as origami models. ｜ 想把玩具做得更精致更巧妙，就需要投入更多资金，导致玩具涨价…就像发条玩具不可能和一般的折纸模型卖相同的价钱。
- Ah, there's the anger now... So scary, nya. ｜ 哎呀，发火了，吓人喵。
- According to the rules of the copyright that Alice applied for, the artists need to pay me a portion of their revenue for each landscape painting of this style that they sell. ｜ 根据艾莉丝女士的「专利」规则，画家们每次出售这种风景画，都需要向我支付一定比例的费用。

- Forget it! Those are all problems for future Ann! ｜ 算了，以后的事情以后再想吧！

- There are many who do not openly converse with others within the Akademiya, but even so, there are very few who I feel could be trusted with a real secret. Cyno happens to be one of them. ｜ 教令院中，嘴巴严实的人不少。但让人感觉「无论如何都会保守秘密」的人不多，赛诺就是其中一个。
- Haborym, the Pyro Archon ｜ 「火之魔神」赫布里穆
- There is no betrayal! The Almighty Dragonlord, K'uhul Ajaw is a partner to no one. ｜ 我的世界没有背叛！尊贵的圣龙库胡勒阿乔可从来不是谁的伙伴。
- It's ready. Let me try it first. ｜ 好了，我先来试试吧。
- Traveler, let's try this once more. Can you please help me choose a "Golden Dish" again? ｜ 旅行者，那我们就再来一次，请你再帮我挑选一次「吞金料理」吧？
- Huh? Seems like something just opened... ｜ 咦？好像打开了什么…
- Ah, traveler! It's you. ｜ 是旅行者啊，你好。

- Unknown Chamber ｜ 未知房间
- Ganyu's Envisaged Echo. "Proceed with elegance, avoid certain peril." ｜ 甘雨的绘想游迹。「循循如仪，不罹罗网。」
- You bet. Today, I heard Stanley talking about his adventures. It was incredible! It got me really pumped up. ｜ 是啊，今天听斯坦利先生说了他的冒险经历，太精彩了！听得我心潮澎湃。
- A special slip of paper that can illuminate one's fortune. Also known to a certain someone as "strips of paper."\nYou can only get one of these per day, which will cause the previous day's fortune slip to lose meaning and disappear.\nThey say that slips that portend ill luck such as "Misfortune" and "Great Misfortune" can be tied to the Fortune Slip Hanger as a prayer for a turnaround.\nRegardless, "fate" and "destiny" are things best grasped and forged in one's own hands. ｜ 昭明今日运势的特制纸签，也被某人称为「纸片儿」。\n每天只能求得一次签文，昨日的签也会因为不再具有意义而消失。\n据说，「凶」和「大凶」这类不吉祥的签条，可以结在「御签挂」上，以求转运。\n但无论如何，「命」与「运」都应该自己掌握、自己开拓吧。
- *sobs* My ego just took a hit! ｜ 呜呜，被打击了！
- Flowlight Targets ｜ 游光标靶
- Ganyu ｜ 甘雨
- I should also get going. Bye for now, everyone. ｜ 我也回去了，各位再见。
- Make yourself at home. I mean it quite literally, haha. ｜ 不必拘束，当作自己家也可以。

- "A sweet mist permeates all, gazing toward the dancing lamplight, I almost forget to breathe. In the end, memories of childhood guide me, and I take my seat beside the table in peace..." ｜ 「甘甜的雾气在弥漫，望着灯盏的光芒，我几乎忘记了呼吸。最后，还是儿时的回忆给了我引导，让我在桌边安心落座…」
- Mockery of Fortuna ｜ 命运的嘲弄
- Let's get going, Albedo, here we come! ｜ 走吧，我们快去问问阿贝多！
- Next up... ｜ 接下来…
- Hehehehehe... ｜ 呵呵呵呵呵…

- Oh, hello there. Can I help you? ｜ 你们好，请问你们有什么事吗？
- Character Details ｜ 角色详细
- He certainly has a beautiful tail. Although... mine's a little softer. ｜ 五郎的尾巴色泽很漂亮，不过…还是我的更柔软一些。呵…
- *sigh* ...You really believe that? ｜ …你信吗？
- (Let's talk again later...) ｜ （待会再跟她搭话吧…）
- Umm... Although it's not operational at the moment due to some minor technical issues. But these kind of things get fixed very quickly here at the Institute. ｜ 唔…虽然现在它因为一些问题还不能启动，但在科学院里，这些小问题很快会得到解决。
- Thank you so much! Let's go outside, then. ｜ 谢谢你！那我们就去野外吧。
- This document shall serve as signed proof that these stone shavings originated from the, ah, ore that Mr. Krosl brought to your store. Please read it carefully. ｜ 这份文书是用来证明这份石屑确实来自于克罗索先生送来的…矿石，你可以详细看一下。
- Need a cure for insomnia? Let me read you the history of the development of Liyue's legal system! None of my friends have ever lasted longer than 20 minutes... Oh, you want something more fast-acting? Then I'll recite from the legal codices! Let me know in the morning which section I got to before you fell asleep! Okay, here I go... ｜ 想要快速入睡？那我来给你讲解璃月律法的演变史吧，我的那些朋友就没有能撑过二十分钟的。唔，还想要更快的话，那就背法典吧，背法典！明天记得告诉我你听到了第几条。咳咳…我开始了哦？
- Let me witness your choice. ｜ 让我看看你的决断…
- ... ｜ ……
- Tiny Miracle's Feather ｜ 奇迹之羽
- Shouldn't let your guard down! ｜ 破绽，稍纵即逝！
- This great cavern that sank beneath the waves was once a prosperous royal port. If the ancient bells' tolling could pierce the barrier of ocean, lost souls may yet find their homeward road. ｜ 沉入海底的岩窟曾是繁荣的王城巨港。倘若旧日的钟声能够穿破海水的阻隔，迷途的灵魂或许便能找到返乡的道路。
- Unyielding Spirit ｜ 千折不屈犹壮气
- Magic Trick: Astonishing Shift ｜ 魔术·运变惊奇
- Switch to the Precious Items tab ｜ 进入贵重道具页签
- The situation in the various regions of Sumeru is quite complex, and the Corps of Thirty has limited manpower and will sometimes be too overwhelmed to keep track of these monsters or evildoers.\nEffendi, the Liaison Officer, coordinates communications between the Akademiya, the Corps, and the adventurers, and adds these objectives to his Bounty list.\nIf you can track these targets down, destroy them in time, and report your success to Effendi, your Reputation in Sumeru will increase.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Intel</color>\nThrough eyewitness reports, target reports and the unique characteristics of each Bounty, one can track down the targets' whereabouts, target their unique characteristics and thus make proper preparations for their hunt.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Time Limit</color>\nIf you cannot defeat Bounty targets within in a short period, they will flee, causing the pursuit to fail.\nIf you fail in your hunt, you can return to Effendi to re-accept the Bounty.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Bounties: Limits and Resetting</color>\nYou can only accept a certain number of Bounties every week.\nYou can check the number of Bounties you've completed this week in the Reputation Menu.\nThis limit is shared among all cities.\nNew Bounties will become available every Monday.\n\nOnce your Reputation reaches the maximum level, you can no longer accept new Bounties. ｜ 须弥各地的情况错综复杂，而「三十人团」的兵力有限，偶尔会遇上人手不足的情况，无暇应对某些魔物和心怀不轨之徒。\n联络员阿芬迪负责在教令院、「三十人团」和冒险家之间协调工作，将这些目标列入「讨伐悬赏」的名单。\n如果能及时追踪、消灭这些目标，并向阿芬迪回报的话，就能提高在须弥的声望。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：情报】</color>\n通过悬赏的「目击者情报」、「目标情报」与「目标特点」，可以了解目标出现的地点、以及目标的类型，以及其特性，以此做好讨伐的准备。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：时限】</color>\n如果无法在短时间内击败悬赏目标，悬赏目标就会逃跑，导致讨伐失败。\n讨伐失败后，可以在阿芬迪处重新领取。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【讨伐悬赏：接取限制与刷新】</color>\n每周能完成讨伐的数量是有限的。\n本周已完成的数量可以在声望界面查看。\n所有城市共享数量限制。\n每周一都会出现新的讨伐悬赏。\n\n声望等级达到上限后，无法继续接取新的讨伐悬赏。
- You rush into the hallway and head for Sylvain's room. You try to enter, but the door won't budge... ｜ 你们冲进走廊，尝试进入席尔万的房间。房门却丝毫未动…
- Guess what? The guy with the horns came to see me... and he gave me back all the snacks he won off me yesterday! Haha! ｜ 你听我说哦，那个长角的大哥哥…居然把昨天赢走的零食都还给我了！
- Are you discussing the person who left The Five Kasen stories? They are indeed a meticulous person who's good at reading the situation. ｜ 你们是说留下五歌仙故事的人吗？的确是个心思很缜密的人，懂得审时度势。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nUpon returning to Mondstadt, you encounter a light novelist. Following her script, you embark on a wondrous journey of reading and reverie...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20. (Complete the Archon Quest "Omnipresence Over Mortals" first to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nFor the first 3 days of the event, 2 new challenges will unlock every day. During the first five stages, Travelers will need to use the designated characters to complete the challenge. During the sixth stage, Travelers may choose two characters from among the designated characters to complete the challenge.\n\nThe objective of the challenge is to collect as many Labyrinth Coins as possible to earn points within the time limit while avoiding mechanisms firing curtains of bullets. During each stage, Adventure Techniques can be used to assist you. In addition, characters cannot use Elemental Bursts, Food, or Gadgets during challenges. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n重返蒙德时，你们遇见了一位轻小说作家，顺着她提供的剧本，开启了奇妙的阅读与遐想之旅…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20。（完成魔神任务「千手百眼，天下人间」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始后的前三天，每天会开启两个新的挑战。前五关中，旅行者需要使用指定的角色完成挑战。第六关中，旅行者可以从指定角色中任选两名角色完成挑战。\n\n挑战的目标是在限定时间内，躲避迷宫中的弹幕等机关，尽可能拾取更多迷宫币以获取评分。每个关卡的挑战中，可以使用冒险特技以获取可观的助力。此外，在挑战中无法使用角色的元素爆发、食物与小道具。

- #I'm... Lanoire. {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME} and Ms. Paimon, will you please tell me whether the evil sorcerer is still there? ｜ #我叫…我叫莉诺尔。{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和派蒙姐姐，可不可以偷偷告诉我，那个…坏巫师走掉了吗？

### Part 069

- Let us go to Mt. Aocang. ｜ 去奥藏山吧。
- About Furina ｜ 关于芙宁娜…
- "All guests are welcome to visit other areas at the Basin of Unnumbered Flames—" ｜ 「欢迎各位客人游览『万火之瓯』的其他区域——」
- Wait! Didn't you hear what they just said? Buying information is going to cost us HALF A MILLION MORA!!! Have you lost your mind!? ｜ 欸，可是他们说买情报需要五十万摩拉啊！你认真的吗？
- Alright. Follow me. ｜ 好的，请随我来。
- Alright... The way in is simple, but by no means easy. To cut to the chase, you'll need to jump in through the crater. ｜ 哼哼，好吧…进入火山的办法其实又简单又难，说到底就是从火山口跃进去罢了。
- Please, come with me. We happen to be in need of competent fellows like yourself. ｜ 那么跟我来吧，我们现在正需要更多的帮手。

- What are you up to this time, Grundeland? I've warned you... ｜ 戈伦德兰，你又在打什么鬼主意？我明着和您说了吧。
- The Summit Stop ｜ 通往崖顶站点
- Ah... I seem to have been standing here too long... My hips are numb and my legs are cramping... I can't even kneel... ｜ 啊…在水边站太久了，腰僵了，腿也抽筋了，跪不下来…
- No, bad Nara! You're... You're not allowed to pick my peaches! ｜ 那菈，坏！不许…不许摘我种的墩墩桃！
- C'mon, Bongo-Head, let's play a clapping game! ｜ 「咚咚小圆帽」，我们来击掌吧。

- It seems that your strategy was a cut above... this time. ｜ 看来在这牌局的算计上，还是你棋高一着。
- I shall take this as a rehearsal for my duel against the "mightiest warrior." ｜ 就把这场比试，当作我与那位「最强武者」决斗前的预演吧。
- Perhaps take a softer tone... ｜ 或许有更温和的办法…
- If they want a challenge so desperately, why don't they just go off into the wilderness and pick a fight with the biggest monster they can find? ｜ 这么想寻求挑战的话，直接去野外找强大的魔物不就好了吗？
- Use your understanding of your deck and the 4 Rounds you have to defeat a limitless tide of foes and score higher in this challenge. ｜ 运用对牌组的理解，在限定4回合内，击倒源源不断的敌人，挑战获取更高的积分！
- You didn't fail. ｜ 不，你已经实现了。
- He's probably resting just over there. It's not far. ｜ 应该在那边休息吧，走两步就到了。
- You can't? That makes you weak, Pale Floater. Being compassionate is indeed one of the great Simurgh's many noble qualities, but one cannot survive here with merely a kind heart. ｜ 可怜？白飘飘还真是软弱，虽说慈悲是神鸟大人也拥有的高贵品德，不过光靠仁慈可是没办法在此地生存下去的。
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Obtained from World Quest ｜ 世界任务获取
- Alright, Jademouth it is! The other two, you're... tourists? Haha, well if you're here for sightseeing, there's not many locals who head that way. ｜ 好嘞，去宝玦口！另外两位是…游客吧？哈哈，要是观光的话，本地人去那边的可不多。
- The leaf's in the water! Look, it's like a little boat. Merrily, merrily down the stream, life is but a dream! ｜ 我把叶子放好啦，看着它像小船一样漂下去了，晃晃悠悠的！
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param7:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param7:P}
- I'm Yu— Xiuhua! One of the waiting staff here at the Baiju Guesthouse. If there's anything you need, please don't hesitate to ask me! ｜ 我是毓…秀华！是白驹逆旅的跑堂，客人您有什么要求尽管找我就好！
- Sometimes, I wonder about the water used to wash away the remnants of the dead... Does it carry traces of their resentment away with it? ｜ 有时我会想，那些洗净污物的水，没准会带着逝者的不甘，融入其中…
- Ah, I remember now. You were the one by Cider Lake... ｜ 我想起来了，你好像是果酒湖那个…
- So, I didn't even realize he was there until Cacucu suddenly flipped out last night when he went for a drink. His squawking woke me up, and that's when I finally spotted a shadowy shape outside the window. ｜ 所以我一开始都没发现它。昨天夜里咔库库喝水的时候被它吓了一跳，尖叫声把我吵醒，我才注意到窗外有个模糊的身影。
- Huh? Greater Lord Rukkhadevata? ｜ 咦，「大慈树王」？
- Good, and please remember, safety first. ｜ 嗯。安全第一，务必保证。
- Touring Light Show ｜ 游光示现
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon! Fancy meeting you here again, of all places. Quite the coincidence. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，还有派蒙，居然能在这遇见你们，真是巧了。

- Ally at Low HP: I ｜ 同伴生命值低·其一
- Though my dishes may sound a little strange, everyone who's tried it has said that they taste pretty good. ｜ 虽然我做的有些料理听起来很奇怪，但大家吃过之后，都说味道还可以哦。
- Listen up, Karkata. I'm going to make a mechanical life form that can be mass-produced. The technology will be unlike anything else that exists. ｜ 听好了卡卡塔，我要在这里造出可量产的机械生命，所用的技术不同于以往任何一种。
- That sounds... rather suspicious. ｜ 听上去很可疑…
- Perhaps Master hopes to increase the popularity of fruit juice, so that people have more options when it comes to drinking. ｜ 也许老爷希望用这种方法让果汁流行起来，为人们提供一种新的选择。

- None ｜ 无
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- If a magician were to go onstage with their Vision in hand, people might suspect the authenticity of their tricks, so I habitually take it off before performing. But since you're interested, why don't you help me hold on to it while I perform? Just be sure to keep an eye on it, though — or it might just sneak its way back to me! ｜ 魔术师佩戴着神之眼上台，难免会遭到质疑，所以我习惯了提前摘下它。既然你有兴趣，要不下次我表演的时候，就由你帮我保管它吧？要看紧一点哦，可千万别让它又偷偷滑到我手上了。
- Well? How did it go? Those weren't just plain old sheets of paper, were they? ｜ 万叶，怎么样，那些纸应该不是普通的白纸吧？
- Uhh... ｜ 喔——
- Uh, this last point is making Paimon's head spin... ｜ 呃…这个倒是没那么好懂…
- I didn't want anyone else to see it, so I was planning on opening it myself once we got back. ｜ 本想回去再打开的，担心被什么其他人盯上。
- They offer substantial pay, but they also have strict requirements for the quality of the volunteers. Are you interested? ｜ 他们的报酬开得很高，相应的，对志愿者本身的素质要求也很严格。你们有兴趣吗？
- Thanks. In that case, let me mark the locations where Harris mentioned we might find small frozen boars on your map. ｜ 太好了，那让我把哈里斯说的冰冻住的小猪会出没的地点给你标在地图上。
- So I came here and built the best possible experimental site. I used the most advanced building materials and bought top-tier observation equipment at great expense. ｜ 于是我在这里建了最好的实验场地，用最先进的材料搭建实验环境，购买了最好的实验观测素材，都花了很大一笔开销。
- These are all words spoken by the people from the past... Their voices are echoing through this temple of souls. ｜ 这些都是过去的人传来的话…所有人的声音回荡在这片灵魂的殿堂里。
- Well, aren't you the customers I saw earlier? Do you need anything? ｜ 这不是刚刚见过的两位客人吗？请问有什么需要吗？
- I must take a photo so good that all the other photographers will gain new levels of respect for me! ｜ 我一定要拍出让前辈刮目相看的画片！
- Yeah, you're right. It's his life, after all, so should it be his decision. ｜ 嗯，你说的对。毕竟是他的人生，还是应该由他自己决定。
- Well then, since you're already here, why don't you stay and have something to eat? We just finished preparing some food. ｜ 那么既然来了，一起吃饭吧，我们刚准备好。
- <color=#37FFFF>Kinich:</color> This is quite delicious. I should offer you some cash in return, or some kind of gift if you'd prefer.\n<color=#37FFFF>Ajaw:</color> Spit it out, you greedy snake! Some of that was meant for me! ｜ <color=#37FFFF>基尼奇：</color>很美味。我应该给你相应酬劳，或是其他你中意的回礼。\n<color=#37FFFF>阿乔：</color>吐出来！你这个贪婪的蝮蛇！那里面肯定有给我的份！
- Everyone, back to Bubu Pharmacy, now! ｜ ——诸位，我们立刻返回不卜庐！
- Well, now Paimon's curious! Come on, let's go! ｜ 说得我都好奇了，走吧走吧，快点！
- Though my work involved being around them every day, I was under heavy surveillance. ｜ 况且，虽然由于妾身的职务，能日日与太阳之子接触，却囿于周围严苛的监视…
- Ah yes, Alice's daughter. She's in the custody of the Knights of Favonius, and Albedo looks after her too. She's blessed to have Trifolium as her constellation, which represents good luck. I'm slightly envious... *smirk*\nAlthough, if I'd been blessed with good luck, I suppose I never would have had the great honor of running into that old woman, would I... ｜ 你是说，艾莉丝的女儿啊。她住在西风骑士团，还有阿贝多照顾…怎么说呢，哎…她的「命之座」不愧是象征着幸运的「四叶草」啊，真羡慕…\n啊不过，要是我也有这么好的运气，首先就不会遇见那个老太婆了。
- Oh, I'm so nervous... ｜ 紧张…
- Are you also one of the Knights? ｜ 你也是骑士团的人吗？
- Skill CD increased by 100%. ｜ 技能的冷却时间延长100%。

- Someone selling fertilizer? Paimon can't help feel like that's familiar somehow... Nothing's coming to mind, though... ｜ 推销肥料的人？总感觉，有一种熟悉的感觉…但是又想不起来…
- Please get to the point. ｜ 好好说话。
- ...Are you sure? ｜ …你确定吗？
- 27,000!? You kidding!? Are you here to insult me!? That offer's even lower than before! ｜ 两万七？！开什么玩笑，你们是特意来羞辱我的吗？怎么比之前还少了！
- It's okay, I can head back myself. ｜ 不用了，我自己能行。
- Either way, I've already dispatched all with the capability to explore Dragonspine to fan out and search. ｜ 总之，我已经让协会里有能力进入雪山的人都去展开搜救了。
- #That's not true... It's not just those two. There's {NICKNAME}-Marquis and {M#his}{F#her} companion, too. ｜ #那倒不是…不仅他们两个一起来了，还有{NICKNAME}侯爵和{M#他}{F#她}的伙伴呢。

- She should look pleased with herself... ｜ 得意的样子…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- No results found ｜ 暂无搜索结果
- He probably wasn't telling us the truth. ｜ 只是没有说实话。
- True. That's one reason why it's been difficult to catch on. ｜ 嗯，就是因为这样，这套棋戏在推广上不是很顺利。
- I've spent too long trying to clear the defilement that remains in this place. The exhaustion is clouding my mind... ｜ 这段时间一直在清除残余的黯色力量，太累了，意识有点模糊…
- The princess who was prophesied to bring destruction witnesses the imminent fall of her nation, and it is at this moment when a wandering warrior descends from the skies, ignorant of the truth.\nThe pair's journey amidst the fires of an ancient warring period are about to begin! ｜ 出生即被预言将要带来毁灭的公主陷入亡国的危机，此时一位不明真相的浮浪武士从天而降。\n战火纷飞的古风时代剧，二人的旅行，就此展开！
- No, that's not it. The paper said that "heatstroke" is the answer to "erudition." Ugh... Eating something that causes heatstroke sounds horrifying... ｜ 不对呀，那张纸上说了，「学识广」的答案才对应「中暑」。呃…不管怎么样，吃了就会中暑的东西也太可怕了一点。
- Thanks, you're the best! Well, spring water helps plants grow up strong so that they can scale the mountains that lie in their way... so, I imagine the spring can be found somewhere on the mountain range protected by plants. ｜ 谢谢你！清澈的水令植物生长，它们变得茁壮，克服困难攀上高山…泉水，就在那些被植被庇护的山上。
- A tree that can be found in a specific region in Natlan. Their numbers are few...\nYou saw lumps of such processed wood scattered on the ground, yet no trees nearby that could produce it. Someone must have deliberately brought them here... ｜ 可见于纳塔特定区域的树木，数量相对稀少…\n不过，附近没有产出这种木材的树木，却能看见成品木材散落在地，似乎是有人特意将它们运送过来的…
- But a rare type — at least, I haven't seen any of that quality before. The rough location was... ｜ 可那成色似乎比一般的水晶矿还要稀有，位置大概在…
- A dish made out of a luxurious variety of ingredients. There is no great refinement in the making of this food, and it appears in Liyue often during festival season. Whenever this dish is served up, the person at the head of the table will invite everyone to dig in, saying "Come on, eat, eat," hence the name. ｜ 用料丰富的菜肴。配料与做法上并没有特别的讲究，经常在璃月的节庆时分登场。每当这道菜上来以后，为首的人会说「来来，吃」，招呼大家动筷子，因此而得名。
- Resident Conversation Gift ｜ 居民对话赠礼
- All that could be explained with the round-earth theory! ｜ 这些，都可以用球体大陆来完美解释！
- Haha, that's right. Oh, by the way, Bernette... What was it that you wanted to give to Miss Navia, again? ｜ 哈哈，就是这样。啊对啦，贝妮蒂！你上回说要送娜维娅小姐什么来着？
- About the strange object by the water... ｜ 关于放在水边的奇怪物件…
- A Letter in Beautiful Handwriting (I) ｜ 字迹华丽的信·其一
- Returning Winds ｜ 归风纪行
- Is it true that Wooden Shieldwall Mitachurls are really dangerous? I was chatting with some friends earlier, and one of them mentioned that he ran into one just the other day while {0}. If he could encounter one in such a place, then I really worry about the safety of our city's outskirts. Could the relevant department do something about this? —Yours Truly, a Concerned Citizen ｜ 木盾丘丘暴徒听说很危险？昨天和朋友聊天的时候，他说，他{0}的时候，就遇到了一个。既然在这样的地方也能见到，那郊外的治安可能确实值得担忧。希望有关部门能采取措施。有心人留
- Haha, did you think he was some sort of hired killer? ｜ 哈哈，难道是把钟离先生误认成杀手了？
- I see... The great stone surfaces, and so you open an investigation. Hehe. ｜ 这样啊…巨石出现，所以你们展开了调查。
- It's just as you predicted, Ms. Ying'er! ｜ 和你的预测完全相符啊，莺儿小姐！
- Bonifaz ｜ 博尼法兹
- So I can promise you — those meka were definitely private units. ｜ 所以那些警卫机关，我敢拍胸脯说，肯定是私人持有的。
- Ugh, I just can't think... ｜ 不行，想不起来…
- Increases all party members' ATK by 160 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高160点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- As for the current standings, let me see... ｜ 目前排名的话，让我算算…
- But on the other hand, that kid, Remaudiere, will go nuts if the fountain isn't repaired soon. ｜ 再不修好那个喷泉，勒莫迪埃那小子非得急死不可。

- Ugh... Really, Xingqiu... ｜ 呃…这…
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After your character triggers an Elemental Reaction:</color> Heal all of your characters for 2 HP. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方触发元素反应后：</color>治疗所有我方角色2点。

- I was busy working at the Adventurers' Guild at the time when the theft occurred. ｜ 在「志村屋」失窃的时候，我正在冒险家协会里处理一些事务。
- Diluc ｜ 迪卢克
- Now, let's check on them... ｜ 我来看看这里的人的情况…
- Correct! I am quite keen on learning more about your adventuring experiences. In my industry, extraordinary stories are always in demand. ｜ 没错，我对你们的冒险经历很感兴趣。在我们这行里，非凡的故事永远都会受到追捧。
- Yes, you do. To the uninitiated, scheduling may sound like a simple process of matching tasks to time slots, but there is actually far more to it than that. ｜ 是的，在外人看来，日程安排只是为事务定下先后顺序，但其实这里面的学问非常深。
- <i>But we can't pass through this waterspout...</i> ｜ <i>但这水柱…跳不过去…</i>
- ##@&%*! ｜ ##%^%*&……！！
- In the end, I'm just the Moon. The real Sun is long gone. ｜ 毕竟，我只是「月亮」，而真正的「太阳」早就不在了吧。
- A standard shrub planted in the Court of Fontaine, it is a meticulously crafted, square-shaped plant. A feast for the eyes, it perfectly complements the architectural styles throughout the city, making it the first example listed in the Court of Fontaine Standards for Urban Decorative Plants. Rumor has it that gardeners capable of sculpting shrubs into such a shape will receive salaries on par with those of senior artisans. Of course, it is impossible to reach such a high standard without years of experience. ｜ 枫丹廷内标准的灌木丛，修建得方方正正，极其规整，赏心悦目，完美配合了枫丹廷各处的建筑风格，是《枫丹廷城区绿植装饰标准》的第一种典型案例。据说，能将灌木丛修剪成这般模样的园丁能拿到一笔堪比高级工匠的薪水，当然，没有长年累月的技术积累，是不可能达到这种标准的。
- ...Hmm, by the looks of it, nowhere near dire enough for you to be needing my services. *sigh* A shame, no Mora to be made here... ｜ 一看你的表情就没遇上什么糟心事，好吧，没摩拉赚了。
- Stun ｜ 眩晕
- And she refuses to say anything. If she would just speak her desire, I would be willing to do anything in my power to help her...! ｜ 她又什么都不肯说，但凡她能说出一个愿望，只要是我力所能及的，我都愿意为她办到…
- Sure, I'll even tell you a couple of jokes. ｜ 也好，我给你讲两个笑话吧。
- #Oh, see you, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #嗯，再见，金色的{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}。
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Affected by Hydro for 40% less time. ｜ 受到的水元素附着效果的持续时间减少40%。
- You were a Treasure Hoarder? But... ｜ 你之前是盗宝团？但是…
- Not only that, but you actively participated in the interrogation, arrest, and judgment of the Lefeveres during their fall, thus clearing yourself of suspicion. ｜ 不仅如此，当时身在警备队的你，还积极参与了对勒菲弗尔家的清算，来排除自己的嫌疑。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- The time has come. A century ago, the prophecy predicted all. He will return. ｜ 时间都已经到了，一如上百年前的预言。他必将归来。
- Makes sense. ｜ 也有道理…
- As a descendant of the Kaedehara Clan, you should be able to guess our greatest regret. ｜ 作为枫原家的后人，你应该能猜到对我们来说，最不甘心的事是什么。

- Select All ｜ 全部选中

- Yes, but that's all part of the past now. The Isshin Art was lost with my great grandfather's generation. ｜ 嗯，不过这都是很早以前的事了，「一心传」在我曾祖父那一代就没落了。
- Take the widget ｜ 拿取工件
- Low HP: I ｜ 生命值低·其一
- Complete "Lost Traveler in the Ashen Realm." ｜ 完成「流灰之国的迷旅人」。
- #Wake up, {NICKNAME}! Quick, wake up! We gotta stop him! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！醒醒！快醒醒！不能让他得逞！
- Way back in Ritou, Lady Hiiragi said something about the Kanjou Commissioner meeting with an arrogant-sounding woman... We should have known. ｜ 早在离岛的时候，千里小姐似乎也提到过，勘定奉行跟一位趾高气昂的女士见过面…那时就应该猜到了…
- You should go ask him. Maybe he has more news about our stranger. ｜ 你去问问瓦格纳吧，说不定他也知道一点关于那家伙的消息。
- Complete "As Light Rain Falls Without Reason" ｜ 完成「仿若无因飘落的轻雨」剧情
- A relatively uncommon plant with round and thick leaves aplenty and no scent. After some washing, they can be used to serve food. More optimistic adventurers are fond of these plants, comparing them to restaurant waiters bearing plates. ｜ 相对少见的植株，叶片圆润而厚实，几乎没有任何气味，洗净后可以用来盛放食物。这种植物被乐观的冒险者比喻成「提供盘子的餐厅侍者」，深受喜爱。
- Alright, I'm ready. Changing into a Fungus should be quite an interesting experience. ｜ 好的，我已经准备好了。变成蕈兽感觉一定是很新奇的体验。
- You find a strange chalice on an altar... ｜ 你们发现某座祭坛上供奉了一个奇怪的杯盏…
- The Bleak Midwinter ｜ 多冷的隆冬
- Hey, it's full of script lines... and sketches, too. Looks like they show where the different props should be placed on-stage. ｜ 写满了台词呢，还有一些简笔画，好像是在描述舞台道具的摆放位置…
- Food ｜ 食物
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Talk to Ellin ｜ 与艾琳对话
- It's no trouble. For me, making tea is a truly enjoyable activity. ｜ 不麻烦的，对我来说，泡茶是件让人心情愉悦的事。
- I... I sense "reason." Visitors, are you the successors to Narzissenkreuz, or are you a threat? ｜ 我…感受到了「理性」。到来之人，汝等是水仙十字的后继者，还是齿轮的鹰犬？

- That's pretty much the worst curse you can get as a reserve member of the Qucusaur Riders. ｜ 这对绒翼龙骑士预备役来说，根本就是天降的诅咒吧。
- Is there anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- Light up the maps of the following areas in Sumeru: Gavireh Lajavard and Realm of Farakhkert. ｜ 点亮须弥区域中，荒石苍漠、浮罗囿的地图。
- And one of the things that flows through the Ley Lines... are memories. ｜ 提瓦特的地脉中流淌着「记忆」…
- I hope we can find something there. ｜ 希望能有收获。

- Aralohita likes riddles and traps, but he can't be found now... ｜ 兰罗希陀喜欢谜语和机关，现在已经找不到他…
- \nYou have obtained full clearance. Except for that abandoned yet nostalgic ancient city, the desert no longer hides any secrets. ｜ \n所有的权能在此聚齐，除却那已被废弃的又令人怀念的古老城市，黄沙不再隐藏任何秘密。
- Actually, there's a lot of us here in Inazuma City whose ancestors were once natives of the island, you know? ｜ 哎呀，其实稻妻城里还有很多祖上曾经住在清籁岛上的人。
- Come here. ｜ 你来这里。
- Don't you "you can do it" Paimon! You're the one who's training, Kichiboushi. ｜ 真是的，别给我加油啦！明明是吉法师要修行。

- Shefket ｜ 谢夫凯特
- A Genius Invokation TCG card back that can be obtained and switched around. They say that card backs with different designs also come with minute differences in make and texture. Some players also make collecting card backs of different styles their pursuit and hobby. ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得并替换的牌背。据说看上去造型各不相同的牌背，其材质与手感也有微妙的差别，也有牌手将搜集不同的牌背作为追求与爱好。

Umm, let's see... to start with, I'll be needing <color=#00E1FFFF>Lavender Melon</color>, <color=#00E1FFFF>Fowl</color>, and <color=#00E1FFFF>Flour</color>. ｜ 可以吗？那就麻烦你了。我想想，应该需要<color=#00E1FFFF>堇瓜</color>、<color=#00E1FFFF>禽肉</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>面粉</color>。

- The first Action Card played each Round will cost 2 fewer dice.\nEach Round, the first Skill used or Talent equipped by each character will cost 1 fewer die. ｜ 每回合打出的第一张行动牌费用-2；\n每个角色每回合第一次使用技能或装备「天赋」的费用-1。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Uh... That's kinda scary. ｜ 呜啊，好可怕。
- When I helped out at my parents' shop as a kid, they would always intentionally leave me some simple tasks, like dusting down the shelves or making sure the merchandise was arranged neatly. ｜ 小时候我去爸爸妈妈的店里帮忙，他们总是会故意留一些简单的工作给我。比如擦干净柜子上的灰，或是把商品摆放整齐。
- So, where are we... ｜ 关于目…

- Wait, Bluey gave you fruits? ｜ 等等，阿蓝给你果子了？

- Physical RES Decrease|{param4:P} ｜ 物理抗性降低|{param4:P}
- Well... If they have nothing to eat, they should soon become too weak to cause any harm, right? ｜ 唔…要是没有东西吃的话，丘丘人也就没力气作乱了吧？
- The idea is for all profits from the sales to go to charity. Specifically, the funds will provide support to disadvantaged children and elderly citizens. ｜ 店铺赚到的钱会被用于慈善事业，提供给生活条件比较艰苦的孩子和老人。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Looks like firing the "Super Awesomesauce Laser" shouldn't be a problem. ｜ 看起来能使用「超能特攻光线」了。
- You frightened me for a second — I thought my illusion had been undone by a bunch of monsters... How did you find this place? ｜ 吓死我了，还以为连魔物都能破我的幻阵。你们怎么找过来的？
- This is why I came up with Lightcall Resonance. I wanted to show the humans that only those who have passed the trials have the right to speak to me. ｜ 所以我设下「浮光鸣召」，并且告诉人类，只有通过试炼的人才有资格同我说话。
- Thank you, Traveler. She obviously has some reservations towards me. Though I've only desired to help and look after her, I'm afraid it's never culminated to much. ｜ 拜托你了，她对我有些戒备，我虽然一直很想关照她，但效果都不是很好。
- "...Well, at least my putting them to good use is better than letting them mold away here, hehe..." ｜ 「…反正被我妥善利用，总比留在这里发霉好，嘿嘿…」
- Is Nahida going to be okay? We only made it out because of her... ｜ 纳西妲她会不会有事啊，多亏了纳西妲我们才能逃出来…
- Hmph. That Reptilian seems to be doing a pretty good job of human imitation. ｜ 哼，明明只是条蜥蜴，学人学得有模有样。
- Chlothar ｜ 克洛达尔
- A worn wooden buckler used as decoration. It can still be taken down and used.\nMondstadt's hunters have a tradition of displaying armor in their homes, believing that this will encourage future generations to continue in the spirit of the hunt.\nBut their children took to throwing it around like a frisbee, hitting a wild boar in the next-door hill in the process. As a result, the hunters have locked those round bucklers in place to prevent any such dangerous games from being invented in the future. ｜ 半旧的木制圆盾挂饰，似乎还能拿下来使用。\n蒙德的猎户有在家中摆放防具的传统，他们认为这样能鼓舞后代，延续猎人的斗志。\n但之前某位猎户家的小孩曾将它当成飞镖玩耍，结果一发击倒了隔壁山头的野林猪。从此猎人们就为圆盾的挂饰上锁，防止孩子们发明危险的玩法。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Teucer ｜ 托克
- Well basically, she helped me out a lot with my research into potion-making once, and we've stayed in touch through letters ever since... ｜ 简单点说，莺儿小姐在魔药研究方面给了很大帮助，自从那次交流之后，我们一直保持书信往来…
- How about you fly with me, just once? ｜ 能不能这样，你们跟我一起飞一次行不行？
- You're the suspicious one, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙，你好可疑！
- At Third-Round Knockout, you and Noelle meet a somewhat frustrated Iron Tongue Tian. To help him find his muse and write his new, knightly tale, Noelle agrees to help provide some source material. ｜ 诺艾尔与你在「三碗不过港」遇到了正在苦恼的说书先生田铁嘴。 为了帮助田铁嘴创作以骑士为题材的新评书，诺艾尔开始帮忙取材…
- Sure, standing behind the counter at the Adventurers' Guild doesn't require any complicated functions. ｜ 虽说站在柜台后面，的确不需要这么复杂的功能。
- Alright, let me think... to make this drink, we'll need some fresh Jueyun Chilis and Sweet Flowers. ｜ 那就好，我想想，制作这种饮料需要新鲜的绝云椒椒和甜甜花…
- Hmm, according to Arana, we must get a Bija from Vanarana to help Rana. ｜ 嗯，按照兰拉娜的说法，我们要到桓那兰那取得惟耶之实。这样才能帮助拉娜。
- I'm so happy that I was able to gather the Head Mushroom, complete my cooking training, and get to know a strong and reliable Nara. ｜ 采到了「一头菇」，完成了烹饪修行，认识了高大又可靠的那菈。真是开心。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Continuous Healing|{param6:F1P} ATK+{param5:I} ｜ 持续治疗量|{param6:F1P}攻击力+{param5:I}
- ...So, you switched the bottles of "Auguste" and then lied to me about Sylvain's death... ｜ …那个时候，你就调换了「奥古斯都」吗？借着向我报告席尔万死讯的机会…
- Talk to Smiley Yanxiao ｜ 与言笑对话
- They do not deserve to suffer this unforeseen calamity... The grudges between us should stay between us. ｜ 他们不应遭受这样的无妄之灾…而你我之间的仇怨就留给我们两人吧。
- That's... That's right! No wonder they call you the Cloudpiercing Arrow, Huang the Third! We could barely keep up... ｜ #是…是呀，不愧是江湖人称「穿云箭」的黄三爷，连{NICKNAME}和我都差点没追上…
- You were secretly reading a book again, weren't you? You weren't playing seriously at all! ｜ 哥…你不会又是躲在哪里偷偷看书了吧？没有认真陪我们玩！
- Eude ｜ 厄德
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Crystalline Path." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「晶辉隐幽」。
- How should the recipient of this gift envelope be addressed... ｜ 对于会收到这份祝柬的人，应当用何称呼…
- Next year, I'm going to apply for Swordfish I to be redeployed into Specter management. 'Cause if it's that or spend more time in Enkanomiya, I'll take my chance with the Specters. ｜ 明年我要申请让剑鱼一番队去治理海祇岛飘浮灵。我宁可干那个也不想再下渊下宫了。
- Character Ascension Material ｜ 角色突破素材
- Of course, if you accept my proposal, Monsieur Neuvillette, I'm sure certain measures could be taken to reduce the frequency of such troubles. ｜ 当然，如果那维莱特先生答应我的提案，我可以帮忙做一些事情，让类似的麻烦少一些。
- White Cream Sauce is actually really tasty, but the word "sour" is completely unnecessary! You make it sound like it's gone bad! ｜ 白酱倒是挺好吃的，酸味这个形容就没必要了啦，感觉像是放坏以后的味道！
- According to what he said afterwards, our mutual superiors have also found Sir Hanbei's work ethic to be quite praiseworthy. ｜ 之后，据御舆源次郎大人说，上面的大人们也对范兵卫大人的工作能力十分赞赏。
